John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Are you missing President Trump today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
VOTE NOW -- I want to hear what you think. Is President Trump still the leader of the Republican Party? We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. Will you take a moment to cast yours now?

|
---

Peter,

Recently, my team and I sent you an email asking for you to help us better understand the direction which the Republican Party is headed. More pointedly, **[we asked you to weigh in on whether or not you consider President Trump the leader of the Republican Party.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c334fb97387b4417bc7ba0469407416b&_e=oKv7--Pm5RBKJnYCplG7kciQVGJAape5bKNd77Ql6JHiReoUculuiEyNQfmNt2ieWxUQFzdb5MffWFXM5A9_6BLzsMQH14IkGA57UOqzAQP5oxX3B560Wgbi3af5F7rxKw1vDr2ZfGqMGYnyLp6kTJExBM_kVcHVQm3A8Ir89xM_E0drJ2-ZqDhEQOjM1JTI1_vFw4Ca3qWECPTGwC3bCK2uDjX2dmfZvp3F0aSMghrHkGEvUFDHp8jUTmK23bqIhsqGj6jha309ro2_iq3cPhwwKTXXhiQ5EQ7brPeiCjwv-UNR6UJYxQ9LB4mZoXx74fm-ddcZY61kdAs7oPx8lwNIgzlx-pfh_vafrO4x49so6JUcHt6rxX6OqhkgQS8LlERos_q1tdoiRq2AazbwdFGw5EO2e6FFLjgM5b1Acq9NSUj1WG45L9_DfVGrZ7khCB2bEEZ_YRpInW8H0QKxj7rtaJmiKVjxTCkKSgYHEHGAgDZ3ZjXTU1u4pDVe5c1PWKe41YWDGTyiRC_1Wy62boeZ-KSRH7ra4MN4S7CEdEA%3D)**

My team just delivered a preliminary report to me and we’re not seeing the results we were hoping for. **We set a goal of finding 50,000 conservatives to vote in our poll - the more votes the more accurate the findings - and we’re coming up 2,000 votes short. We're hoping to find the additional 2,000 votes by midnight TONIGHT, and we need your help to get that done. **

Peter, your name is not on my list as having voted. **[Would you do me a personal favor and cast your vote in my poll before midnight tonight?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c334fb97387b4417bc7ba0469407416b&_e=oKv7--Pm5RBKJnYCplG7kciQVGJAape5bKNd77Ql6JHiReoUculuiEyNQfmNt2ieWxUQFzdb5MffWFXM5A9_6BLzsMQH14IkGA57UOqzAQP5oxX3B560Wgbi3af5F7rxKw1vDr2ZfGqMGYnyLp6kTJExBM_kVcHVQm3A8Ir89xM_E0drJ2-ZqDhEQOjM1JTI1_vFw4Ca3qWECPTGwC3bCK2uDjX2dmfZvp3F0aSMghrHkGEvUFDHp8jUTmK23bqIhsqGj6jha309ro2_iq3cPhwwKTXXhiQ5EQ7brPeiCjwv-UNR6UJYxQ9LB4mZoXx74fm-ddcZY61kdAs7oPx8l-9oXTpVnZ1l4epiYfn_ChVGdsEN7tylV-A2j_4VV_muHs4kJRMbB-f9XMMETGxiLXH8vKiA1AqTpEqPQOm_2C_yROzWSewf1zc6tu9C3UO-Egtx8jVyXo2bEFVkJ0q69lDbR4pPnP3XBxyZBlP-WAiW53i5ppoE-0YmhjxJ9pj5UfyriaLUulczDqVo25ILRcpbGETMVH-8sLIvBYwjdd8%3D)**

[ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c334fb97387b4417bc7ba0469407416b&_e=oKv7--Pm5RBKJnYCplG7kciQVGJAape5bKNd77Ql6JHiReoUculuiEyNQfmNt2ieWxUQFzdb5MffWFXM5A9_6BLzsMQH14IkGA57UOqzAQP5oxX3B560Wgbi3af5F7rxKw1vDr2ZfGqMGYnyLp6kTJExBM_kVcHVQm3A8Ir89xM_E0drJ2-ZqDhEQOjM1JTI1_vFw4Ca3qWECPTGwC3bCK2uDjX2dmfZvp3F0aSMghrHkGEvUFDHp8jUTmK23bqIhsqGj6jha309ro2_iq3cPhwwKTXXhiQ5EQ7brPeiCjwv-UNR6UJYxQ9LB4mZoXx74fm-ddcZY61kdAs7oPx8l16aztTtw4JKf70CXCnaTYi4DBWNAFgb_v3cYqanZJB-dMlFguSAJ77ggu3KODCZhJ80GewkTTxkBsBGeM5FIVAje9bY5hzu3lPrtvdN9xx_FMI5KSmrJby4YeLaBCs_lb7m1JoOmhkPHPcVxmJbTfiI6vhQpvlwXQhz5Xz176G9bpeYMrMbWIUiXySJ-x4LLag2_bByxVTCn9QtCRxRqCM%3D)
You see, the earlier we can determine the direction in which Republican voters want the party to go – and the leaders who voters want to be at the helm -- _**the sooner we can fine-tune our plans to help take back the House majority in this year’s midterm elections**_.

clean_body: VOTE NOW -- I want to hear what you think. Is President Trump still the leader of the Republican Party? We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. Will you take a moment to cast yours now? | Peter, Recently, my team and I sent you an email asking for you to help us better understand the direction which the Republican Party is headed. More pointedly, My team just delivered a preliminary report to me and we’re not seeing the results we were hoping for. We set a goal of finding 50,000 conservatives to vote in our poll - the more votes the more accurate the findings - and we’re coming up 2,000 votes short. We're hoping to find the additional 2,000 votes by midnight TONIGHT, and we need your help to get that done. Peter, your name is not on my list as having voted. You see, the earlier we can determine the direction in which Republican voters want the party to go – and the leaders who voters want to be at the helm -- the sooner we can fine-tune our plans to help take back the House majority in this year’s midterm elections. We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. We need to know whether or not you’re going to stand with our Party leadership - including President Trump - as we work to take back the house from socialist-sympathizing Democrats next year. | For freedom, Jim Jordan Don't want to receive our emails? | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

For a discussion on national security issues and how they matter at home, 'truth decay' and disinformation, and more.

| Dear Peter, We are pleased to invite you to join Team McGrath and The Steady State for a discussion featuring Lt. General (USAF, Ret) Jim Clapper, the Former Director of National Intelligence, on America's critical national security challenges in the 21st Century. The event will be on Zoom next week, March 2nd, from 5:00 to 6:00 PM CT. Lt. General Clapper and Deb's discussion will be moderated by Paul Kolbe, Director of Harvard Belfer Center Intelligence Project. There will be a Q&A at the event's conclusion. We also have an extraordinary host committee, including Steven Cash, Paul and Maureen Kolbe, John Sipher, John Pereira, William Browne, Paul Hazen, Martin Rosol, Stephen Broughall, Mary Lang Sollinger, and Dana Wachs. The event will be on Zoom next week, March 2nd, from 5:00 to 6:00 PM CT. Lt. General Clapper and Deb's discussion will be moderated by Paul Kolbe, Director of Harvard Belfer Center Intelligence Project. There will be a Q&A at the event's conclusion. We also have an extraordinary host committee, including Steven Cash, Paul and Maureen Kolbe, John Sipher, John Pereira, William Browne, Paul Hazen, Martin Rosol, Stephen Broughall, Mary Lang Sollinger, and Dana Wachs. = = Thank you so much for your support, and we hope to see you there! Team McGrath | | Deb McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity. Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. Now she’s being called to serve her hometown and western Wisconsin in Congress. This campaign runs on the support from folks like you. = | ****=** **=** Learn more at: Follow along: | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 41, Menomonie, WI 54751 Use of Deb McGrath's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform (or that of others) does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense, the Central Intelligence Agency, or any other branch of government. name: Chris Evans, Beto for Texas
subject: Had to share these 5 pics with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

It’s Chris, Beto’s Communications Director. I thought you might want to
see what we’re able to do thanks to the 124,000+ grassroots donors
who’ve generously pitched in to our campaign.

Last weekend, Beto, Amy, and our team got in the truck and headed back
down to the Rio Grande Valley for another big weekend of connecting with
supporters and mobilizing voters ahead of the Texas primaries on March
1st.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53565?refcode=ema20220225-2-177906&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=177906%2E444211%2EsQmEhe ]Knocking doors in Brownsville

On Friday, we knocked on doors in Brownsville to talk about early voting,
while thousands of Team Beto volunteers did the same thing in communities
all across the state. We also celebrated Charro Days at the Baile del Sol
festival!

This festival is a historic celebration of the shared heritage between
Brownsville and the neighboring Mexican city of Matamoros. There are
games, parades, food stands, costume contests, and even a taco eating
contest.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53565?refcode=ema20220225-2-177906&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=177906%2E444211%2EsQmEhe ]Charro Days in Brownsville

At a time when Abbott is using border communities as a prop in a dangerous
effort to scare people and divide us, and after he took thousands of Texas
Guard members away from their families for a political stunt that puts
enormous stress on them as their pay has been delayed, it was wonderful to
be part of celebrating the pride, unity, resilience, and joy of
Brownsville.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53565?refcode=ema20220225-2-177906&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=177906%2E444211%2EsQmEhe ]Charro Days in Brownsville

We also held “Vote with Beto/¡Vota con Beto!” events in San Benito,
Mission, and other communities where we rallied with voters before they
walked over to the polls. (By the way, Early Voting ended today, but if
you’re a registered Texas voter who wants to cast a ballot on Election Day
this Tuesday, you can find your polling place at vote.betofortexas.com)

And we also held events in Harlingen and Laredo where we continue to come
back to. As always, we were inspired by the energy of folks in the
community, who are working so hard to make things better for each other
and for the rest of this state.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53565?refcode=ema20220225-2-177906&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=177906%2E444211%2EsQmEhe ]Laredo

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53565?refcode=ema20220225-2-177906&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=177906%2E444211%2EsQmEhe ]Harlingen

All in all, we got voters to the polls, talked to many at their doors, and
drew local press coverage all across the RGV and South Texas as Beto
shared his positive vision of investing in border communities instead of
villainizing them. In just a single weekend, we significantly strengthened
Beto’s support in a region of Texas that is too often overlooked and taken
for granted.

Every dollar you can invest in our campaign will help Beto stay on the
road until November and do the same thing in every part of Texas. It’s how
we’re going to beat Greg Abbott’s voter suppression, and overcome his $50
million in the bank.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53565?refcode=ema20220225-2-177906&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&akid=177906%2E444211%2EsQmEhe ]If you’re with us, will you donate
your first
$3 (or any amount) to put Beto back on the road as soon as
possible so we can reach voters everywhere?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53565?refcode=ema20220225-2-177906&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=177906%2E444211%2EsQmEhe ]Contribute $3

Whether you’re in a place to contribute today or not, we are unbelievably
grateful for your support. Together, we’re making history in Texas.

Thanks for helping to make it all possible,

Chris Evans
Communications Director, Beto for Texas

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=177906%2E444211%2EsQmEhe

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

clean_body: If we can’t clear $8,350 by tonight, our ad will be pulled in the final days of the race. | Friend, Thanks to generous grassroots conservatives like you, we were able to make our final ad-buy, ensuring Texas voters would see the ad during early voting. But with election day just DAYS away, we're now at risk of having our ad SHUT OFF at the most critical point of the race. We need to raise another $8,350 by 10:15 P.M. TONIGHT to keep our ad running that’s winning over the hearts and minds of voters with every passing minute. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Wesley Hunt Date: Fri, February 18, 2022 Subject: Last chance to air our ad To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Our final ad-buy deadline before election day is TONIGHT. | Friend, Early voting is in full swing and tonight’s 10:45 P.M. ad-buy deadline is our FINAL buy before our March 1 election. But as it stands, we’re still $23,875 short for our placement. As I write you this email, Texas voters are already casting their ballots – and every minute our ad goes unaired is a potential voter lost. As the very first election of 2022, we can’t leave anything to chance. Winning this race is the first step in our battle to take back the House from Pelosi’s control. With only 5 seats needed to END her majority, this truly is our make-or-break moment of the election year, Friend. But if we can’t make our final ad placement, it could all be for nothing come election day. subject: Quick update
body:
| | | [ ](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=69186f752a&e=89fb4d5220)
---
| Friends,

Our momentum is strong, and David Perdue will be Georgia's next Governor! Here are a few key updates from this week. We hope to see you out on the campaign trail soon.

– Team Perdue

* * *

_**Fighting For Term Limits**_

As an outsider, David is continuing lead the fight for term limits, and this week he announced his plan for term limits at the state level. We need more citizen legislators, not career politicians.

_**Watch a video from David about this[HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=4105abeee1&e=89fb4d5220)!**_
[](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=b2fe04182e&e=89fb4d5220)
_**Trump Endorsement 'Means the World' In Georgia Governor's Race**_

David joined _[Newsmax TV](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=10b866722f&e=89fb4d5220) _and discussed the importance of President Trump's endorsement in the Governor's race.
[](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=1d87485015&e=89fb4d5220)
"Right now, people can compare what we achieved under President Trump, and what is the disaster of President Joe Biden," **David said.** "Under President Trump we created the best economic turnaround in U.S. history, and in Georgia that endorsement means the world against the 20-year career politician who has fought Trump at every turn."

**_Biden's Weakness Emboldened Putin_**

On [_The Morning XTRA_](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=2ec5e96090&e=89fb4d5220), David discussed Russia's invasion of Ukraine.
[](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=40464d04ae&e=89fb4d5220)
"Russia has got to be stopped," **he said.** "This is nothing but a bully – Putin – taking advantage of a weak president of the United States. It would not have happened under Donald Trump."

Click [here](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=07f6b2fca5&e=89fb4d5220) to listen.

_**David At CPAC On Sunday**_

[Tune in](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=b01d4e3c86&e=89fb4d5220) on Sunday at 1:20 PM to hear David speak at CPAC. He'll discuss how the liberal Democrat ethos has totally failed and how Republicans must unite to take back our country. You won't want to miss it!
[](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=74e1563e00&e=89fb4d5220)
**Watch live[here](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=e3f1629b58&e=89fb4d5220). **

_**Mark Your Calendars**_

Join David on the campaign trail at one of his stops next week!
* [March 1, 1:00 PM: Henry County Meet & Greet](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=3bacaecbc8&e=89fb4d5220)
* [March 1, 5:00 PM: Save Georgia, Stop Soros Rally in Morgan County](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=6d3283c4a8&e=89fb4d5220)
* [March 3, 5:00 PM: Gwinnett-DeKalb Meet & Greet](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=073fe40a86&e=89fb4d5220)
* [March 3, 6:00 PM:**** Rockdale County GOP Meeting](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=b00b9d1a6e&e=89fb4d5220)

###

name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN
body:
The latest news from the Republican Party of Wisconsin

| | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_25_2021_v1&n=1)
---
### February 25, 2022
Friend -- It’s been a difficult two weeks for Wisconsin Democrats. Between Tony Evers’ failed State of the State Address that was met with [**backlash**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0RVa7ggGcM5ufQbvamIMoKjPbTn0cKsT571XZheA4659K6onqbZ7s9joiE--hpsCEUGQXR4IbQLJ-E3A51BbcGM&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_25_2021_v1&n=2) for his failure to mention rising crime, Mandela Barnes’ [**exposed**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0W4hcYPbku9AOxmxWm7xXaZLZb4wT4tK_ggXCJz1u4ECRWZQOX9p5PWd1zYnzsq9PyItnJxe8fbjRQQIKnRE9RQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_25_2021_v1&n=3) anti-cash bail stances, and Wisconsin Democrat Party official Lee Snodgrass’ embarrassing anti-parent [**tweet**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0TvjWvhNWJpFj67YCW1-p0OlcwnLiaNhRNtmtMwB6r64yKK5IYHQNm4AwSks1dpjXupJM_y_f4NN7BUQRZUJ9lY&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_25_2021_v1&n=4) that went viral, Wisconsin voters are watching the Democrats’ failures play out in real-time. Meanwhile, Republicans are full-steam ahead of November, and we are constantly recruiting new [**volunteers**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0bfZhAig058TAIOJhSOZVp8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_25_2021_v1&n=5) to join our efforts. If you would like to help us bring attention to the Democrats’ failures, we would love to have you join us! As always, thanks for all you do! \- Team WisGOP |
The Republican Party of Wisconsin is praying for the people of Ukraine as they confront this egregious attack by Vladimir Putin on their sovereignty. Joe Biden promised to keep Putin in check, but he failed, and even a former Obama official admitted that Biden’s Putin strategy isn’t working. Biden has spent months emboldening Russia and Putin, and his weakness created this latest foreign policy disaster after he emboldened ISIS-K and Al Qaeda with a botched Afghanistan withdrawal and failed to hold the Chinese Communist Party accountable for COVID. We must elect Republicans to push back against his weak leadership. No matter how high crime rises or how drastically the consequences affect Wisconsin communities, Tony Evers remains incapable of standing up for public safety. Last week, Evers gave his annual State of the State Address. While Evers has never had a record of success to tout, this time, Wisconsinites were aghast as he failed to mention rising crime once during his remarks. On this weekend’s edition of WISN’s UpFront, Tony Evers once again skirted accountability for his failure to keep our communities safe – blaming the Legislature for his own failures. Wisconsinites deserve a governor who will stand up for public safety and protect our communities amid historic violence across the state. You can read our statement on the State of the State [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0R72aAQRdpUWAFwuxNARiAV85lwqO-Ci5KdnGUIAczlBZ1Y8TJDD3q-icFtQ9GwN5w&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_25_2021_v1&n=6) , or read Chairman Paul Farrow’s op-ed in Wisconsin Right Now [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=5wg3don5l6_J12hXkf3HPcNYT6lUz2m18CPWRl8AJrxE2b_PUz7xxXYes4Kcm0oY06-ZedIuviZ4U5HkfZksew&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_25_2021_v1&n=7). | | This week, the Republicans in the Wisconsin State Legislature passed a slew of election bills aimed to increase the security of our election process. These commonsense bills include ensuring non-citizens are not voting, limiting the photo ID loophole for “indefinitely confined” electors, prohibiting partisan-outside groups funding of election administration, maintaining secure voter registration databases, and much more. For more information on these election reform bills, visit our Election Integrity Dashboard [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0eH7mQqnwg7TiRkzkxQsBEjYN0qYIVr_dl05xpqOQV0I&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_25_2021_v1&n=8). The White House recently [**announced**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TonhTPU42INcQYCcQsz6Juuxqa-qOw5gZyvLx8KxLiaHjqfq7go1cmIvCQowazDdWoeExnh3uwl9XHnuHGFdZ9mT0QfV_GQeBarxkkwR3137&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_25_2021_v1&n=9) that Joe Biden will stop in Superior next week to discuss infrastructure following his State of the Union Address. Of course, amid a state of emergency in Ukraine and a slew of domestic crises, Wisconsinites are looking for real leadership from their president – not a midterm photo op for Democrat politicians. If Biden wants to discuss infrastructure, he should announce that he is lowering energy costs and bringing back Wisconsin jobs by renewing construction of Keystone XL and defending the Line 5 pipeline despite the far-left’s attacks. Unfortunately, Biden’s visit will more than likely leave much to be desired. It’s been a difficult two weeks for Mandela Barnes. First, the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel [**reported**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0QoC7rgm5XDC2WUpuTddVCCNQ2s72cYs4ZL6TYM_brdpDPjpeTNHfDM3e2-2xbdhlI_YWa0WCdnqTUvorueGw1Rq-Y8ML9RN6utd44PFg9e5&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_25_2021_v1&n=10) on his efforts to distance himself from his friends in the “abolish ICE” and “defund the police” movements. Then, the Journal Sentinel revealed that even following the horrific attack in Waukesha that resulted from low cash bail for a violent repeat offender, Mandela Barnes is [**standing by**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0W4hcYPbku9AOxmxWm7xXaZLZb4wT4tK_ggXCJz1u4ECRWZQOX9p5PWd1zYnzsq9PyItnJxe8fbjRQQIKnRE9RQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_25_2021_v1&n=11) his mission to abolish cash bail across the country. Public safety is a top concern for Wisconsin families, and neither Barnes’ views that are out-of-touch with the mainstream, nor his efforts to duck, dodge, and waffle to appease the far-left, will inspire confidence in Wisconsin voters.
---|---|---
* * *
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0ahw3PTL6JsP8slQyv_Z45W1tpC4bxcjwcY7pLDfF8cTNlZrezZB2oVgQgpQzhDJdQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_25_2021_v1&n=12) | | Want to help stand up for conservative principles in your community? Submit a Letter to the Editor! You can send a letter directly to your local paper by filling out the form on our **[website](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0ahw3PTL6JsP8slQyv_Z45W1tpC4bxcjwcY7pLDfF8cTNlZrezZB2oVgQgpQzhDJdQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_25_2021_v1&n=13)**.
---|---|---
* * *
### **In Case You Missed It...**
### _[**Wisconsin Democrats to Parents: “Mind Your Own Business and Stop Being Poor”**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0TvjWvhNWJpFj67YCW1-p0OlcwnLiaNhRNtmtMwB6r64yKK5IYHQNm4AwSks1dpjXupJM_y_f4NN7BUQRZUJ9lY&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_25_2021_v1&n=14)****_
Democrat State Representative and Wisconsin Democrat Party leader Lee Snodgrass channeled Paris Hilton to gaslight parents about their concerns with transparency in their children’s curriculum. In the now-deleted tweet, Snodgrass advised parents – whose taxpayer dollars already support public schools – to home school their children or pay for private school tuition if they want to have a say in their children’s education.
### _[**What You Won’t Hear During the State of the State**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0Sl4u2LCpY4quBcdrSlEtsJFtzvw0cYXkEbVl0lKFzcgrXMcNN5QnhDgophShRXeUebaI82DvsmyB4XkyOcT8lE&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_25_2021_v1&n=15)_
Recently, Tony Evers plodded through his final State of the State address. Unfortunately for Evers, he has no accomplishments to highlight – so he instead blamed others for his failed record, took credit for Republicans’ accomplishments, and referenced allocations from his taxpayer-funded re-election slush fund that he isn’t even spending efficiently.
### _[**Mandela Barnes Tries to Backtrack From the Far-Left Fringe**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0QoC7rgm5XDC2WUpuTddVCCNQ2s72cYs4ZL6TYM_brdpDPjpeTNHfDM3e2-2xbdhlI_YWa0WCdnqTUvorueGw1Rq-Y8ML9RN6utd44PFg9e5&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_25_2021_v1&n=16)_
In case you missed it, the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel reported on Mandela Barnes’ newfound claims that he doesn’t support the far-left “Defund the Police” or “Abolish ICE” movements – despite the years of tweets, endorsements, and even T-shirts that suggest otherwise. Despite Barnes’ efforts to duck, dodge, and waffle until November, he has already shown voters that he stands with criminals and the far-left instead of Wisconsin families. Now more than ever, Wisconsin needs a straight-shooter on policies that are critical to keeping the public safe.
### **Worth the Read**
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=q_G7lXppHyLgLmXMMU9Y0DqW8kzWpSGjfq5txFY-MozHVJ6lcVJNCeaK8bXVUE7Zm0zd9_QM9uDfz5hsca004uaEhroAHZfbuyVtAu_2BzrmyTnP5CdSPV4eGuqW6BNsw26UoamoQPiPG7VgI6T1lg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_25_2021_v1&n=17) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=FZeaJrGkqb-JdJpt5MxOBLJsdDKp7AeIiu8R8SikDvgwjaF3gfylDVTWtZ-UYT9zJtgijhRUI6wzm8HJSQl-3Q&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_25_2021_v1&n=18) | | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=5wg3don5l6_J12hXkf3HPcNYT6lUz2m18CPWRl8AJrxE2b_PUz7xxXYes4Kcm0oY06-ZedIuviZ4U5HkfZksew&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_25_2021_v1&n=19) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=1Md8n-ixLwkzQmZ02kVykADOmRW4PJqGM8SE6Vlf9KpSx2cyd0FPZVHBbZGWdOuvS63QbNVQcXeTHUIOR64qAIitomgV-dUTkV7Z9EVSzhReImuZI9C5qAirFItgqnRAylV-BRVQNiTxjJUh2HT-DVZM1vyEPWjZx10HxWu-G06ffZoJr_Hs4U5grrHCbphW1HW9URPhBQVCwM42RKJOyA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_25_2021_v1&n=20)
---|---|---

clean_body: The latest news from the Republican Party of Wisconsin | | February 25, 2022 Friend -- It’s been a difficult two weeks for Wisconsin Democrats. Between Tony Evers’ failed State of the State Address that was met with for his failure to mention rising crime, Mandela Barnes’ anti-cash bail stances, and Wisconsin Democrat Party official Lee Snodgrass’ embarrassing anti-parent that went viral, Wisconsin voters are watching the Democrats’ failures play out in real-time. Meanwhile, Republicans are full-steam ahead of November, and we are constantly recruiting new to join our efforts. If you would like to help us bring attention to the Democrats’ failures, we would love to have you join us! As always, thanks for all you do! \- Team WisGOP | The Republican Party of Wisconsin is praying for the people of Ukraine as they confront this egregious attack by Vladimir Putin on their sovereignty. Joe Biden promised to keep Putin in check, but he failed, and even a former Obama official admitted that Biden’s Putin strategy isn’t working. Biden has spent months emboldening Russia and Putin, and his weakness created this latest foreign policy disaster after he emboldened ISIS-K and Al Qaeda with a botched Afghanistan withdrawal and failed to hold the Chinese Communist Party accountable for COVID. We must elect Republicans to push back against his weak leadership. No matter how high crime rises or how drastically the consequences affect Wisconsin communities, Tony Evers remains incapable of standing up for public safety. Last week, Evers gave his annual State of the State Address. While Evers has never had a record of success to tout, this time, Wisconsinites were aghast as he failed to mention rising crime once during his remarks. On this weekend’s edition of WISN’s UpFront, Tony Evers once again skirted accountability for his failure to keep our communities safe – blaming the Legislature for his own failures. Wisconsinites deserve a governor who will stand up for public safety and protect our communities amid historic violence across the state. You can read our statement on the State of the State , or read Chairman Paul Farrow’s op-ed in Wisconsin Right Now . | | This week, the Republicans in the Wisconsin State Legislature passed a slew of election bills aimed to increase the security of our election process. These commonsense bills include ensuring non-citizens are not voting, limiting the photo ID loophole for “indefinitely confined” electors, prohibiting partisan-outside groups funding of election administration, maintaining secure voter registration databases, and much more. For more information on these election reform bills, visit our Election Integrity Dashboard . The White House recently that Joe Biden will stop in Superior next week to discuss infrastructure following his State of the Union Address. Of course, amid a state of emergency in Ukraine and a slew of domestic crises, Wisconsinites are looking for real leadership from their president – not a midterm photo op for Democrat politicians. If Biden wants to discuss infrastructure, he should announce that he is lowering energy costs and bringing back Wisconsin jobs by renewing construction of Keystone XL and defending the Line 5 pipeline despite the far-left’s attacks. Unfortunately, Biden’s visit will more than likely leave much to be desired. It’s been a difficult two weeks for Mandela Barnes. First, the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel on his efforts to distance himself from his friends in the “abolish ICE” and “defund the police” movements. Then, the Journal Sentinel revealed that even following the horrific attack in Waukesha that resulted from low cash bail for a violent repeat offender, Mandela Barnes is his mission to abolish cash bail across the country. Public safety is a top concern for Wisconsin families, and neither Barnes’ views that are out-of-touch with the mainstream, nor his efforts to duck, dodge, and waffle to appease the far-left, will inspire confidence in Wisconsin voters. ---|---|--- | | Want to help stand up for conservative principles in your community? Submit a Letter to the Editor! You can send a letter directly to your local paper by filling out the form on our . ---|---|--- In Case You Missed It... ** Democrat State Representative and Wisconsin Democrat Party leader Lee Snodgrass channeled Paris Hilton to gaslight parents about their concerns with transparency in their children’s curriculum. In the now-deleted tweet, Snodgrass advised parents – whose taxpayer dollars already support public schools – to home school their children or pay for private school tuition if they want to have a say in their children’s education. Recently, Tony Evers plodded through his final State of the State address. Unfortunately for Evers, he has no accomplishments to highlight – so he instead blamed others for his failed record, took credit for Republicans’ accomplishments, and referenced allocations from his taxpayer-funded re-election slush fund that he isn’t even spending efficiently. In case you missed it, the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel reported on Mandela Barnes’ newfound claims that he doesn’t support the far-left “Defund the Police” or “Abolish ICE” movements – despite the years of tweets, endorsements, and even T-shirts that suggest otherwise. Despite Barnes’ efforts to duck, dodge, and waffle until November, he has already shown voters that he stands with criminals and the far-left instead of Wisconsin families. Now more than ever, Wisconsin needs a straight-shooter on policies that are critical to keeping the public safe. Worth the Read | | ---|---|--- Top Sharable Content ****

name: Jena Tarantin
subject: Russian Persecution

body:
The true story of Russia, past, and present. |
---
Fellow American,

My name is Jena, and I’m the wife of [**James Tarantin, who is running to be the next U.S. Senator from Maryland.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a7535f4f75cf4878b94077ca4b49155b&_e=_u2bzI3c3Vfmtu5FLFkPCSyACiFxKcp3XEUY6Ov8TXz_KNAci05rrWZw4y_YSuUC03GkdajJqaKvekNVOd7MNfc-JYFgHJmm9JTEY3uCUdFCs-8b6zcpBEcImOTSex7TNWFPEL6NB1jOntITkFpOtRb0k1OdT6XrQICeYCBT9pYjSLOkYrq0D1sBwcj7vN1crBv_Kz2QQpks-zSBQ0gIFMZl4_6u1KdV4yQOY46WIJNsSw3LTC8VtWoQUMberWVDM3m4Gn53g7_c8-tbMVxzHOtQ3aiXVGrsn1qNoza-5zmzTRPWXT9annfCVSk3GB5jmd0aJFx5fn5aSmF_AoqRwg_tot0IviENmW6uh30dinLOFgymESuAVwVvmY1ll0ydRFwAFzQtYkb0DO7Z6XLJ4oM2DsksBEs_B0Ht3dE1hnBi8CR1gy5YYBDrxqK49MsfftZzj1FQreyxKt5Ba__uooc-9BugNtdeQHNU0av96hQ%3D)

**You may have seen this already, but I wanted to share this note my grandfather left for me before he passed away in the Soviet Union:**

| | _May the American People be with you down every road you roam.

And may its compassion surround you when you're far from my wooden home.

And may you grow to be conservative, kind, and true.

And do unto others as you'd have done to you.

Be brave my dear child as the fighters in World War Two.

And in my heart, you'll always stay bright as the Light that comes from America’s shores.

America Forever. America Forever. _
---

I show this to you because my parents and I lived during the dark times of the Soviet Union. I remember the liberties that were taken away from us, as well as the restrictions that were forced on my family.

**Because of all that, my family escaped to the land of the free –** [**America.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a7535f4f75cf4878b94077ca4b49155b&_e=_u2bzI3c3Vfmtu5FLFkPCSyACiFxKcp3XEUY6Ov8TXz_KNAci05rrWZw4y_YSuUC03GkdajJqaKvekNVOd7MNfc-JYFgHJmm9JTEY3uCUdFCs-8b6zcpBEcImOTSex7TNWFPEL6NB1jOntITkFpOtRb0k1OdT6XrQICeYCBT9pYjSLOkYrq0D1sBwcj7vN1crBv_Kz2QQpks-zSBQ0gIFMZl4_6u1KdV4yQOY46WIJNsSw3LTC8VtWoQUMberWVDM3m4Gn53g7_c8-tbMVxzHEW4MO52sgdwNsZYhE2Oae1EJ-SACw1tNTJbSrpDI6BQHLmFx7WnyyCUzCmn-3tnwy8XVD4RpNP6gPzu3zhNWeMCR1YTJeBNNOZHvy6Wq_Otjw0lese7FCfunfSl3_ezptyRC5QuIeCj5bpT6CaHmAVTQ8seLiZY1jTZv_TEpES0tjI3u1PocfUwUJMzgPUix90GDRZp47wUjp8kFWK73OA%3D)

It wasn’t easy, but leaving everything behind to pursue the American Dream allowed me to become a nurse and a mother that was finally free from persecution.

**But, so much of what we’re seeing these days has me worried that the dark times my family escaped, are slowly coming back again.**

Some say that the violence we’re seeing across Ukraine has not been seen since the days of the Cold War or even WW2.

**Ronald Reagan knew about those dark times when he stood tall against the Soviet Union and told them to tear down the wall in Berlin.** He also once said that “People do NOT make wars, Governments do.”

Putin’s Russia is trying to repeat history by fighting to return things to the way they were under the Soviet Union. Putin is nothing more than an old Communist who became a Career Politician with Corrupt intentions. That is the naked truth.

[**We cannot let him, or people like him, destroy our American Dream.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a7535f4f75cf4878b94077ca4b49155b&_e=_u2bzI3c3Vfmtu5FLFkPCSyACiFxKcp3XEUY6Ov8TXz_KNAci05rrWZw4y_YSuUC03GkdajJqaKvekNVOd7MNfc-JYFgHJmm9JTEY3uCUdFCs-8b6zcpBEcImOTSex7TNWFPEL6NB1jOntITkFpOtRb0k1OdT6XrQICeYCBT9pYjSLOkYrq0D1sBwcj7vN1crBv_Kz2QQpks-zSBQ0gIFMZl4_6u1KdV4yQOY46WIJNsSw3LTC8VtWoQUMberWVDM3m4Gn53g7_c8-tbMVxzHKiT_D_9fLV7H_phXV1tSdaVpAyplZjybhVBOwdUYU4WoVNzKxMdbVOpnaldfNyDkHtMva-ChQe1TaOdy82A8TP5735R26Ku-iO7md8shXqqtIUHyNcIKa_xW772xfG63uHnIcGnaprE5KAma_gOX3NZckZ4pTWC3FTkUrVQEpHU337PFKv6jbkeW4cj2-WDOyZYEU8wcTfkF80mgvTddD4%3D) As Ronald Reagan once said, _**"If we lose freedom here, there is no place to escape to. This is the last stand on Earth."**_

**Everything we’ve seen this week shows us that what we need now more than ever, is people who are willing to do everything for this nation. The land of the free is only as free as we the people allow it to be.**

**We need solutions, not politicians who push off problems to the next generation.** [**That’s why my husband, James Tarantin, is running to be the first Israeli-born Senator in the history of America.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a7535f4f75cf4878b94077ca4b49155b&_e=_u2bzI3c3Vfmtu5FLFkPCSyACiFxKcp3XEUY6Ov8TXz_KNAci05rrWZw4y_YSuUC03GkdajJqaKvekNVOd7MNfc-JYFgHJmm9JTEY3uCUdFCs-8b6zcpBEcImOTSex7TNWFPEL6NB1jOntITkFpOtRb0k1OdT6XrQICeYCBT9pYjSLOkYrq0D1sBwcj7vN1crBv_Kz2QQpks-zSBQ0gIFMZl4_6u1KdV4yQOY46WIJNsSw3LTC8VtWoQUMberWVDM3m4Gn53g7_c8-tbMVxzHEZoAlg9sryDnTrFVBBRoD04ZCcqSKUfCvwPIomWVBtzMgSwrMaNBy8coxdR0G5yH38GjpAEGRWo3U050Rr0rLYbrcXZslpdelULF4Wq0yLXPkYDu9XY_N5a_Cxv1C4ZQvu5GqKnNYKVbbNOtmk-yLMhY7V-gAC20E-A68YiYDTOYZglCFbYqm4mXUoBNqL3zQbUtH8RuJn9cn8qJUPDvH8%3D)

Families like ours represent the American Dream, and if we don’t stick together then the dark times I saw in the Soviet Union could just as easily poison our America.

So, if you are worried like I am about what we’re seeing in America and around the world, [**then please hear my voice and support James for the United States Senate.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a7535f4f75cf4878b94077ca4b49155b&_e=_u2bzI3c3Vfmtu5FLFkPCSyACiFxKcp3XEUY6Ov8TXz_KNAci05rrWZw4y_YSuUC03GkdajJqaKvekNVOd7MNfc-JYFgHJmm9JTEY3uCUdFCs-8b6zcpBEcImOTSex7TNWFPEL6NB1jOntITkFpOtRb0k1OdT6XrQICeYCBT9pYjSLOkYrq0D1sBwcj7vN1crBv_Kz2QQpks-zSBQ0gIFMZl4_6u1KdV4yQOY46WIJNsSw3LTC8VtWoQUMberWVDM3m4Gn53g7_c8-tbMVxzHEV_9oE_aujp5OlxZg0kUCtXvczwOKCr2zY5fiMSGfl6UTOXCWLz-0ISfvQRAJ4EnH7CVq9bbcCU-iNPGpC-Uf5eUgLSe92wLs6cK9AiTPHbnphfzshH2RBaMZdvUijH3ix_ctfHljWe1y4nwQfNbQNuG6ieLuyuCKccFuILciUQ0rqbzwMGGTlrJ_0UqscYhw-RIbfNXqNbh4pxaTmZdZA%3D)

[**We must be United as one nation under God because your story like ours is an American story.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a7535f4f75cf4878b94077ca4b49155b&_e=_u2bzI3c3Vfmtu5FLFkPCSyACiFxKcp3XEUY6Ov8TXz_KNAci05rrWZw4y_YSuUC03GkdajJqaKvekNVOd7MNfc-JYFgHJmm9JTEY3uCUdFCs-8b6zcpBEcImOTSex7TNWFPEL6NB1jOntITkFpOtRb0k1OdT6XrQICeYCBT9pYjSLOkYrq0D1sBwcj7vN1crBv_Kz2QQpks-zSBQ0gIFMZl4_6u1KdV4yQOY46WIJNsSw3LTC8VtWoQUMberWVDM3m4Gn53g7_c8-tbMVxzHDMuODPpE_TvN7nb0fLZM47HpYY4jl4cX0Gs6XSeM5ZkAziXg9u36f6wt3Fhx9yR9244IVb37RGsrwvQ-KAEBWrJqp1P7GakocJlouB5OZpixurgzYTo6Uc5OABfgD01u0iKsMcOqjymw-p3JUna8qEa8tL3f8QD3mWB5XhUIK0GtDwSesimR5WHwH9pL5TRbFAoSgFxZ8VQW6J0IqRsOLc%3D)

Please, let’s determine America’s future together so it can be better, not worse than when we found it.

Thank you and God bless,

**Jena Tarantin**

[**FIGHT FOR AMERICA'S FUTURE**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a7535f4f75cf4878b94077ca4b49155b&_e=_u2bzI3c3Vfmtu5FLFkPCSyACiFxKcp3XEUY6Ov8TXz_KNAci05rrWZw4y_YSuUC03GkdajJqaKvekNVOd7MNfc-JYFgHJmm9JTEY3uCUdFCs-8b6zcpBEcImOTSex7TNWFPEL6NB1jOntITkFpOtRb0k1OdT6XrQICeYCBT9pYjSLOkYrq0D1sBwcj7vN1crBv_Kz2QQpks-zSBQ0gIFMZl4_6u1KdV4yQOY46WIJNsSw3LTC8VtWoQUMberWVDM3m4Gn53g7_c8-tbMVxzHNwUYVZEt3I4lW8tjDfmmZXHKP2D_z7ZteOT04ZPjr1HQmlvZgKNtAH6w1IxrBppf2hE471HvZPMp7oYzS4vOhNdFWxfoZpigZCa7lwRPsP3p88beEl1u9ofXPmcfcl_v2JqnC3HCt2zFosqXOgXGAL0H58EPnThvGxeUNIB9pH4DtQJfdzriIStoXaiVYWWbK6zDCC3Qy472qhh6kUN2dU%3D)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a7535f4f75cf4878b94077ca4b49155b&_e=_u2bzI3c3Vfmtu5FLFkPCSyACiFxKcp3XEUY6Ov8TXz_KNAci05rrWZw4y_YSuUC03GkdajJqaKvekNVOd7MNfc-JYFgHJmm9JTEY3uCUdFCs-8b6zcpBEcImOTSex7TNWFPEL6NB1jOntITkFpOtRb0k1OdT6XrQICeYCBT9pYjSLOkYrq0D1sBwcj7vN1crBv_Kz2QQpks-zSBQ0gIFMZl4_6u1KdV4yQOY46WIJNsSw3LTC8VtWoQUMberWVDM3m4Gn53g7_c8-tbMVxzHCZxAQ971QonWAmR2B8UHTRRiB2NmfjxPz40QW_sWIFRK3Nf0J2Xbt-vuyYi7KpBMf-NKtcgbMkCPjQ0ofuDqGOplAB_BDoR_9wrciTOXPFuxb16DFxJW06mtcveoLkva83JtJ2NglTTgzl9-QnXh74pYBq5i7g9SN5wIU9gwoX6VtuxCViLlL3-rTP2pQQ2tVkC0jI6q9ItMe14IxR7ObA%3D)

| | Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Judicial Activist Nominated to High Court
body: Saying You are ‘Colorblind’ is a ‘Microaggression’ at CFPB [INSIDE JW] NOMINATION OF JUDGE KETANJI BROWN JACKSON TO THE SUPREME COURT [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58164&L=26842&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9mdnd1eEtWY1locz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] President Biden bowed to pressure from his radical base and selected a judicial activist to fill Justice Stephen Breyer’s seat on the Supreme Court. Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson has a long record of left-wing activism both on and off the bench. Disturbingly, President Biden seems to have selected Judge Jackson under a process that excluded potential nominees simply because of their race and sex. The Senate must not only investigate Biden’s invidious discrimination but must also be prepared to reject Judge Jackson or any other nominee who wants to further politicize the Supreme Court by legislating from the bench. FEDERAL AGENCY TEACHES EMPLOYEES ABOUT ‘MICROAGGRESSIONS’ The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) has gone seriously “woke.” Among other curiosities, employees are taught that asking someone where they are from is a racial microaggression. We learned this in 48 pages [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58164&L=26835&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NmcGItcmVjb3Jkcy13b2tlLWZlYnJ1YXJ5LTIwMjIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] of records from the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) that included a PowerPoint presentation titled “Race and gender based microaggressions” that was used for training employees. We obtained the documents in response to a January 27, 2021, Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request asking for: * All records of the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) containing any of the following key words: ‘whiteness’; ‘unconscious bias’; ‘intersectionality’; ‘white privilege’; ‘Kendi’; ‘Robin DiAngelo’; ‘systemic racism’; ‘structural racism’; ‘close hold’; ‘climate justice’; or ’critical race theory’ * All CFPB records instructing or suggesting that any individuals or groups of people are fundamentally privileged, oppressive, oppressed, racist, or evil on account of their race; and 3. * All CFPB records instructing or suggesting that America is a fundamentally racist or evil country. The new records include a presentation by the CFPB’s Director of the Office of Civil Rights Melissa Brand titled “Race and gender based microaggressions” The “goals” of the presentation include: To help you identify race and gender based microaggressions To help you understand how microaggressions can turn into discrimination and/or unlawful harassment To help you understand YOUR role in preventing discrimination and harassment in the workplace To help you know how to respond to these situations A slide titled “Microaggressions” defines microaggressions as “verbal and nonverbal behaviors” that “communicate negative, hostile, and derogatory messages to people rooted in their marginalized group membership (based on gender, race, ethnicity, religion, sexuality, etc.)” The slide further notes that microaggressions can be “intentional or unintentional,” and are “more subtle” than “using racial epithets or displaying swastikas.” Other slides discussing “Stereotypes lead to microaggressions,” begin with a warning to the viewer: “Trigger warning: the next slide contains images of offensive stereotypes.” Cartoons are used to depict “offensive stereotypes,” which include people of color being offered various items such as: someone wearing a hoody and gold chain being offered sports balls; a hijab-wearing girl being offered a lit bomb and a picture of Osama bin Laden; a girl being offered a maid’s apron and a sombrero; a male being offered a guitar and a construction hat; a girl being handed a bottle of Aunt Jemimah syrup; and a girl being handed a spear, a teepee, and a Cleveland Indians baseball pennant. A section titled “Common race-based microaggressions in the workplace” depicts people saying various things, as well as what a minority “receives.” For instance, white males are shown saying: “When I look at you, I don’t see color;” “There is only one race, the human race;” and “When it comes to race, I am colorblind.” A female of color is shown to receive the message as: “Denying a person’s racial/ethnic experience;” “Assimilate to the dominant culture;” and “Denying the individual as a racial/cultural being.” In another “microaggression” slide, a white male says: “All lives matter,” but a hijab-wearing girl supposedly perceives it as: “Ignoring systemic racism, such as in police interactions.” Additionally, a pink, protest hat-wearing woman says: “As a woman, I know what you go through as a racial minority,” from which the hijab-wearing girl perceives: “Your racial oppression is no different than my gender oppression.” The presentation discusses “Two approaches to take when taking action” against microaggressions. One is to “disarm” the person: “If you choose to confront a microaggression, be prepared to disarm the person who committed it.” Also: “One reason we avoid conversations about race and gender discrimination is that they make people defensive. Perpetrators of microaggressions typically fear being perceived — or worse, revealed — as racist or sexist.” The other approach is to “defy” and “challenge the perpetrator to clarify their statement or action.” In a slide titled “What Can You Do?” about filing Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) complaints, a line of business people is shown. They all have Xs over their images, except for a youthful white man with a broad smile on his face, who is singled out with a check mark over his image. In the appendix, slides are titled “Examples of racial microaggressions.” Examples include: “Where are you from?” “Where were you born?” Asking an Asian American or Latino American to teach them words in their native language. “You are so articulate.” “Everyone can succeed in this society, if they work hard enough.” Person of color is mistaken for a service worker. College or university with buildings that are all named after ‘White’ [sic] heterosexual upper class males. Overabundance of liquor stores in communities of color. A section featuring “Examples of sex based microaggressions – aimed at females,” includes: “Have you been working out? You look good!!” “You have a doctorate?” Male colleagues interrupt women at meetings. Federal Agencies shouldn’t abuse tax dollars for CRT indoctrination, which makes a mockery of serious race and sex discrimination issues. These documents show that critical race theory is alive and well in the Biden administration. DOZENS OF AFGHAN REFUGEES POSE ‘SIGNIFICANT SECURITY CONCERNS’ We are legally pursuing [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58164&L=26499&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tYWZnaGFuaXN0YW4tbGF3c3VpdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] details on the Biden Administration’s disaster in Afghanistan. The horrors are endless. Now, courtesy if the administration, many Americans are unwitting neighbors to poorly vetted Afghan refugees. Our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog reports [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58164&L=26843&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYWZnaGFuLXJlZnVnZWVzLXNlY3VyaXR5LWNvbmNlcm5zL106P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz Dozens of Afghan refugees released in the U.S. have Pentagon records that “indicate potentially significant security concerns,” according to a new federal audit [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58164&L=26844&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9tZWRpYS5kZWZlbnNlLmdvdi8yMDIyL0ZlYi8xNy8yMDAyOTQwODQxLy0xLy0xLzEvRE9ESUctMjIyLTA2NS5QREY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] that reveals the multi-agency intelligence conglomerate created after 9/11 to protect the nation from terrorists has failed to properly vet thousands of Afghans. Under the Biden administration’s Operation Allies Welcome (OAW), approximately 80,000 “displaced persons from Afghanistan” have been admitted into the country under a special immigrant visa (SIV) or humanitarian parole. The president directed the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) to lead the chaotic plan to resettle the Afghans and the administration assured Americans the refugees would be thoroughly screened. That has not materialized, and for months media reports [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58164&L=26845&F=T&] have exposed crimes, including child molestation [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58164&L=26846&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9hcG5ld3MuY29tL2FydGljbGUvZG9uYWxkLXRydW1wLWNyaW1lLXdpc2NvbnNpbi0xODdlOTU5YmMzYmI2Y2NmODI3ZTJkYWJkZGQwMzRjNz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==], assault and domestic violence committed by Afghans housed at military bases throughout the U.S. Now a probe conducted by the Department of Defense (DOD) Inspector General (IG) offers more troubling details that shed light on the magnitude of the problem. Investigators found that the agency responsible for clearing the Afghans by conducting thorough background checks is not doing its job, creating serious national security issues and undoubtedly threatening the safety of Americans. The agency is known as the National Counterterrorism Center (NCTC) [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58164&L=26847&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZG5pLmdvdi9pbmRleC5waHAvbmN0Yy13aG8td2UtYXJlL2hpc3Rvcnk/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] and it functions under the Office of the Director of National Intelligence (ODNI). It was launched in the aftermath of the 2001 terrorist attacks by consolidating intel gathered by the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI), Central Intelligence Agency (CIA), DHS, and the DOD. The NCTC’s stated mission is to lead the national counterterrorism effort by fusing foreign and domestic counterterrorism information and its vision is to be a center of gravity and leading voice that unifies counterterrorism intelligence for the homeland and abroad with a record of sustained excellence across all mission areas. When it comes to screening Afghan refugees however, the NCTC has failed to use all available DOD data to properly vet candidates prior to arriving in the U.S. Besides missing the significant DOD security concerns of at least 50 refugees, the nation’s lead counterterrorism intelligence entity also failed to stop at least four dozen Afghans with “derogatory information” in their record, the report states. The document defines derogatory information as potentially justifying an unfavorable fitness or access determination, requiring further investigation. Those potentially dangerous refugees are somewhere in the U.S. and cannot be located, the DOD watchdog warns. “As a result of the NCTC not vetting Afghan evacuees against all available data, the United States faces potential security risks if individuals with derogatory information are allowed to stay in the country,” the DOD IG writes. “In addition, the U.S. Government could mistakenly grant SIV or parolee status to ineligible Afghan evacuees with derogatory information gathered from the DoD ABIS database.” Also of tremendous concern, the audit discloses that Afghan parolees have the right to leave U.S. military bases, officially known as “safe havens,” after receiving required vaccinations and tuberculosis testing. As of late September, 1,236 Afghans left their government safe havens without finishing processing. Here is how the government handles the early “egress” of Afghan evacuees; DHS personnel conduct a meeting with the parolee to discuss the ramifications of leaving the immigration program early, arrange for the parolee’s exit from the facility, and record and track the parolee’s removal from the installations’ lodging. This may seem like a joke, considering Afghanistan is a terrorist sanctuary and the refugees are so poorly screened by the U.S. A ranking member of the Senate Judiciary Committee, Iowa Republican Chuck Grassley, points out that the problems processing the Afghans pose serious national security and public safety concerns [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58164&L=26848&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ3Jhc3NsZXkuc2VuYXRlLmdvdi9uZXdzL25ld3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZ3Jhc3NsZXktc3RhdGVtZW50LW9uLXdhdGNoZG9nLXdhcm5pbmdzLWFib3V0LWRlZmljaWVudC12ZXR0aW5nLW9mLWFmZ2hhbi1ldmFjdWVlcz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]. Among the IG’s recommendations for improving the situation is that the Under Secretary of Defense for Intelligence and Security develop procedures for sharing derogatory information on Afghan evacuees with the DOD and interagency stakeholders. Until next week ... [Contribute] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58164&L=12711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] [32x32x1] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58164&L=13&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0p1ZGljaWFsV2F0Y2gvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] [32x32x2] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58164&L=14&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] [32x32x3] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58164&L=15&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vdXNlci9KdWRpY2lhbFdhdGNoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] [32x32x3] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58164&L=1285&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5zdGFncmFtLmNvbS9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - clean_body: Saying You are ‘Colorblind’ is a ‘Microaggression’ at CFPB [INSIDE JW] NOMINATION OF JUDGE KETANJI BROWN JACKSON TO THE SUPREME COURT [==] President Biden bowed to pressure from his radical base and selected a judicial activist to fill Justice Stephen Breyer’s seat on the Supreme Court. Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson has a long record of left-wing activism both on and off the bench. Disturbingly, President Biden seems to have selected Judge Jackson under a process that excluded potential nominees simply because of their race and sex. The Senate must not only investigate Biden’s invidious discrimination but must also be prepared to reject Judge Jackson or any other nominee who wants to further politicize the Supreme Court by legislating from the bench. FEDERAL AGENCY TEACHES EMPLOYEES ABOUT ‘MICROAGGRESSIONS’ The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) has gone seriously “woke.” Among other curiosities, employees are taught that asking someone where they are from is a racial microaggression. We learned this in 48 pages [] of records from the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) that included a PowerPoint presentation titled “Race and gender based microaggressions” that was used for training employees. We obtained the documents in response to a January 27, 2021, Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request asking for: All records of the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) containing any of the following key words: ‘whiteness’; ‘unconscious bias’; ‘intersectionality’; ‘white privilege’; ‘Kendi’; ‘Robin DiAngelo’; ‘systemic racism’; ‘structural racism’; ‘close hold’; ‘climate justice’; or ’critical race theory’ All CFPB records instructing or suggesting that any individuals or groups of people are fundamentally privileged, oppressive, oppressed, racist, or evil on account of their race; and 3. * All CFPB records instructing or suggesting that America is a fundamentally racist or evil country. The new records include a presentation by the CFPB’s Director of the Office of Civil Rights Melissa Brand titled “Race and gender based microaggressions” The “goals” of the presentation include: To help you identify race and gender based microaggressions To help you understand how microaggressions can turn into discrimination and/or unlawful harassment To help you understand YOUR role in preventing discrimination and harassment in the workplace To help you know how to respond to these situations A slide titled “Microaggressions” defines microaggressions as “verbal and nonverbal behaviors” that “communicate negative, hostile, and derogatory messages to people rooted in their marginalized group membership (based on gender, race, ethnicity, religion, sexuality, etc.)” The slide further notes that microaggressions can be “intentional or unintentional,” and are “more subtle” than “using racial epithets or displaying swastikas.” Other slides discussing “Stereotypes lead to microaggressions,” begin with a warning to the viewer: “Trigger warning: the next slide contains images of offensive stereotypes.” Cartoons are used to depict “offensive stereotypes,” which include people of color being offered various items such as: someone wearing a hoody and gold chain being offered sports balls; a hijab-wearing girl being offered a lit bomb and a picture of Osama bin Laden; a girl being offered a maid’s apron and a sombrero; a male being offered a guitar and a construction hat; a girl being handed a bottle of Aunt Jemimah syrup; and a girl being handed a spear, a teepee, and a Cleveland Indians baseball pennant. A section titled “Common race-based microaggressions in the workplace” depicts people saying various things, as well as what a minority “receives.” For instance, white males are shown saying: “When I look at you, I don’t see color;” “There is only one race, the human race;” and “When it comes to race, I am colorblind.” A female of color is shown to receive the message as: “Denying a person’s racial/ethnic experience;” “Assimilate to the dominant culture;” and “Denying the individual as a racial/cultural being.” In another “microaggression” slide, a white male says: “All lives matter,” but a hijab-wearing girl supposedly perceives it as: “Ignoring systemic racism, such as in police interactions.” Additionally, a pink, protest hat-wearing woman says: “As a woman, I know what you go through as a racial minority,” from which the hijab-wearing girl perceives: “Your racial oppression is no different than my gender oppression.” The presentation discusses “Two approaches to take when taking action” against microaggressions. One is to “disarm” the person: “If you choose to confront a microaggression, be prepared to disarm the person who committed it.” Also: “One reason we avoid conversations about race and gender discrimination is that they make people defensive. Perpetrators of microaggressions typically fear being perceived — or worse, revealed — as racist or sexist.” The other approach is to “defy” and “challenge the perpetrator to clarify their statement or action.” In a slide titled “What Can You Do?” about filing Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) complaints, a line of business people is shown. They all have Xs over their images, except for a youthful white man with a broad smile on his face, who is singled out with a check mark over his image. In the appendix, slides are titled “Examples of racial microaggressions.” Examples include: “Where are you from?” “Where were you born?” Asking an Asian American or Latino American to teach them words in their native language. “You are so articulate.” “Everyone can succeed in this society, if they work hard enough.” Person of color is mistaken for a service worker. College or university with buildings that are all named after ‘White’ [sic] heterosexual upper class males. Overabundance of liquor stores in communities of color. A section featuring “Examples of sex based microaggressions – aimed at females,” includes: “Have you been working out? You look good!!” “You have a doctorate?” Male colleagues interrupt women at meetings. Federal Agencies shouldn’t abuse tax dollars for CRT indoctrination, which makes a mockery of serious race and sex discrimination issues. These documents show that critical race theory is alive and well in the Biden administration. DOZENS OF AFGHAN REFUGEES POSE ‘SIGNIFICANT SECURITY CONCERNS’ We are legally pursuing [=] details on the Biden Administration’s disaster in Afghanistan. The horrors are endless. Now, courtesy if the administration, many Americans are unwitting neighbors to poorly vetted Afghan refugees. Our Corruption Chronicles blog reports [ Dozens of Afghan refugees released in the U.S. have Pentagon records that “indicate potentially significant security concerns,” according to a new federal audit [=] that reveals the multi-agency intelligence conglomerate created after 9/11 to protect the nation from terrorists has failed to properly vet thousands of Afghans. Under the Biden administration’s Operation Allies Welcome (OAW), approximately 80,000 “displaced persons from Afghanistan” have been admitted into the country under a special immigrant visa (SIV) or humanitarian parole. The president directed the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) to lead the chaotic plan to resettle the Afghans and the administration assured Americans the refugees would be thoroughly screened. That has not materialized, and for months media reports [=] have exposed crimes, including child molestation [==], assault and domestic violence committed by Afghans housed at military bases throughout the U.S. Now a probe conducted by the Department of Defense (DOD) Inspector General (IG) offers more troubling details that shed light on the magnitude of the problem. Investigators found that the agency responsible for clearing the Afghans by conducting thorough background checks is not doing its job, creating serious national security issues and undoubtedly threatening the safety of Americans. The agency is known as the National Counterterrorism Center (NCTC) [=] and it functions under the Office of the Director of National Intelligence (ODNI). It was launched in the aftermath of the 2001 terrorist attacks by consolidating intel gathered by the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI), Central Intelligence Agency (CIA), DHS, and the DOD. The NCTC’s stated mission is to lead the national counterterrorism effort by fusing foreign and domestic counterterrorism information and its vision is to be a center of gravity and leading voice that unifies counterterrorism intelligence for the homeland and abroad with a record of sustained excellence across all mission areas. When it comes to screening Afghan refugees however, the NCTC has failed to use all available DOD data to properly vet candidates prior to arriving in the U.S. Besides missing the significant DOD security concerns of at least 50 refugees, the nation’s lead counterterrorism intelligence entity also failed to stop at least four dozen Afghans with “derogatory information” in their record, the report states. The document defines derogatory information as potentially justifying an unfavorable fitness or access determination, requiring further investigation. Those potentially dangerous refugees are somewhere in the U.S. and cannot be located, the DOD watchdog warns. “As a result of the NCTC not vetting Afghan evacuees against all available data, the United States faces potential security risks if individuals with derogatory information are allowed to stay in the country,” the DOD IG writes. “In addition, the U.S. Government could mistakenly grant SIV or parolee status to ineligible Afghan evacuees with derogatory information gathered from the DoD ABIS database.” Also of tremendous concern, the audit discloses that Afghan parolees have the right to leave U.S. military bases, officially known as “safe havens,” after receiving required vaccinations and tuberculosis testing. As of late September, 1,236 Afghans left their government safe havens without finishing processing. Here is how the government handles the early “egress” of Afghan evacuees; DHS personnel conduct a meeting with the parolee to discuss the ramifications of leaving the immigration program early, arrange for the parolee’s exit from the facility, and record and track the parolee’s removal from the installations’ lodging. This may seem like a joke, considering Afghanistan is a terrorist sanctuary and the refugees are so poorly screened by the U.S. A ranking member of the Senate Judiciary Committee, Iowa Republican Chuck Grassley, points out that the problems processing the Afghans pose serious national security and public safety concerns [==]. Among the IG’s recommendations for improving the situation is that the Under Secretary of Defense for Intelligence and Security develop procedures for sharing derogatory information on Afghan evacuees with the DOD and interagency stakeholders. Until next week ... _Sponsored message_
Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator - a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z988sss600imo20oft2uj0n2pugq3bc2f5c3641o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c3jmcoj1c9h2bs)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _"Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light, and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product."_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - __thousands__ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. **[>> See what all the hoopla is about, and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqq93tkq5up3if9tj51b6p2pi978ds33colk8ak0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c3jmcoj1c9h2bs)**

Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product." With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - thousands of names long. You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Retire Liz Cheney
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
| | |
---
---
|
---
Peter: It's time to retire Liz Cheney.
The RNC's decision to censure Cheney last week was largely symbolic. What we really need is to remove her from Congress by replacing her with a true conservative.
**[You can help us do that today by supporting Harriet Hageman for Congress in Wyoming.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59669410:6sqRxeEPN:m:1:3298722022:48C7CB526CEDE2ED0B2896A1B5687CF0:r)**
Cheney is the media's favorite Republican because she joined with Nancy Pelosi to attack and impeach Donald Trump. But long before she betrayed her president, she betrayed her state and her party.
Cheney has had a weak voting record during her entire congressional career. She sees her job as helping Democrats pass legislation, rather than fighting them to save America. She is a classic RINO whose loyalty is to the Swamp, not the people she serves.
Wyoming only gets one member of Congress and they deserve someone who shares and fights for their values. That's why Harriet Hageman is challenging an incumbent despite all Cheney's power and connections.
**[Please support Harriet Hageman with a generous contribution of any amount up to $5,800 today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59669410:6sqRxeEPN:m:1:3298722022:48C7CB526CEDE2ED0B2896A1B5687CF0:r)**
House Freedom Fund will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation directly to the Hageman campaign.
_The stakes are too high today to sit on the sidelines._
Harriet is the leader Wyoming has been waiting for. For the last 20 years, she has been fighting back against federal agencies that threaten our rights with overbearing regulations. As an attorney, she...
▶︎ Fought Bill Clinton's attempt to block access to one-third of Wyoming's National Forest Lands;
▶︎ Stopped the EPA's efforts to take control of irrigation infrastructure and operations, and
▶︎ Blocked the USDA from forcing livestock producers to use radio-frequency eartags and register ranches with the federal government.
Liz Cheney ducks fights - or joins the other side! Harriet has been fighting and winning conservative victories for decades.
**Harriet is exactly what Washington needs more of and exactly who we need fighting for all of us. **
The DC establishment will do everything it can to protect Cheney. Only a national grassroots effort will stop her. We can do it, but we need everyone to pitch in.
[**Please join the fight for America's future by supporting Harriet Hageman today!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59669410:6sqRxeEPN:m:1:3298722022:48C7CB526CEDE2ED0B2896A1B5687CF0:r)
Liz Cheney comes from a Washington Establishment dynasty. She will raise millions from corporate dollars, and from Democrats too. Harriet's only support is us.
_Can we count on your help for Harriet 's campaign? We need her - and in this fight, she needs us!_
[**Harriet Hageman has answered the call. Please do the same for her by making a contribution today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59669410:6sqRxeEPN:m:1:3298722022:48C7CB526CEDE2ED0B2896A1B5687CF0:r)
Thank you for fighting for conservative leadership in Washington and for being willing to help retire liberal Republicans like Liz Cheney. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**PRIORITY HOUSE CANDIDATES**
---
|
---
---
**HARRIET HAGEMAN**
---
|
---
---
|
---
**END OF THE MONTH** **COUNTDOWN**

---
|
---

_**" The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates get the financial support they need to compete with establishment candidates." - Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)**_

300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003 House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.

name: American Update
subject: A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
body:
The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9512%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=OePyix3k6x2yQ3qLcIqjww&sysid=1)
Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator - a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14285%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vDngheWiUOjizIA8siniow&sysid=1)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _"Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light, and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product."_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - __thousands__ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. **[>> See what all the hoopla is about, and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14286%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SFvD5TTsAseEcIWIDqrs5Q&sysid=1)**
