You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

name: Pro Life Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zav027kbu0rl5ohod1c3lulk8mlak27tp99bunig_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uhpmacjim5predpk63ineohge9in1ob0s1rb7dbgs1j31dpj6djm8pj4ejjjadpnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlciqr8ptnc1j3aoljcdjr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1clge1o31cphm49fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3euubkp3big2lnp539sh6ng5t4sdpo43u65jmu0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c3ge0ob6cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5io43nf4i95ejfu6ro2g4kgiusginokbn8clqmo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c3ge0ob6cdh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc8em28hurm7e9mn067k0dise2jfvbt106phgn9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c3ge0ob6cdh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zsk4tlslcfq2ijuag26791k2u4ombqg9rvf8brrg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zm9btgl951it0hm12dphi9tfk82bfnopn97clg08_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1clge1o31cphm49fg)

name: 4Patriots
subject: A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
body:
The little workhorse of a generator is so popular...

[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zeok0eqp738i408c0c304ql7qjqijohdcf26n9f0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c3ge0ob6cdh2bs)
Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator - a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zto1d3tvvqjm4rfgmbkoahtbl2unlbui1kbmas90_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c3ge0ob6cdh2bs)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _" Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light, and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product. "_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - __thousands__ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. **[>> See what all the hoopla is about, and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z4t4j645sq2j4bdsa6ic04qs3a7is9shtugrd34g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c3ge0ob6cdh2bs)**

name: Charlie Crist
subject: I’m plain sick and tired of Ron DeSantis neglecting Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
If you’re sick of it too, will you help me defeat him? |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42256164/332270220/1996255460?refcode=20220224_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODQzNjJjZS0wNjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xzc079wbaAV_B34s78kRlLE0uHS6x1cSc6XqnzHj3XU=)

Friend, I've only got a few minutes of free time, so I'll be quick:
**FIRST:** CNN named me the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection – in the race _POLITICO_ says could decide Senate control.
**THEN:** A new super PAC promised to _flood_ the airwaves with attack ads to smear me and turn Georgia red – and a new poll showed me neck and neck with my potential, Trump-backed opponent, Herschel Walker (R).
**NOW: We just launched our first TV ad of the reelection campaign to fight back and pull ahead – but we need another $5,394 by midnight to keep it live, and we're falling short. Unless we close our budget gap ASAP, our ad could go dark, and we could cede the airwaves to the GOP's attacks.**

name: Madison Horn
subject: disinformation is unAmerican, and so is James Lankford
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison
body:
| Working for a decade in cybersecurity has given me a front-row seat to the mechanics of how malicious governments, terrorists, and other bad actors use disinformation and cyberattacks to disrupt our society.

It has also made me increasingly alarmed with our current Senator, James Lankford, who amplifies dangerously unpatriotic disinformation at a terrifying rate – all while sitting on the Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs committees. Where is the accountability for his continuous unpatriotic attacks while he collects our tax dollars every pay period?

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I didn’t want to send this…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Mitch McConnell and Republicans across the country have spent over $7 million to unseat me –
| | |
---
Friend,
I'd prefer not to send you emails asking for money. My focus continues to be fighting for families like yours.
However, my finance team is telling me we're in a bit of a sticky spot. We have a significant gap in our fundraising, and we need to raise $50,000 by our end-of-month deadline on Monday. **That's bad under normal circumstances, but with the GOP spending more against me than any other Senate Democrat in the country, it is the absolute worst time for our numbers to lag.**
As I said, asking for money is one of my least favorite things to do, but **Mitch McConnell and Republicans across the country have spent over $7 million to unseat me.** And if I miss this goal, it will invite even more dark money into New Hampshire. In a purple state like New Hampshire, that could be the difference between winning or losing.
That's why I need your help to get us out of this rut, friend. **[Will you please donate what you can right now to help close our fundraising gap and protect this seat – and the Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42261671/332293476/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk708-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDc1ZGU5NC0xMDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4whe4WwxNuBON1Cf1iIa17UabIXr4bPWArANghTvX44=)**

My Senate race was the closest one on the map in 2016. The only way we'll win in November is if we have the resources we need to reach every voter and push back against the GOP's misleading attack ads.
I know it's easy to think that a grassroots donation won't make a dent. But I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to power our campaign, and your $5 makes a huge difference.

Maggie Hassan

clean_body: Mitch McConnell and Republicans across the country have spent over $7 million to unseat me – | | | Friend, I'd prefer not to send you emails asking for money. My focus continues to be fighting for families like yours. However, my finance team is telling me we're in a bit of a sticky spot. We have a significant gap in our fundraising, and we need to raise $50,000 by our end-of-month deadline on Monday. That's bad under normal circumstances, but with the GOP spending more against me than any other Senate Democrat in the country, it is the absolute worst time for our numbers to lag. As I said, asking for money is one of my least favorite things to do, but Mitch McConnell and Republicans across the country have spent over $7 million to unseat me. And if I miss this goal, it will invite even more dark money into New Hampshire. In a purple state like New Hampshire, that could be the difference between winning or losing. That's why I need your help to get us out of this rut, friend. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = My Senate race was the closest one on the map in 2016. The only way we'll win in November is if we have the resources we need to reach every voter and push back against the GOP's misleading attack ads. I know it's easy to think that a grassroots donation won't make a dent. But I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to power our campaign, and your $5 makes a huge difference. = Thank you – I'm so grateful. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. name: NextGen America
subject: Urgent: Tell your senators to protect abortion rights
body:
| |
Friend, **The Senate is set to vote on the historic Women’s Health Protection Act this Monday, February 28. This is our best chance to safeguard reproductive rights for all of us.** The Women’s Health Protection Act is **crucial federal legislation that establishes the right to abortion care — no matter where someone lives in the U.S. — in federal law. ** **Simply put, we need the WHPA now more than ever**. With restrictions against abortion continuing across the country, **with three states passing abortion bans just this month,** and the Supreme Court set to rule on whether to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ this summer, it’s critical that our senators defend Americans' rights to accessible and safe abortion. **[Act now: Write to your senators now and urge them to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act to fight back against restrictive abortion laws across the country.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42264351/332305763/1497615366?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2U3YjljNi0xNDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dN7v2yfSveQK-c-3fPE_UteAkzRqBn_V7HHAVFYUG74=&emci=6dfcbc1a-7d95-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=3ce7b9c6-1497-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172)** Here’s how the WHPA secures our right and access to abortion care:
* Upholds the right to access abortion **throughout the United States.**
* **Protects against bans and medically unnecessary restrictions on abortion,** including mandatory waiting periods, biased counseling, mandatory ultrasounds, and more.
* **Establishes a statutory right for health care professionals to provide abortion** **care** and the right for their patients to receive care.

The WHPA strengthens **economic and racial justice, too.** If the WHPA passes, those hurt most by abortion restrictions — including Black, Indigenous and people of color, women, low-income, young people, and more — will be one step closer to equal access to safe and affordable abortion care, as the WHPA protects their rights through federal law. **A ZIP code shouldn’t decide whether someone can access needed health care. Write your senators now and urge them to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act.** | [Write your senators](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42264358/332305775/-68468575?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2U3YjljNi0xNDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dN7v2yfSveQK-c-3fPE_UteAkzRqBn_V7HHAVFYUG74=&emci=6dfcbc1a-7d95-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=3ce7b9c6-1497-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172 "CTA Button")
---
In solidarity,
NextGen America
| **NextGen America**
268 Bush St. #2919
San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | [unsubscribe](https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/6dfcbc1a-7d95-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/3ce7b9c6-1497-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2U3YjljNi0xNDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dN7v2yfSveQK-c-3fPE_UteAkzRqBn_V7HHAVFYUG74=&id=109799863)

name: Haley
subject: A quick email from me
body:
We can't create the change Maryland needs to see without your help.
#

Hey Team,

I'm writing because our February fundraising deadline is coming up in **just two days,** and I'm hoping you could help us out with a $5 donation. I know we ask a lot, but it's because we have to – this race is heating up, and making sure we have the resources to plan for the future is crucial to Tom winning the primary, and ultimately, this election.

We're pushing as hard as we can to ensure we can elect Tom and realize his vision for jobs, justice, and equal opportunity for _all_ Marylanders. So, I'd hate to tell Tom and Shannon we have to scale back on any of our plans because we came up short of our fundraising goals.

If you're able, please rush a donation at this special link to make sure it's counted toward our end-of-month goal:
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-support-feb-eom?refcode=Peter**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42264360/332305780/-1140457229?refcode=BPI-em-null-null-null-20220226-EOM-2-ND&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2U3YjljNi0xNDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UwqRGM5uaTReNXe7D98lyejyuD--KMFoVw2Mxu4rjv0=)
**We can't create the change Maryland needs to see without your help.**

Thank you,
Haley
******[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42264362/332305781/-1140457229?refcode=BPI-em-null-null-null-20220226-EOM-2-ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2U3YjljNi0xNDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UwqRGM5uaTReNXe7D98lyejyuD--KMFoVw2Mxu4rjv0=)******

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: we need to get away from what’s typical
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
We’ve got to fundamentally change who is in the Senate.
#

Friend,
I wanted to let you know that your support for our campaign has not gone unnoticed.
I'm so incredibly grateful that you chose to be a part of our movement to give working folks like us a voice of our own in the U.S. Senate.
I know I'm not your “typical” Senate candidate. I'm a gay Black man. I grew up in the projects of North Philly. And my family moved around a lot to avoid eviction.
But if we’re going to finally have a government that works for working families like ours, we need to get away from what’s typical. We’ve got to fundamentally change who is in the Senate.
Now, I need your help to reach our team's February goal. We're coming up on our end-of-month deadline, and we're still 230 donations away from our goal.
[Could you pitch in your first $3 to help us close the gap? We're up against wealthy, self-funded opponents, and we rely on grassroots donations from folks like you to stay competitive.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42264679/332306412/-358086307?refcode2=57e7b9c6-1497-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220226-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2U3YjljNi0xNDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bBf2evEGdvVue29PoKkyp_tVaEcZnSGoRBlMUA3lXYo=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42264683/332306414/-358086307?refcode2=57e7b9c6-1497-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220226-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2U3YjljNi0xNDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bBf2evEGdvVue29PoKkyp_tVaEcZnSGoRBlMUA3lXYo=)**
We're running a grassroots campaign. That means the goals we set aren't arbitrary. Hitting our February goal is a critical part of our plan to build a coalition of supporters from every one of Pennsylvania's 67 counties.
Falling behind on our goal would mean we'd have fewer resources to count on and put us in a tough spot going into our next FEC deadline next month.
[So, with just a few days left in February, can we count on you to chip in $3 or whatever you can to fuel our people-powered campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42264684/332306423/-358086307?refcode2=57e7b9c6-1497-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220226-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2U3YjljNi0xNDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bBf2evEGdvVue29PoKkyp_tVaEcZnSGoRBlMUA3lXYo=)
Thanks so much,
Malcolm

name: Conor Lamb
subject: Here's where we are in this race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42265008/332308150/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjQwYzU3YS0xNTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9PTCrTttKUjpOy8PPG7CSpBKl5z-A6fxXSr8hoZJ1DU=)

Hi Folks,

Since we've launched this grassroots campaign, we've set the bar high and reached every ambitious goal that we've set for ourselves. These high fundraising targets have been necessary _every_ time, because the GOP and their dark money donors are throwing _everything they have_ at this race. In just TV/radio ad spending alone, the GOP has already spent **$32.5 million dollars** to keep this Senate seat red.

**Folks, with the Pennsylvania primary less than three months away, we need to secure the resources we need to pull ahead of our opponents and the corporate PAC money pouring into this race.**

In my first race for Congress, I flipped a district that went for Trump in 2016 by more than 19 points. I know firsthand what it takes to win tough races, and a big part of it is fundraising.

[**So, can I count on you to pitch in $19 or any amount you can to help us meet our February goal? We're $23,793 away, and if just 1 in 10 people getting this email donate, we'll be able to hit our goal. name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: President Biden's historic nomination
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=jyS%2BIqGaOglULvSCLJttlULrV2YCUlzW&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
President Biden has announced his nominee for the U.S. Supreme Court: Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson.
When the president and I met earlier this month, I urged him to select a nominee with powerful intellect and profound integrity - and he has more than met that standard with Judge Jackson.
Judge Jackson has an exceptional record of personal accomplishment and unquestionable qualifications as a brilliant jurist. She is a legal star - an example of the best of America.
**Importantly, if confirmed, Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson would be the first Black woman to serve on the Supreme Court in its 233 year history. Her confirmation would be a long-overdue step toward ensuring our nation 's highest court reflects the diversity of the country it serves.**
As a member of the Senate Committee on the Judiciary, I look forward to discussing Judge Jackson's remarkable qualifications with colleagues on both sides of the aisle in the weeks to come. I also feel an urgent need to move swiftly with the confirmation process, given that Democrats currently control the Senate by the slimmest of margins.
As I'm sure you don't need to be reminded: Mitch McConnell has played political games with Supreme Court nominees many times before. Who could forget the lengths he went to block President Obama's nomination of Merrick Garland?
That's why _now_ is the time - while Democrats control the Senate - to act swiftly to begin repairing the harm that McConnell and Donald Trump so egregiously inflicted on our nation's highest court.
**But before our confirmation hearings begin - and before the partisan attacks on Judge Jackson begin in earnest - I need to know where you stand on President Biden's historic nomination. Please, make your voice heard right away:**
[**Do you support President Biden 's historic nomination of Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the U.S. Supreme Court?**](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-feb-2022??email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1133-su-nd)
Thank you for speaking out,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=VMPFypmY8x2v3qFuh6f7y0LrV2YCUlzW&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: John Gomez  - Campaign Manager
subject: Chabot for Congress - Update from the Campaign Trail 2/25
body:
War in Ukraine and the cost of Greg Landsman's corruption.
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tylikrly-kujkulhluu-p/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tylikrly-kujkulhluu-r/)
# Update from the Campaign Trail 2/25/22
Good evening,The last few weeks have been very busy for Team Chabot. Russia's illegal and unjustified invasion of Ukraine has dominated the news and Congressman Chabot has been out front discussing the weakness that has led us to this point and what our next steps should be. We also received more information on the final costs of Greg Landsman's corruption to Ohio taxpayers. **_War in Ukraine_** _Congressman Chabot on Fox News_ Congressman Chabot spoke to Fox News earlier this week about the weakness of the Biden Administration in dealing with Russia's aggression. _" There has been weakness projected by this administration, and weakness invites aggression. I think Putin has taken advantage of the situation. I think Afghanistan projected the worst message possible to the bad actors across the globe, including Putin and President Xi [Jingping] relative to Taiwan_,_"_ \- Congressman ChabotRead the full article and watch the Congressman's interview [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tylikrly-kujkulhluu-y/)! _Congressman Chabot on 700WLW_ On Thursday, Congressman Chabot spoke with Dan Carroll on 700WLW regarding the invasion of Ukraine. Congressman Chabot was able to provide listeners with an update on the situation, as well as the next steps forward. _" It's a very concerning situation around the world. As Ronald Reagan once said, we should strive for peace through strength. Unfortunately, this administration has not portrayed strength." - _Congressman Chabot. You can listen to the full interview [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tylikrly-kujkulhluu-j/). Congressman Chabot's interview begins at the 34:00 minute mark._" China is Watching Russia"_Rounding out the week, Congressman Chabot sat down with NTD's Capitol Report to discuss the implications of Russia's invasion on China and Taiwan. In short, China is likely emboldened by the weak response from the Biden Administration to the Russian invasion of Ukraine. It is critical that the U.S clarify any ambiguity in our defense of Taiwan, Congressman Chabot added. We must remain vigilant against the ever present threat from China, especially in this era of international crisis. Watch the full interview with Congressman Chabot at the link [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tylikrly-kujkulhluu-t/).
**_Greg Landsman's Illegal Activity Cost Cincinnati Big Time_** This week the final cost of Greg Landsman and the Gang of 5's illegal activity was revealed to be over _**$172,000.**_ This money came out of the pockets of Ohio's taxpayers, not Landsman or any of the people involved. There's a reason why a [judge told Landsman and company that they should resign and that no voter should ever vote for them again.](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tylikrly-kujkulhluu-i/) _This Week 's Blog - "A Wave Is Coming"_This week's blog is about the upcoming midterm elections and how the left has made gone too far in messing with our nation's children. _"__There are many reasons why Democrats are likely to lose control of Congress at the end of this year. They 've blundered on the economy, energy, the border, crime, foreign affairs, and on and on. But they've really screwed up when it comes to something that's of the utmost importance to every parent in America - and that's their children's education."_Read the blog post [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tylikrly-kujkulhluu-d/). Please say a prayer for the people of Ukraine this weekend. The innocent lives taken by Russia's invasion should not be forgotten. clean_body: War in Ukraine and the cost of Greg Landsman's corruption. No images? Update from the Campaign Trail 2/25/22 Good evening,The last few weeks have been very busy for Team Chabot. Russia's illegal and unjustified invasion of Ukraine has dominated the news and Congressman Chabot has been out front discussing the weakness that has led us to this point and what our next steps should be. We also received more information on the final costs of Greg Landsman's corruption to Ohio taxpayers. War in Ukraine Congressman Chabot on Fox News Congressman Chabot spoke to Fox News earlier this week about the weakness of the Biden Administration in dealing with Russia's aggression. " There has been weakness projected by this administration, and weakness invites aggression. I think Putin has taken advantage of the situation. I think Afghanistan projected the worst message possible to the bad actors across the globe, including Putin and President Xi [Jingping] relative to Taiwan," \- Congressman ChabotRead the full article and watch the Congressman's interview ! Congressman Chabot on 700WLW On Thursday, Congressman Chabot spoke with Dan Carroll on 700WLW regarding the invasion of Ukraine. Congressman Chabot was able to provide listeners with an update on the situation, as well as the next steps forward. " It's a very concerning situation around the world. As Ronald Reagan once said, we should strive for peace through strength. Unfortunately, this administration has not portrayed strength." - Congressman Chabot. You can listen to the full interview . Congressman Chabot's interview begins at the 34:00 minute mark." China is Watching Russia"Rounding out the week, Congressman Chabot sat down with NTD's Capitol Report to discuss the implications of Russia's invasion on China and Taiwan. In short, China is likely emboldened by the weak response from the Biden Administration to the Russian invasion of Ukraine. It is critical that the U.S clarify any ambiguity in our defense of Taiwan, Congressman Chabot added. We must remain vigilant against the ever present threat from China, especially in this era of international crisis. Watch the full interview with Congressman Chabot at the link . Greg Landsman's Illegal Activity Cost Cincinnati Big Time This week the final cost of Greg Landsman and the Gang of 5's illegal activity was revealed to be over $172,000. This money came out of the pockets of Ohio's taxpayers, not Landsman or any of the people involved. There's a reason why a This Week 's Blog - "A Wave Is Coming"This week's blog is about the upcoming midterm elections and how the left has made gone too far in messing with our nation's children. "There are many reasons why Democrats are likely to lose control of Congress at the end of this year. They 've blundered on the economy, energy, the border, crime, foreign affairs, and on and on. But they've really screwed up when it comes to something that's of the utmost importance to every parent in America - and that's their children's education."_Read the blog post . Please say a prayer for the people of Ukraine this weekend. The innocent lives taken by Russia's invasion should not be forgotten. We pray that their resilience carries them through this unjustified and barbaric invasion.Have a great weekend.Yours truly,John GomezCampaign Manager - Chabot for Congress | Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. subject: what if you just knew?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42271548/332317932/1927938479?refcode=20220226_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDdmNjQ1OC0xYTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CJVfQzNTVWC4EZ5XjGGoYzoQBahG5aPySqFiUPgAoM=)
Friends — What does that amount of money mean to you? Now let us ask: If you knew contributing $5 would mean Mark Kelly would get re-elected to the Senate this year, wouldn’t it be worth it? How about if you knew that same $5 would keep Mitch McConnell from becoming Majority Leader again? Wouldn’t you give that $5 immediately? What if you knew that $5 would re-elect a man fighting for voting rights, action on climate, lowering drug prices and more? Wouldn’t it be the best $5 you could spend? Now, we know $5 doesn’t seem like it can do all that. But when everyone is chipping in, it can. Cause by the time you reach this point in the email, someone has already chipped in their $5. And in order for this to work, they need you to do the same. And that’s why we’re asking: [**Can you please make a $5 contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign -- split with Seth Moulton -- before our fundraising deadline comes to an end in just a few days?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42271549/332317936/1927938479?refcode=20220226_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDdmNjQ1OC0xYTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CJVfQzNTVWC4EZ5XjGGoYzoQBahG5aPySqFiUPgAoM=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42271550/332317937/-1534947712?refcode=20220226_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDdmNjQ1OC0xYTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CJVfQzNTVWC4EZ5XjGGoYzoQBahG5aPySqFiUPgAoM=)
No one person — not even Mark himself — can win this election alone. But together... that’s how we’ll get it done and defend this seat. —Team Kelly

Dear Peter, Tuesday is Election Day! The day we’ve been working so hard for the past several months! This election will be close, and your support will make a massive difference on Tuesday. However, I wanted to take a minute to invite you to join us after the polls close in Montgomery at the Pizza Shack to watch the results roll in and hopefully celebrate a huge victory together! We’ll enjoy some great food and company- you don’t want to miss it!

clean_body: Tuesday is Election Day! The day we’ve been working so hard for the past several months! | | Dear Peter, Tuesday is Election Day! The day we’ve been working so hard for the past several months! This election will be close, and your support will make a massive difference on Tuesday. However, I wanted to take a minute to invite you to join us after the polls close in Montgomery at the Pizza Shack to watch the results roll in and hopefully celebrate a huge victory together! We’ll enjoy some great food and company- you don’t want to miss it! Please RSVP , and we look forward to seeing you on Tuesday! clean_body: Guess which Republican CNN is referring to here: | Guess which Republican CNN is referring to here: = If you guessed Nancy Mace, you’d be right. We’re sick and tired of her and her primary challenger caring more about what Trump thinks than what the people of the Lowcountry think. While Dr. Annie is busy caring for her kids, working as a pediatrician, and fighting for what’s right, Mace is flying to NYC to beg for Trump’s approval in front of Trump Tower. The Lowcountry needs a real leader who will dedicate themselves to working families – not to Trump. = = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = | = | = Paid for by Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress PO BOX 1431 Johns Island, SC 29457 United States **

| | Team, I wanted to update you as we approach our fundraising deadline on Monday. Our campaign is gaining momentum, and we’re not taking anything for granted. We've tripled the size of our organizing team since December, we're mobilizing hundreds of volunteers across the state, and we're already building the organizing infrastructure to win on Election Day. But to keep making these critical investments, we need to hit our February fundraising goal. It’s ambitious, but it means we’ll be able to keep hiring more organizers, send Sonia on more trips across the state, and have access to the resources we need to win. [_**To stay on track, we need 150 grassroots donors to make an online contribution by midnight. Friend, can I count on you to step up and make a $25 contribution, or whatever you’re able, to help us meet this deadline?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42272203/332323201/-1029235949?refcode=02_27_22_EOM2_jw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDBkODEyOC0xZDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4bvXnKDQVWtWi5TmAxLppl779n8O4zvvtFjQfa8RJxg=) | [Donate ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42272215/332323232/-1275523729?refcode=02_27_22_EOM2_jw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDBkODEyOC0xZDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4bvXnKDQVWtWi5TmAxLppl779n8O4zvvtFjQfa8RJxg=)

What makes this movement so strong is all of the people behind it. Supporters across the Commonwealth are fired up about Sonia’s bold vision for a more just and equitable Massachusetts. But to make that vision a reality, we need 150 folks to step up and make a donation today.
I appreciate you being part of this team, and I’ll be in touch soon. [_**In the meantime, you can help us hit our monthly goal by donating here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42272219/332323241/-1029235949?refcode=02_27_22_EOM2_jw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDBkODEyOC0xZDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4bvXnKDQVWtWi5TmAxLppl779n8O4zvvtFjQfa8RJxg=)

Josh

Hey there, it’s James Carville. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to [_**chip in to help us defend our Senate majority.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42272292/332323421/999668826?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220126_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzBkODEyOC0xZDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OLP8x2rTjI5w-0wSeLvwzwaYHjlehqRPl4Jhc_m3SM4=) But first, let me explain why. Everything’s on the ballot this November. Right now, Democrats hold a narrow 50-50 majority in the Senate. But if we lose even one seat, we’ll lose the majority. Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans are hell-bent on taking back the Senate this election — and you can bet they’ll try every trick in the book to win. They’ve already spent millions of dollars attacking Democrats with even more to come. And if that wasn’t enough to convince you, let me fill you in on the GOP’s latest “plan”. Rick Scott, the Chairman of National Republican Senatorial Committee, released his GOP “plan” that calls for a tax hike on the lowest income Americans — including seniors and the disabled. It’s clear to me that we absolutely cannot let Republicans regain control, and it’ll take all of us to defend our Senate majority, which is why I’m reaching out to you today. My friends at Defend the Senate are working hard to protect our Democratic Senators and expand our majority by flipping Republican-held seats. They’ve set a 15,000 donation fundraising goal before their critical deadline on Monday, and I’m confident we can reach it. name: Jahana Hayes
subject: A lot has changed this month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
It has been a heavy few days. As your Congresswoman, I need to have all irons in the fire. My prayers are with the Ukrainian people and the Connecticut Ukrainian-American community. While the news from Europe is still unfolding, our work here at home must continue. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42272537/332323783/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjdjYjk0OS0xZDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D1wkI0DnTF7_yKdPN2RQ0QrffE1-RvpQYkD4g3fX3ls=&emci=015d082b-6696-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=467cb949-1d97-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=15529135) | It has been a heavy few days. As your Congresswoman, I need to have all irons in the fire. My prayers are with the Ukrainian people and the Connecticut Ukrainian-American community. While the news from Europe is still unfolding, our work here at home must continue. At home, President Biden made a _historic_ announcement with his nomination of Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the U.S. Supreme Court, and I look forward to her swift confirmation by the U.S. Senate. Meanwhile, the news from my re-election campaign has not slowed down... let me get you up to speed: **First, I have been under attack from right-wing media for _months_ now.** Misinformation and desperate mud-slinging is flying across conservative websites and social media – and it is national Republicans pushing these lies. **Then, Connecticut finalized our new Congressional maps.** After months of hearings, redistricting commission meetings and discussions, and ultimately, Connecticut Supreme Court jurisdiction, the new Congressional maps for Connecticut are final. After all that, the changes to CT-05 are minimal, with just a small population shift in Torrington – and I look forward to continuing to serve my constituents. **Now, we are facing our first fundraising deadline since the maps were finalized and the attacks on me ramped up.** We cannot afford to take a step back with all eyes on our campaign to see if the attacks are making a difference in the new CT-05. [**With the balance of power in Congress resting on less than a handful of Democratic seats in toss-up districts like CT-05, we need to keep this seat blue. It’s the difference between the steady leadership we have now and the likes of Kevin McCarthy, Marjorie Taylor Greene and Jim Jordan being in charge._Period. _Your grassroots contributions will help us keep the majority. clean_body: It has been a heavy few days. As your Congresswoman, I need to have all irons in the fire. My prayers are with the Ukrainian people and the Connecticut Ukrainian-American community. While the news from Europe is still unfolding, our work here at home must continue. | | It has been a heavy few days. As your Congresswoman, I need to have all irons in the fire. My prayers are with the Ukrainian people and the Connecticut Ukrainian-American community. While the news from Europe is still unfolding, our work here at home must continue. At home, President Biden made a historic announcement with his nomination of Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the U.S. Supreme Court, and I look forward to her swift confirmation by the U.S. Senate. Meanwhile, the news from my re-election campaign has not slowed down... let me get you up to speed: First, I have been under attack from right-wing media for months now. Misinformation and desperate mud-slinging is flying across conservative websites and social media – and it is national Republicans pushing these lies. Then, Connecticut finalized our new Congressional maps. After months of hearings, redistricting commission meetings and discussions, and ultimately, Connecticut Supreme Court jurisdiction, the new Congressional maps for Connecticut are final. After all that, the changes to CT-05 are minimal, with just a small population shift in Torrington – and I look forward to continuing to serve my constituents. Now, we are facing our first fundraising deadline since the maps were finalized and the attacks on me ramped up. We cannot afford to take a step back with all eyes on our campaign to see if the attacks are making a difference in the new CT-05. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = I am excited to get our re-election operation up and running for the 2022 cycle! Reaching out to friends and neighbors in person is one of the most powerful tools our campaign has at our disposal – and with a vast and diverse district, we need to be prepared. = Thank you for your support, – Jahana = * Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Crucial Deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz
body:
Peter:

_Time is running out, so I'm going to get right to the point._

My end-of-month fundraising deadline is **February 28** , and I need your help.

The Biden regime, Liz Cheney and her fellow RINOs, the fake news media, and D.C. swamp gatekeepers will comb through my fundraising numbers to judge the strength of the America First movement heading into the midterm election.

**Democrats and their allies will seize on any hint of weakness as a signal to plow ahead with their socialist agenda, so I need your help right away to hit my campaign's goal of raising $56,000.**

**[Please chip in your most generous contribution before the deadline to send a message to the swamp that you are ready to take our country back](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59712738:WdXf4zHmN:m:1:2365227053:6C0EE48C6F346FB8051917975E8BBB55:r).** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59712738:WdXf4zHmN:m:1:2365227053:6C0EE48C6F346FB8051917975E8BBB55:r) **It's vital I post the biggest fundraising number possible.**

Democrats are already trying to steal the 2022 election.

Leftwing activists and Ivy League law professors filed lawsuits to kick anyone that questioned the results of the 2020 election off the ballot.

Smearing us as "insurrectionists," Democrats plan to disqualify America First conservatives from running office to keep Nancy Pelosi installed as Speaker of the House. [_**CHIP IN BEFORE THE DEADLINE
TO HELP ME FIGHT BACK **_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59712738:WdXf4zHmN:m:1:2365227053:6C0EE48C6F346FB8051917975E8BBB55:r) **_There is a reason socialist Democrats pulled out all the stops._**

They know I've promised as my first vote in the next Congress will be making Donald J. Trump the Speaker of the House.

_That terrifies the left_.

I'm leading the fight to expose the "FEDSURRECTION" that took place on January 6 and force the FBI to answer questions about the Deep State having informants and agents in the crowd that day and if they conspired or incited violence.

Fighting for the truth and exposing the real Big Lie terrifies the Biden regime, socialist Democrats, Never Trumpers, fake news media.

**That's why I hope I can count on your support ahead of the end of the month deadline.**

**[So please chip in a generous contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even $2,900](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59712738:WdXf4zHmN:m:1:2365227053:6C0EE48C6F346FB8051917975E8BBB55:r)** to help me hit my campaign's **goal of raising $56,000** before the **February 28 deadline**. [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59712738:WdXf4zHmN:m:1:2365227053:6C0EE48C6F346FB8051917975E8BBB55:r) Democrats lie about January 6 and scheme to ban America First conservatives from office for one reason.

Nancy Pelosi fears the voters will oust Democrats from power for rubber stamping Joe Biden's failed socialist agenda.

**Illegal aliens march across the border, inflation surged to Jimmy Carter levels, and Biden shredded the Constitution with illegal vaccine mandates.** T

I need your help to fight back.

**[So please chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even $2,900 and help me send a message that a red wave will sweep an America First majority into Congress this November](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59712738:WdXf4zHmN:m:1:2365227053:6C0EE48C6F346FB8051917975E8BBB55:r).** [_**MATT GAETZ END OF FEBRUARY PUSH
DONATE NOW**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59712738:WdXf4zHmN:m:1:2365227053:6C0EE48C6F346FB8051917975E8BBB55:r)

Thanks for Standing Strong,

Matt Gaetz
Congresman (R-FL)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59712738:WdXf4zHmN:m:1:2365227053:6C0EE48C6F346FB8051917975E8BBB55:r)

---

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: What CNN, FiveThirtyEight and NBC are saying about our race:
body:
Derek,
CNN just released their newest Senate race analysis, and their experts say that North Carolina is one of the seats “most likely to flip.”
This comes right after NBC and FiveThirtyEight reported that control of the Senate could come down to our race too.
If you want to flip this seat and expand Democrats’ majority, please split a $25 donation between my campaign and CommonGood right now. This is a make-or-break race for Democrats and our ability to make real progress in the Senate. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_cb?refcode=20220226_CGVA_CB]
All of these nonpartisan experts say North Carolina is one of the top three pick-up opportunities for Democrats.
That leaves no room for error or risk if we are going to hold and expand our Senate majority.
But if we all do our part, then together we can expand our majority and break through Washington’s obstruction and gridlock. That is the only way we can finally deliver change and progress for our families — from voting rights to climate action to a living wage and beyond.
Split a contribution of $25 or any amount you can right now to my campaign and CommonGood This is important. The only way we can win this race is with an enormous amount of grassroots support. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_cb?refcode=20220226_CGVA_CB]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_cb?refcode=20220226_CGVA_CB&amount=25]

Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_cb?refcode=20220226_CGVA_CB]
Thank you!
- Cheri Beasley

name: Rep. Val Demings
subject: good news, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I'm thrilled
| |
---
Friend, I'm thrilled to share some great news:

Even with far-right outside groups dumping millions into Florida and GOP leaders like the chair of the RNC attacking me _personally_ , **the polls show me neck and neck with Marco Rubio.**
**But here's the problem:** This is shaping up to be the most expensive Senate race in history, and national Republicans are about to start their first attack ad blitz against me. Floridians will be hammered with lies when they turn on their TVs – and I know this barrage is just the beginning of what's in store.
What happens in Florida will decide Senate control, so Republicans and their dark money allies will do everything they possibly can to defeat me. **And right now, my fundraising numbers are stalling at the worst possible moment. ****As of 10:30 a.m., I'm still $7,000 short of tonight's midnight grassroots goal. **

**I'm getting worried that I won't have enough resources to counter the GOP's lies without an urgent groundswell of grassroots support. **

body:
I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like an extraordinary amount of time

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42274112/332331410/980011478?amount=3&refcode=UD_20220226_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiMjAxOTU4LTIxOTctZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eyWxqWzzoCkkGoys4rKgytntfPGFaDyMpEc9rwCubmY=) Peter —

I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like a lot of time, but with a schedule like mine I can assure you it’s a gift.

I want to take a few of those minutes to tell you about my decision to run for Senate in the first place, and ask you to split a donation between my re-election campaign and UniteDemocrats. Your support is so important to our success.

The truth is, when Gabby and I first started talking about running, we weren’t sure what to expect. We knew that Arizona needed new leadership in the Senate — someone who would always put the people of our state first, who was willing to work across the aisle to deliver real results, and who would prioritize building bridges between parties — not burning them down.

We also knew we had some friends who would help us out. But when you’re talking about such a big campaign, we’d need support from a lot of people we hadn’t met yet as well. Especially since I was making the decision to reject corporate PAC money.

You know the rest... we won in 2020 in large part because we ran the biggest grassroots campaign Arizona has ever seen.

But now we have a new mission: Re-election.

And right now, the polls are really tight. If we’re going to win again and keep control of the Senate, it’s going to take a similar level of grassroots support from people like you.

So please:

[**Will you split a $3 contribution between my re-election campaign and UniteDemocrats? clean_body: I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like an extraordinary amount of time | = Peter — I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like a lot of time, but with a schedule like mine I can assure you it’s a gift. I want to take a few of those minutes to tell you about my decision to run for Senate in the first place, and ask you to split a donation between my re-election campaign and UniteDemocrats. Your support is so important to our success. The truth is, when Gabby and I first started talking about running, we weren’t sure what to expect. We knew that Arizona needed new leadership in the Senate — someone who would always put the people of our state first, who was willing to work across the aisle to deliver real results, and who would prioritize building bridges between parties — not burning them down. We also knew we had some friends who would help us out. But when you’re talking about such a big campaign, we’d need support from a lot of people we hadn’t met yet as well. Especially since I was making the decision to reject corporate PAC money. You know the rest... we won in 2020 in large part because we ran the biggest grassroots campaign Arizona has ever seen. But now we have a new mission: Re-election. And right now, the polls are really tight. If we’re going to win again and keep control of the Senate, it’s going to take a similar level of grassroots support from people like you. So please: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you again. For everything. clean_body: I’m ready to get to work shaping Maryland into a better place for us all, but I need your help to do it. | = | Peter, As a bold progressive leader with experience getting big things done in government, I am ready to fight to end disparities in the education system, tackle climate change, and strengthen worker protections. I am ready to reform the criminal justice system, guarantee universal health care, and enact Paid Family Leave. I am ready to lead Maryland towards a more equitable and prosperous future — but to serve our state and deliver on the promise of real change to improve the lives of countless Marylanders, I need your support. = = My campaign depends on grassroots supporters like you, Peter. We are getting closer and closer to Election Day, and we need to make sure we have the funds necessary to keep up the momentum and continue to spread the word about our campaign. That’s why I’m asking: will you become a crucial partner in this campaign by making your first donation today? | | = I’m ready to get to work shaping Maryland into a more just place for us all, but I need your help to ensure our campaign has the resources to make it happen. = Thank you in advance for whatever you are able to give, Peter. name: Greg Landsman
subject: ✎ Cresco signatures needed:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress
body:
---
| | **[NPR: 3.7 million more kids are in poverty without the monthly Child Tax Credit](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42275032/332336185/-356084938?source=20220226_em_pet_b1_greg_30_cl_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzE0NmM4Ny0yNTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eHBtuCOYdmjkavtr4JT_BsYEUOr9Y3JCPiSBoPVmNJs=&emci=2d4e2422-6d96-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=a3146c87-2597-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=10283101)** Congress needs to make the Child Tax Credit permanent.

The Child Tax Credit has been _essential_ to supporting working families and giving children across the country the opportunity to succeed. **[But since its expiration, 3.7 million kids have been thrust back into poverty.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42275033/332336186/-356084938?source=20220226_em_pet_b1_greg_30_cl_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzE0NmM4Ny0yNTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eHBtuCOYdmjkavtr4JT_BsYEUOr9Y3JCPiSBoPVmNJs=&emci=2d4e2422-6d96-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=a3146c87-2597-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=10283101)**

name: Team DeSantis
subject: The Courage to Lead
body:
Now more than ever, Governor DeSantis needs your support. By standing together, we can send a message to the radical liberals across the country that Florida will never relent and never back down.
To view this email as a web page, go [here.](https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=764d574b816477168ca5f6c0011f9a6457d7ded1e810fb123436746d6c2332e83e1f0851480463463e41fb2c91cbfb2a6c19cd14a4b9769d8893f9f4a577fcdf89bc11eb8cadfb5a8b2c6fbdc27df298)

---
Peter,

Florida is the freest state in the nation for one reason and one reason only: **the courageous leadership of Governor DeSantis.**

While other governors are resorting to more lockdowns and mandates that erode our freedom, Governor DeSantis is lifting people up. As a result, Florida is no longer primarily known for sunshine, beaches and theme parks - **Florida is now the freedom state.**

But Democrats don't want to see Florida succeed. They want Floridians to struggle and the state to fail so they can use it to attack Governor DeSantis. Even as he's achieved victory after victory to improve the lives of Floridians, Democrats and the hysterical media try to smear Governor DeSantis and his pro-freedom agenda.

Their goal is to divide us with constant fear-mongering and will suppress any speech that dares question their false narratives. **WE CAN 'T LET THEIR DIVISION WIN.**

Now more than ever, Governor DeSantis needs your support. By standing together, we can send a message to the radical liberals across the country that Florida will **never** relent and **never** back down.

This November, we'll determine what type of future we want for our state. Everything, including our freedom, is on the line.

**[Send a CLEAR message to the Democrats that you are ALL IN on supporting Governor DeSantis by signing the card here>>>](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a9831522774e1da7f344c1291fe2c117165870c25b3d5fad62ed55aafa8e19910f2bbe83b2f30f404c6adab58b41584659462f515d76f94f "Send a CLEAR message to the Democrats that you are ALL IN on supporting Governor DeSantis by signing the card here >>>")**

Team DeSantis

| | Folks, I’m about to ask you to [**chip in $25 or more towards my end-of-month goal**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42275640/332338045/-1921015758?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_220226_FR_EOM2Bio_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTE0NmM4Ny0yNTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rYNPpAlBRCGasV8ddhlNzeYG1lHJwsCG2wRcI7r0Mwo=), but first I want to explain why representing Coastal Virginians in Congress matters so much to me. I’m by no means a career politician, but at a young age I knew I wanted to pursue a career in service to my country. That’s why I joined the Navy when I was 17 years old – at a time when, just 17 years prior, women weren’t even allowed to serve. I went on to be one of the first women ever accepted into the Naval Academy’s nuclear power program. And in the two decades that followed, I was deployed to the Middle East, overseeing eight nuclear reactors and the training of all 700 nuclear operators onboard. When I retired, I wanted to focus on being a mom and managing my small business, but I couldn’t shake the desire to do more for the country I had served for the past two decades. I couldn't sit idly by as the country I loved sank into a terrible rut of political divisiveness, inaction, and contempt for our fellow Americans. That’s why I first ran for Congress in 2018. The odds were stacked against me, but thanks to my grassroots team I was able to narrowly defeat my Republican opponent. I’ve now served two terms in Congress, but my work is still unfinished. Republicans have made it increasingly difficult to pass meaningful legislation on protecting the right to vote, combating climate change, or raising the federal minimum wage. My race for VA-02 is the most competitive in the nation, and it could very well decide the fate of the Democratic House majority. So to stay in Congress fighting for you, I need your help. [**Will you chip in $25 or more today to help me reach my end-of-month goal before it’s too late?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42275641/332338046/-1921015758?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_220226_FR_EOM2Bio_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTE0NmM4Ny0yNTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rYNPpAlBRCGasV8ddhlNzeYG1lHJwsCG2wRcI7r0Mwo=) | | | [Chip in $25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42275642/332338047/-1921015758?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_220226_FR_EOM2Bio_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTE0NmM4Ny0yNTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rYNPpAlBRCGasV8ddhlNzeYG1lHJwsCG2wRcI7r0Mwo=)

| Peter,
Big Tech is out of control.
Executives in Silicon Valley get to pick and choose which narrative is acceptable, and those who go against the decided narrative are de-platformed. The First Amendment of the Constitution protects free speech, so why do social media platforms get to decide what the definitive opinion is on hot-button issues? Governor DeSantis has continuously fought for free speech and the protection of our God-given rights. Yet Big Tech, the Biden Administration and the legacy media want to censor those who disagree with them. [Take our poll ️\--> Should Big Tech have the ability to censor free speech?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hr_VkxHKxchz6_m6jAK27eU4uir3qeX68d6x6CRCg59cRYskjb_ZI4RFB1mIbYIEAE7SIzmdx4InilXzq8mLKj0J7XOPGYbnTgLxBMGTHznTQO1ZvdSHCcypLSmEM6kbBgyZiKn3sscIvq4OCsQ5APEjbVG9PFDhjCET5csG9yLOPVWHJEVi-6xgd-nQD9KK&c=bLqA25sfskyKcV4iy1LkdvZeTNin319cEFUiarir1KbcxqOlYaqLqA==&ch=bKaR_FF95SKy2OKo5nFgu81hZySN-MSySOTRTR5LrWS9IfpkSXmzww==) [>> TAKE OUR POLL << ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hr_VkxHKxchz6_m6jAK27eU4uir3qeX68d6x6CRCg59cRYskjb_ZI4RFB1mIbYIEAE7SIzmdx4InilXzq8mLKj0J7XOPGYbnTgLxBMGTHznTQO1ZvdSHCcypLSmEM6kbBgyZiKn3sscIvq4OCsQ5APEjbVG9PFDhjCET5csG9yLOPVWHJEVi-6xgd-nQD9KK&c=bLqA25sfskyKcV4iy1LkdvZeTNin319cEFUiarir1KbcxqOlYaqLqA==&ch=bKaR_FF95SKy2OKo5nFgu81hZySN-MSySOTRTR5LrWS9IfpkSXmzww==) The liberal machine's censoring of dissenting opinions is a slippery slope, Peter. body:
Democracy needs and deserves faithful stewards who are willing to take a stand for it and fight for justice. The insurrection on January 6 showed us all that there are currently elected officials in power who will either sit back and do nothing or even worse, attack the very foundations of the country they swore to protect. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42276462/332341542/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2ODRiZDdiLTI3OTctZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HJi3JgJ3JQQPUFC6TEq65yMIS61FDxx0piN0Yik3ZSY=&emci=f65f149b-8396-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e684bd7b-2797-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=16335001) _Most political campaigns and groups will pause in times of crisis, even in times of war. **The fact is, democracy isn't an abstract concept, Team.**

It needs and deserves faithful stewards who are willing to take a stand for it and fight for justice. The insurrection on January 6 showed us all that there are currently elected officials in power who will either sit back and do nothing or, even worse, attack the very foundations of the country they swore to protect.

Every generation has an obligation to protect our democracy, so today, we see two choices ahead:
* **Choice 1: We sit back and wait for someone else to step up and demand justice.** The Treason Caucus doesn't face accountability and remains in power. American fascism becomes the law of Congress, and gone are the days when a free and fair election meant something.

* **Choice 2: We answer the call to action and hold these most dangerous elected officials accountable for their attack on our democracy.** By doubling down on our grassroots efforts, we can persuade voters across the country to unseat the members of Congress sympathetic to American fascism.

Choice one is easy, Team. But sometimes, we have to roll up our sleeves and fight for the world we want and the democracy our country deserves.

Choose choice two and chip in now to help us unseat the Treason Caucus in November.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42276465/332341545/-730306332?refcode=em22_220226_EOM2_fndd_gq_act___TNAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220226_EOM2_fndd_gq_act___TNAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2ODRiZDdiLTI3OTctZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HJi3JgJ3JQQPUFC6TEq65yMIS61FDxx0piN0Yik3ZSY=)**

I wanted to reach out with an update on our February numbers. Because February is a shorter month, we need to raise more each day to hit our fundraising goal.

It’s my job on the campaign to make sure we stay on track and raise the necessary funds to keep growing our team and get our message out to voters in mid-Michigan so we can win in our Republican leaning competitive district – this is the toughest race Dan has ever faced. Let’s prove we have his back.

[The work we do now will make all the difference in November. Can we count on you to chip in $15 or whatever you can right now to support Dan and our campaign? body:
This momentum must continue.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42276577/332342084/918102368?refcode=EM_FR_220226SCOTUS_N_SB4C_90DO_5_NG_TESTA_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjZlY2JiOS0yNzk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CRtLt4X3m899ZfuCJ0XD1tyfV5D4qfQ_XlsQdreLPQ=) Peter, we’re seeing history in the making.

Black and brown people have been underrepresented in government for too long. **Yesterday, President Joe Biden nominated the first African American woman to sit on the Supreme Court.**

Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination is a historic victory for leaders of color. Judge Jackson’s voice on the court, the diversity of experience, and expertise that she brings will be critical to protecting and securing the right to control our bodies, our lives, and our futures for generations to come. **This momentum must continue.**

**Equal representation means having all voices heard, and we need leaders like Shontel Brown to help us get there.** As we near the end of February, and edge closer to early voting, we must do everything we can to defend Shontel Brown.

[**_We need to raise $5,000 more before midnight on Monday, and we’re relying on your grassroots support to help ensure that people’s voices are heard and that their fundamental freedoms and rights are met. clean_body: This momentum must continue. = Peter, we’re seeing history in the making. Black and brown people have been underrepresented in government for too long. Yesterday, President Joe Biden nominated the first African American woman to sit on the Supreme Court. Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination is a historic victory for leaders of color. Judge Jackson’s voice on the court, the diversity of experience, and expertise that she brings will be critical to protecting and securing the right to control our bodies, our lives, and our futures for generations to come. This momentum must continue. Equal representation means having all voices heard, and we need leaders like Shontel Brown to help us get there. As we near the end of February, and edge closer to early voting, we must do everything we can to defend Shontel Brown. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thanks for your support, Shontel Brown for Congress As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. Will you join her and be the change we need? = Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress PO Box 221232 Beachwood, OH 44122 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| | I know me and my team have sent you a lot of emails this week.

But I just checked in with them and I knew I had to reach out immediately.

_They told me I only need[**1 more gift**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42276791/332342990/1129282168?refcode=20220226_em_fr_b1_tony_30_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjhlZjkwNC0yOTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KszaylpaAQGOj_iSxZk5kt7WE4qkraCR8RK_IOi7H8A=) from 18326 to hit my End-of-Month Goal!_

[**_I’m going to explain why your support is so important but, if you’re in a rush, will you please chip in $10 now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42276792/332342991/1129282168?refcode=20220226_em_fr_b1_tony_30_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjhlZjkwNC0yOTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KszaylpaAQGOj_iSxZk5kt7WE4qkraCR8RK_IOi7H8A=)

Unlike many political candidates, I’ve experienced the struggles that hardworking Americans face everyday.

I grew up in poverty. And I know the feeling of living paycheck to paycheck, without any sort of safety net to rely on.

So when Congressman Don Bacon voted to cut taxes for billionaires and big corporations instead of helping hardworking families, I knew I needed to replace him.

[**But the fact is: running for office is incredibly expensive.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42276793/332342992/1129282168?refcode=20220226_em_fr_b1_tony_30_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjhlZjkwNC0yOTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KszaylpaAQGOj_iSxZk5kt7WE4qkraCR8RK_IOi7H8A=)

And I can’t personally fund my own campaign.

[**_I know we need more everyday people representing and fighting for us in Congress -- and I’m running to do just that. But I need to stay on track and reach my End-of-Month Goal, or I’ll be forced to make serious budget cuts. Friend,
It's going to take all of us working together to keep this seat blue – to keep someone in this seat who will fight to expand access to quality healthcare, defend abortion rights, and ensure clean, reliable water for generations to come.
**That someone is Kirsten Engel.**
But if we don't build the resources to get her to Congress now, we could face severe setbacks in the near future. **Because the truth is, our opponents simply don't operate on the same morals and values we do.**
Remember, these are the same Republicans who push conspiracy theories at the expense of working Arizonans. **They will not hesitate to accept huge checks from Big Oil, Big Pharma and other special interest groups who will _try their hardest to keep Kirsten away from Congress._**
Kirsten knows we can win this thing without special interests, that's why she signed the pledge to reject fossil fuel money, and chooses to instead rely on small-dollar donations.
Look, we want to do this the right way. [**That's why we're asking you to chip in before our fundraising deadline this Monday.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42277026/332343990/416963966?refcode=X_022622_EOM_B&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmNlNzViOC0yOTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ke6-DR0ZPF5f7sVJKm0sgB5FppHjSmr8McLLZEcTHeM=)
