name: Nan Whaley
subject: a personal request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
Team,
The end of the month is always a tough time for fundraising. I have big goals I want to meet, just like every other person running for office, and we all compete in your inbox for donations. I know it can feel frustrating at times, so I wanted to take a moment to thank you.
We’ve raised more money than any Democratic gubernatorial challenger in Ohio history, thanks in part to fundraising emails like this. Every time we break a new record or reach a new milestone, I know it’s because I have people like you on our team. But at the end of the day, Mike DeWine still has more money than we do.
**[I know exactly what this movement is capable of, which is why I wanted to make a personal request. , could you help us keep up in the fight against Mike DeWine with a contribution of $5 towards our monthly goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42282034/332368423/-528457057?refcode=nw_em_220226_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODdjZmE3YS0zZjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bekp-_cq-wgc7Er2uKJopgvQS0WQHdAY_3snFXp3Ft8=)**
Mike DeWine is a millionaire. Jim Renacci is a millionaire. I’m not, and I’m guessing many of the people reading this aren’t either. There’s nothing wrong with that. In fact, **I’m proud to be the only non-millionaire in this race. **
I grew up in a working class family just like millions of people across the state. I came here for college because Ohio was the land of opportunity, and I am proud that I’ve made it this far since then. But millionaires like DeWine have taken too many opportunities away from working families – and we need a governor who will go to work every day and fight for them.
**[Will you help me bring opportunity back to Ohio for our families and communities? As the only non-millionaire in this race, I’m counting on supporters like you. Please consider donating any amount you are able.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42282035/332368451/-528457057?refcode=nw_em_220226_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODdjZmE3YS0zZjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bekp-_cq-wgc7Er2uKJopgvQS0WQHdAY_3snFXp3Ft8=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42282036/332368452/-528457057?refcode=nw_em_220226_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODdjZmE3YS0zZjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bekp-_cq-wgc7Er2uKJopgvQS0WQHdAY_3snFXp3Ft8=)
Onward,
Nan

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42282037/332368453/-528457057?refcode=nw_em_220226_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODdjZmE3YS0zZjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bekp-_cq-wgc7Er2uKJopgvQS0WQHdAY_3snFXp3Ft8=)****

name: Charlie Crist
subject: How Britney Spears inspired me
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
Back in December, my friend Rep. Eric Swalwell and I wrote a letter to Britney Spears, inviting her to meet with us in Congress and share her experiences with the broken conservatorship process. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42282086/332369021/-264674300?refcode=20220226_f_1_nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjQwNWUxNC00MDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VQibfwc09uhECDlHW2fyvlCiqwP4Hw1_x0LIK-MWCg0=&emci=bf6587b5-b095-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=1f405e14-4097-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=8807089)
---
Friend,

Back in December, my friend Rep. Eric Swalwell and I wrote a letter to Britney Spears, inviting her to meet with us in Congress and share her experiences with the broken conservatorship process.

Britney’s courage and her long fight to shine a light on the horrors that can take place in conservatorships inspired me to introduce the Freedom and Right to Emancipate from Exploitation (FREE) Act in the House of Representatives.

This bill would create federal rules to help protect people from guardianship or conservatorship abuse.

**_[Sign my petition if you agree we must reform this broken system to prevent exploitation and abuse. What happened to Britney can’t be allowed to continue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42282087/332369022/-264674300?refcode=20220226_f_1_nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjQwNWUxNC00MDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VQibfwc09uhECDlHW2fyvlCiqwP4Hw1_x0LIK-MWCg0=&emci=bf6587b5-b095-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=1f405e14-4097-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=8807089)_**

Last week, Britney posted about our letter on Instagram, and Rep. Swalwell and I were so happy to see our invitation made her feel seen and heard.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42282088/332369023/-264674300?refcode=20220226_f_1_nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjQwNWUxNC00MDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VQibfwc09uhECDlHW2fyvlCiqwP4Hw1_x0LIK-MWCg0=&emci=bf6587b5-b095-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=1f405e14-4097-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=8807089)
---
I wish I could say this kind of abuse is rare. But unfortunately, an alarming number of Florida seniors and vulnerable people with disabilities have found themselves trapped in abusive guardianships, isolated from family and friends, their life’s savings stolen, with no way out and no one to turn to.

_Everyone_ in their shoes must be seen and heard, and I promise to continue the fight to save and protect those who are stuck in similar nightmares.

[**_Will you take a moment and add your name to my petition calling for urgent guardianship and conservatorship reform?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42282089/332369024/-264674300?refcode=20220226_f_1_nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjQwNWUxNC00MDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VQibfwc09uhECDlHW2fyvlCiqwP4Hw1_x0LIK-MWCg0=&emci=bf6587b5-b095-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=1f405e14-4097-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=8807089)

Thanks,
Charlie

__ | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. clean_body: | Hey Derek, In case you missed it, our newly drawn PA-17 puts Chris in a strong position to win this race. Now, we have to turn the dial up on our organizing in the next few weeks to reach new voters and get Chris on the ballot. Will you chip in $10 or more to our team so we have the resources to ramp up our voter outreach from now until the May election? In a district as competitive as ours, every contribution counts. | = \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Chris for PA-17 Date: Wed, February 23, 2022 at 1:38 PM Subject: BREAKING NEWS: Redistricting is DONE and Chris is the right candidate to hold this seat. Chip in now >> = It’s official, Derek: We have FINAL maps! The PA Supreme Court just released the new congressional map, and Chris is officially running in Pennsylvania’s newly drawn 17th Congressional District. Chris is excited to run in the district where he was born and raised — a district that includes Beaver Country and much of Allegheny County. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = With the primary election right around the corner, we need to be on offense to expand our ground game and reach every new voter in our district. The road to holding Democrats' House majority goes directly through Western Pennsylvania. And it’s on us to keep PA-17 blue and send a champion for working families to Congress. Thanks for being part of the fight for our common good. — Team Deluzio | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Democrats have to hold it in order to keep their House majority in 2022. = | = | Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States Chris Deluzio is a United States Veteran. name: Tim Ryan
subject: Can I tell you a story?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Can I have just a moment of your time to tell you a story?
| | |
---
Can I tell you a story, folks?

During the Great Depression, my great-grandfather walked miles every morning to the local steel mill to see if they were hiring any workers. Along with hundreds of others, my great-grandpa hoped he would be one of the few to get picked—even if just for a few hours of work.
He was rarely selected. But he still made that walk every single day, every single month.
Here’s why I’m telling you this: My family taught me a lot about determination, perseverance, and doing what’s right. I’ll never forget where I came from or who I’m fighting for.
**Because with all the chaos and partisan gridlock happening in Washington, you need someone who will roll up their sleeves and get to work—no matter how many miles the walk is.**
But right now I’m in the fight of my life. Mitch McConnell is hellbent on retaking the Senate majority. My GOP opponents are spending more than $40 million to keep Ohio red. And we’re expecting a barrage of attacks to hit us any day now.
**[So, I’m asking for your support. Will you split a $5 contribution between my campaign and Maggie Hassan's to help me flip this seat? If we win here in Ohio, we can stop McConnell and expand our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42282607/332371017/1675732396?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk709-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTI0YWE4ZC00Mzk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aQYJloeA-VWx4zm6ewi70CWzXVwQulmUsjlXfcZoAe4=)**
| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42282608/332371018/1675732396?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk709-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTI0YWE4ZC00Mzk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aQYJloeA-VWx4zm6ewi70CWzXVwQulmUsjlXfcZoAe4=)
---
I grew up in Niles, Ohio. I was raised by a single mom. I watched my family and neighbors lose their livelihoods when jobs shipped overseas. I know the importance of community because I’ve lived it.
I promise I’ve got your back. I hope you’ve got mine too.

— Tim
| If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, **[donate now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42282609/332371019/-1829049351?refcode=jtk709-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTI0YWE4ZC00Mzk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aQYJloeA-VWx4zm6ewi70CWzXVwQulmUsjlXfcZoAe4=)**. name: =?utf-8?Q?Reed=20Olson=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Important Campaign Update
body:
My goal has always been to represent my community in the best way I know how... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/537e4abc2dd1/a-birthday-wish-8851961?e=0ba866af2d)
---
## Campaign Announcement!
|
---
Hello, friends,For the last seven months we have been visiting with rural Minnesotans from Granite Falls to Willmar to Bemidji. Last Tuesday Bemidji was drawn into the 8th congressional district.My goal has always been to represent my community in the best way I know how. To that aim, I have decided to run for the newly drawn 2nd state house seat.As your representative, I will work tirelessly for my neighbors, who work so hard themselves. With your support, I will bring our Northwoods values to St. Paul.Thank you to all of you that have supported us thus far with your donations, constructive feedback and words of encouragement. Because of your generous support, our campaign is strong, confident, and prepared to take on this next challenge.-Reed
| | | | | | You can listen to me talk more about my decision to run for State House by clicking the button below:
---
| | | | | | | [Listen to Reed on Bemidji Now](https://gmail.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f55dc7af213002cce7e62bd8&id=ba33fe91d3&e=0ba866af2d)
---
| | | | | |
---
| We are currently working to transition our website, social media and branding. Don’t worry, you will still be able to keep up with our campaign and follow our journey via the usual links at the bottom of this newsletter!|
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
---|---
| | | | **Town Hall Recap-Bemidji, 2/17** Before the new district maps were released, we had already planned to hold a town hall meeting with a Q&A format to learn more about the issues our neighbors care most about right now. We had a wonderful turnout on a very cold night. I love meeting and speaking with voters and I am so enthused and grateful to be a part of this vibrant, concerned, and passionate community. I definitely look forward to hosting another town hall meeting in the future!|
---
[Listen to Reed on KAXE Public Radio](https://gmail.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f55dc7af213002cce7e62bd8&id=ad0d9eb2e6&e=0ba866af2d)
---
---|---
| | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
|
---

body:
Conservatives Are Resolved, United, and Fighting for America | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jerseyrizzo/outrage-13725695?e=f7e301a8ae)
---
| |
---
| | This week, I’m meeting with conservative patriots from across the country in Orlando, Florida for CPAC 2022. This conference will host the brightest minds and fiercest fighters in America committed to defending our liberty, securing our elections, and overthrowing Leftist tyranny.

America is ready for change — the Biden administration has failed to secure our border, delivered disaster in Afghanistan, and failed to prevent war in Ukraine. Biden’s regime has abandoned any sense of leadership and has consistently destabilized our communities and destroyed our economy. We need real leaders in Washington. Will you be a part of the change? Chip in now.
---
| [DONATE HERE TODAY AND TURN NEW JERSEY RED IN ‘22!](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=fdd91ed085&e=f7e301a8ae "DONATE HERE TODAY AND TURN NEW JERSEY RED IN ‘22!")
---
| We’re going into this election with a fighting spirit and we’re prepared to confront the challenges that New Jerseyeans are facing everyday, from tight budgets, runaway inflation, and poor job prospects to dangerous communities, weak borders, and understaffed police departments. And we can’t forget the woke corporations, unchecked Big Tech, and Critical Race Theory turning our schools into brainwashing mush.
---
| [JOIN ME AND STOP THE TIDE OF LEFTIST TYRANNY](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=9b1156c119&e=f7e301a8ae "JOIN ME AND STOP THE TIDE OF LEFTIST TYRANNY")
---
| We can’t turn America and New Jersey around by depending on the same politicians and political activists that broke our state in the first place. The elites of New Jersey don’t know the problems the American people are experiencing — _and they don’t care._

That’s why you need a conservative fighter who embodies the true fight of New Jersey in Congress. I hope you’ll stand up with me and fight for New Jersey and our nation.
---
|
---
| Phil Rizzo
---

name: Carole King
subject: please
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_6hv6yj~)

Hi -- it's Carole King. I was moved to write to you today because there's so much at stake in this year's elections.

When Republicans were in power, they...

**... Undermined** voting rights and our democracy.
**... Incited** a violent insurrection at our nation's Capitol.
**... Attacked** science and public health experts.

Since taking back power, Democrats have delivered...

...Millions of **vaccinations.**
...Historic investment in **infrastructure.**
...Expanded access to **affordable health care.**

So, when Republicans say we need to change and put their party back in power, our response must be a resounding rebuke.

"HELL no! The change we need is MORE Democrats!"

****[It's clear the change we need is MORE Democrats, so I'm asking you directly: Will you join me in helping Democrats EXPAND their House Majority in 2022 by chipping in $3 to the DCCC straight away?](https://links.e.dccc.)****

Let me be clear:

**Electing MORE Democrats will allow us to continue making critical progress.

Electing MORE Democrats will help protect voting rights and our democracy.

Electing MORE Democrats will protect women's health and the right to choose.**

And that's why DCCC needs you to pitch in to ensure that we keep Republicans out of power and EXPAND our House Majority -- so we can get MORE done for you and your family.

**[So please: Will you join me in helping our Democrats win an expanded House Majority in 2022?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-YTZxK_-)**
| | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_qfgk-j2C_)
---
| [**Chip in $35 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $50 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/yr-)
---
| [**Chip in $100 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/34GVF3V-~)
---
| [**Chip in $250 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/er4dfw_80rt-)
---
| [**Or chip in another amount >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-)
---

Thank you,

Carole
---

_Carole King is a singer-songwriter, author, and activist. Her distinctions include a Grammy Lifetime Achievement Award, a Kennedy Center honor, and double-induction into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame. Now Carole is using her platform to help elect an expanded Democratic House Majority. And yes, Carole really did write this email._

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46460705&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE4Mjk2OTI4MAS2&l=14416759&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46460705&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE4Mjk2OTI4MAS2&l=14416759&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.
clean_body: | | | Hi -- it's Carole King. I was moved to write to you today because there's so much at stake in this year's elections. When Republicans were in power, they... ... Undermined voting rights and our democracy. ... Incited a violent insurrection at our nation's Capitol. ... Attacked science and public health experts. Since taking back power, Democrats have delivered... ...Millions of vaccinations. ...Historic investment in infrastructure. ...Expanded access to affordable health care. So, when Republicans say we need to change and put their party back in power, our response must be a resounding rebuke. "HELL no! The change we need is MORE Democrats!" ** Let me be clear: Electing MORE Democrats will allow us to continue making critical progress. Electing MORE Democrats will help protect voting rights and our democracy. Electing MORE Democrats will protect women's health and the right to choose. And that's why DCCC needs you to pitch in to ensure that we keep Republicans out of power and EXPAND our House Majority -- so we can get MORE done for you and your family. ** | | If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | Thank you, Carole Carole King is a singer-songwriter, author, and activist. Her distinctions include a Grammy Lifetime Achievement Award, a Kennedy Center honor, and double-induction into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame. Now Carole is using her platform to help elect an expanded Democratic House Majority. And yes, Carole really did write this email. Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

clean_body: Keep up the momentum | Friend – sorry to add another email to your inbox, but this can't wait: With Colin Schmitt beating Sean Patrick Maloney in the first poll and the stakes higher than they have ever been, we need to continue to reach our Fundraising goals. Because NY-18 is the TOP target for Republicans to Take Back the House we need to show strong support! Sean Patrick Maloney will be the first Democratic Congressional Committe Chairman to lose his seat if we keep up this momentum. That's why I'm calling on you to rush a donation right now. We can stop Nancy Pelosi and Sean Patrick Maloney– but ONLY if you step in during critical moments like this one. | Thank you, Team Schmitt Paid for by Schmitt for Congress Our mailing address is: Schmitt For Congress PO Box 67 South Salem, NY 10590

clean_body: Will you help me? | = Friend, I am ready to put my money where my mouth is: today, I am going to personally match every grassroots contribution, and = Why $13.74? That’s our average donation to emails like this one. Look, your donation is pivotal here — your $13.74 donation is an investment that won’t just fuel our next round of kick-ass campaign ads, hardworking staff, and tools necessary to win. But it’s an even bigger investment toward real change. It’s your way to prove to the Washington establishment that you’re sick of the status quo. You’re ready for progressive leadership that will tackle the issues that MATTER. I mean tackling income inequality, combating climate change, lowering prescription drug medicine, strengthening social security, and holding the super-rich accountable. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thanks for your support, Matt West = = = PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress Matt West for Congress PO Box 1926 Beaverton, OR 97075 United States Click here to

Peter, I don’t consider fundraising the most important part of our campaign. I know that we will win in November by connecting with the people of Wisconsin’s third district and addressing the issues facing our communities.

But we won’t reach Election Day in November without running a competitive campaign now, and that takes resources.

I already know that ours is the best team of grassroots supporters in Wisconsin. If you are able, I could truly use your help before the month is out. **[Donate whatever amount you can today to put our fundraising back on track for February>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42272173/332323166/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.7f0d8128-1d97-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.7f0d8128-1d97-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjBkODEyOC0xZDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V1c-t8FNztm3sopyeBqM9Y5_RhyMUDlAjNCDqeRtGZc=)**

I appreciate all you’ve done to get us this far,

Deb

clean_body: We’re a bit short of where we need to be. | = Peter, We have certain fundraising targets that we need to hit to ensure our campaign can keep reaching out to voters and growing our team. If we fall behind, we’ll have to curtail our plans for the month ahead. Right now, our team says we are still short of where we need to be by 11:59 pm tomorrow. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = Peter, I don’t consider fundraising the most important part of our campaign. I know that we will win in November by connecting with the people of Wisconsin’s third district and addressing the issues facing our communities. But we won’t reach Election Day in November without running a competitive campaign now, and that takes resources. I already know that ours is the best team of grassroots supporters in Wisconsin. If you are able, I could truly use your help before the month is out. = I appreciate all you’ve done to get us this far, Deb | Deb McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity. Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. **GEORGIA SENATE POLLING:
WALKER 49% - Warnock 48%**
This is urgent, Peter.

The latest polling shows we're leading this critical Senate race in Georgia by _just one point._

You have been one of our most loyal supporters since launching our campaign, and we need your help again. **[If we're going to win this race, we need to build on our momentum.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59674556:JTTQsSEJN:m:1:3298722022:4675BD588582D9C9AABDC2AA0164CFD1:r)**

Our opponent knows the race is a dead heat, so he's already spending millions on his first advertising blitzes when we're still 8 months before the election! **[That's why we need you to join the fight again today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59674556:JTTQsSEJN:m:1:3298722022:4675BD588582D9C9AABDC2AA0164CFD1:r)**

name: Joe Cunningham
subject: showing leaders can and should care:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Cunningham for South Carolina
body:
| When I think of the future of kids in South Carolina, including Boone, I get worried.

McMaster and his buddies are leading us down a path of widespread voter suppression, Charleston flooding, schools as police states, and crumbling infrastructure.

That’s why I love for Boone to watch me campaign, the same way I watched my father perform his duties as judge when I was a kid.

**_It shows him that there is an alternative, that our leaders can and should care about South Carolinians._**

But this race to elect a new governor in S.C. will be challenging and cost a lot. McMaster has millions on hand from special interests and we’ve got to compete without accepting PAC money.

**[My team says we have to raise another $10K on digital before the end of the month. Our goals are only getting more and more critical—we can’t afford to fall short. Will you chip in $10 now to help?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42283147/332373662/80455361?amount=10&contactdata=9xAgdogj6ZoxaRi31bWzMFDmHyeqLMs9tJhQM%2Fe4mdbpxAo74IYTNWLlwjaXES1OEVaYWmt3XTeiRSYijzbH4C1XYxGjtfy4RJfIcAX1HFY%3D&refcode=JC_EM_FR_3MO_220224_1_1_hidden_link&source=JC_EM_FR_12MO_20220226_1_4&utm_source=jc_em_fr_12mo_20220226_1_4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTI2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWRiNDIxMS00Nzk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7-wiexj_CJMsSlbzJInl1w9-MS1NSqxP7UM7kK-8bOQ=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: | When I think of the future of kids in South Carolina, including Boone, I get worried. McMaster and his buddies are leading us down a path of widespread voter suppression, Charleston flooding, schools as police states, and crumbling infrastructure. That’s why I love for Boone to watch me campaign, the same way I watched my father perform his duties as judge when I was a kid. It shows him that there is an alternative, that our leaders can and should care about South Carolinians. But this race to elect a new governor in S.C. will be challenging and cost a lot. McMaster has millions on hand from special interests and we’ve got to compete without accepting PAC money. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = I’m running to raise the minimum wage for the families struggling to make ends meet. name: Greg Casar
subject: We're in striking distance!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94297/images/greg%20email%20header.png]
I can’t believe it, Peter.
My team just told me we are likely one or two points away from hitting 50% on Election Day . That means if we push hard in these last three days, we could avoid a runoff and win this race. With your help, on Tuesday I could be the Democratic nominee for Texas’s 35th District and we could be that much closer to passing our bold, progressive agenda.
We’ve worked so hard to get here—now we’re in striking distance of winning this race on Tuesday. Can you help us get there? Chip in now to help us secure a victory on Election Day. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=02.24_email]
>> HELP US WIN ON ELECTION DAY << [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=02.24_email]
Peter, this election will be very close. That means every single vote counts in the race to get to 50%.
We can’t leave anything up to chance—our team will spend the next three days getting every voter we can to the polls on Election Day. But we need your help.

name: Fred Guttenberg
subject: RE: my daughter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I confronted Marco Rubio at a town hall
| | |
---
Friend – my daughter Jaime was murdered with an assault weapon in the Parkland massacre four years ago.
Since then, Marco Rubio hasn't lifted a finger to end gun violence. He still refuses to work with Parkland survivors like me to reduce gun violence and save lives. He still lets the gun lobby buy his vote.
Val Demings has the integrity and the compassion that Marco Rubio lacks – but with GOP money on Rubio's side, this isn't going to be an easy win. That's why I need your help: **[_Will you donate $5 right now to help Val Demings reach her goal tonight, defeat Marco Rubio and pass lifesaving gun reform?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42283434/332374699/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2369-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmY5MzBjMy00Nzk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XYPULc1LWrxWjCXXMOJoQtRFZafbyKCNy-QTp6kvPdA=)**
I confronted Marco Rubio at a town hall just one week after my daughter was murdered. I asked him to do something about the gun violence epidemic that stole my Jaime from our family, and he couldn't even look me in the eye.
Val Demings, on the other hand, has been a staunch supporter of gun safety reform since day one. If she wins, gun safety champions can expand their majority in the Senate, and they'll finally have enough votes to ban weapons of war like the one that killed my Jaime.
The problem is that Marco Rubio has a massive war chest from the gun lobby and far-right megadonors. And national Republicans are gearing up to run their first round of attack ads to defeat Val Demings right now. She needs $50,000 before midnight tonight – or she could fall behind in this race.
This isn't just about red versus blue; it's about saving lives, and ending the heartache that families like mine feel every day. **[_Please, can I count on you to donate $5 right now to put a gun safety advocate in the Senate? _](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42283435/332374700/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2369-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmY5MzBjMy00Nzk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XYPULc1LWrxWjCXXMOJoQtRFZafbyKCNy-QTp6kvPdA=)**
Nothing will bring Jaime back, but I can make sure that no family has to feel the loss that I feel every day. Let's end gun violence, together.

Fred Guttenberg
Gun Violence Survivor
Jaime and Jesse's Dad

| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42283436/332374701/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2369-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmY5MzBjMy00Nzk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XYPULc1LWrxWjCXXMOJoQtRFZafbyKCNy-QTp6kvPdA=)

Peter,

Yesterday, President Biden announced that he will nominate Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to serve on the Supreme Court. **She is the first Black woman EVER to receive a nomination.**

For generations, qualified and deserving Black women were rarely considered for leadership in nearly every profession – especially in the legal system. Time and time again, exemplary Black women were overlooked in favor of ensuring that the Supreme Court has remained overwhelmingly white and male for centuries.

**Now, finally, we have a chance to mold the Supreme Court to actually reflect the diversity of America – but only if Judge Jackson is confirmed in the Senate. And with Republicans like Mitch McConnell already doing whatever they can to obstruct Jackson’s nomination, I need 10,000 fearless fighters to stand with me before midnight.

[Will you sign my petition now to urge the Senate to confirm Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42273638/332328940/-73781653?code=jtk382-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https://surveys.signforgood.com/LJ4NY22-SCOTUS-nomination&code=jtk382-su-nd&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMThjYzczYi0xZjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fKgVtiUeMLEu0tn9SSThaVkldKLkhtZCRIHjbzbt84w=&emci=63e7e7b0-7396-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=a18cc73b-1f97-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)**

The nomination of a qualified and well-deserving Black woman to our nation’s highest court is both overdue and _desperately_ needed. With the Supreme Court leaning more conservative than it has in generations, the consequences could be devastating. Right now, Roe v. Wade is at risk of being overturned, voting rights are being weakened, LGBTQ+ children are losing their rights in Florida and Texas, and gun violence continues to go unaddressed.

**We’re confident that Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson will inspire the change that we need on the Supreme Court.** For the first time in our nation’s history, the highest court in the land may have a fierce advocate for ALL people – especially the Black women who have been overlooked and ignored for too long.

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, Yesterday, President Biden announced that he will nominate Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to serve on the Supreme Court. She is the first Black woman EVER to receive a nomination. For generations, qualified and deserving Black women were rarely considered for leadership in nearly every profession – especially in the legal system. Time and time again, exemplary Black women were overlooked in favor of ensuring that the Supreme Court has remained overwhelmingly white and male for centuries. Now, finally, we have a chance to mold the Supreme Court to actually reflect the diversity of America – but only if Judge Jackson is confirmed in the Senate. And with Republicans like Mitch McConnell already doing whatever they can to obstruct Jackson’s nomination, I need 10,000 fearless fighters to stand with me before midnight. | | The nomination of a qualified and well-deserving Black woman to our nation’s highest court is both overdue and desperately needed. With the Supreme Court leaning more conservative than it has in generations, the consequences could be devastating. Right now, Roe v. Wade is at risk of being overturned, voting rights are being weakened, LGBTQ+ children are losing their rights in Florida and Texas, and gun violence continues to go unaddressed. We’re confident that Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson will inspire the change that we need on the Supreme Court. For the first time in our nation’s history, the highest court in the land may have a fierce advocate for ALL people – especially the Black women who have been overlooked and ignored for too long. But with GOP leaders like Mitch McConnell already vowing to slow the confirmation process, we urgently need to gather 10,000 fearless fighters to stand with Judge Jackson now. | | Thank you for fighting with me to help another qualified and deserving Black woman make history. Letitia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY

clean_body: Tennessee is ready for progressive change — we just need the fundraising support to make it happen. | | | Peter, We have just two days until our February fundraising deadline, and right now, we still need 148 supporters to make a contribution in order to hit our goal. While the GOP is trying to silence us, we know this movement can win anywhere. And the data is on our side: According to the Tennessee Holler, Republicans and Democrats would have been neck and neck in the fifth and seventh Congressional districts in the 2018 Senate race, had the new Congressional maps been in place. And in 2020, almost 40% of Tennessee voted for Joe Biden. Tennessee is ready for progressive change — we just need the fundraising support to make it happen. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thanks for being one of the 148 supporters we needed today, Peter,. I’m so grateful! 💙 Aarica Marsh Finance Director Odessa for Congress | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

[**We know it would mean the world to see birthday wishes from supporters like you. Will you sign her birthday card now?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlX6YRsHz0rpXA_Vy-iQ1EMRWOeDyk0mntHbDWnkrvZsnRksQuDRsszYsUWDjL71zW9bG-nw8LHnaAg0-XFg8imHetRlTk1TymO1o-60kl6NiII2umk1PPI1Ab6Yj8x_DqDk8OApBxwrsnJxki-YddeqNrqidpUviphC__KY4Jefn_G6GNK3oFMdnm366FZT6CaMHgrFmupU6ZZUCpIDTgCAbvWrhAZX6xu_MHeilVfAk_j7fxtx5uyr0UCHIrWfTNTNtDOHd2M1t1ScrWC5eqoZ88U7qUcp8s6iMeJHY5GhmFjHfxPG-RfKsE1KHUtBsw/3jw/Ks55PTw8SmeirZe6q96Vgw/h1/kQxp3G6iac_tMOekKju8IAw-2vD0w14PSD4FPUEE7uE)

name: VoteVets
subject: Fighting disinformation during the war in Ukraine
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Turn on the television or get on the Internet and you will see a FLOOD of Russian propaganda and misinformation.
#
Derek —
In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make a contribution to VoteVets. Please give us a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Turn on the television or get on the Internet and you will see a FLOOD of Russian propaganda and misinformation.
You see it laundered through bots online. And, unfortunately, you see it laundered through people like Trump, Tucker Carlson, and others.
They’ll say we should not care about what happens in Ukraine. They’ll praise Putin. They’ll attack Joe Biden. They’ll seek to divide the American people in this critical time.
And, sadly, one of their top targets is veterans. We saw it on 1/6 and we see it again now. They target veterans and military family members because they know how important our voices are in these debates.
VoteVets runs the largest national program combatting disinformation targeting veterans, but we need your help to get it done. So please:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to VoteVets today? We’ll put it right to work fighting back against disinformation targeting veterans during this critical moment.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-pac-disinfo-ukr?refcode=em22026-1-tb2-c3&t=1&refcode2=4385_3013755_6v_lAm&akid=4385%2E3013755%2E6v_lAm)

The team at VoteVets

body:
South Texas is not for sale — and we are tired of sell-out politicians. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQlgsG2vIuVirkYNn0JGTOr1NuUSOlwGUycU7dsRTolrRfPvhyOS--KUTh7mWVq5m0Ri9bTL-n2j1O0ibJy-9jLMvjZG-JgNGCbwvEPVObmiLVF_wMl1krYEfeaO9HewftSlycZg3CZeXm6dDb2oWHx2zfU8Dk-7ooQLmXfTSaUMox6WzeeZttoPXC5_7wwIDjrh26uWvph7eJTBtxTMzKZeGAGjv4pt4xBYHAZjHQlEF1A8l7WPH9daNsR6VqsW8HYQMXiMMCuJGR9Cl9QfyN0-sE2NPhUPdHdS-Tm15nGoznO-x0Qz3q0Mi4qzUsWMVaM/3jw/HSEGZLObRauHLpwLt_YvEQ/h0/JQtetc_A6KzwYb8UlBm87ezhZHL3qbtMp7RPHqdMITQ) Peter, With only three more days left until the primary election, we are down to the wire. Since launching the campaign last summer, we’ve had constant reminders as to why South Texas needs a change in representation. In Texas alone, we’ve seen countless attacks on our reproductive freedom and just last week many in our community did not have clean water to drink. On top of that, our current representative is under investigation by the FBI and has taken thousands of dollars from Big Oil, the Koch industry and insurance companies. Our district and our communities are tired of sell-out representation in Congress. We deserve a leader who will fight as hard for our dreams as we do. And that leader is Jessica. [**_We only have three more days to leave everything on the field and elect Jessica as the next representative to Texas’ 28th district. clean_body: South Texas is not for sale — and we are tired of sell-out politicians. | | | Peter, With only three more days left until the primary election, we are down to the wire. Since launching the campaign last summer, we’ve had constant reminders as to why South Texas needs a change in representation. In Texas alone, we’ve seen countless attacks on our reproductive freedom and just last week many in our community did not have clean water to drink. On top of that, our current representative is under investigation by the FBI and has taken thousands of dollars from Big Oil, the Koch industry and insurance companies. Our district and our communities are tired of sell-out representation in Congress. We deserve a leader who will fight as hard for our dreams as we do. And that leader is Jessica. Let’s get to work, — Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

| | We’re coming up on our end-of-month deadline, and to be honest, I’m getting worried that we won’t hit our $10,000 goal.

Being named a Frontline candidate has only made it more important that we hit every fundraising goal. [Will you help us out by chipping in $20 now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42274513/332332862/-147164705?amount=20&refcode2=c312d025-2397-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=JG_EM_FR_3MO_20220226_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzEyZDAyNS0yMzk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5beG71S7iogDhSE33EqLRvQpL9MLVXkmBsoZ3Dkbghw=)

body:

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: A never-heard and sorely needed perspective
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Judge Brown Jackson will bring a never-heard — and sorely needed — perspective to the bench as the first Black woman and first public defender to serve on the high court.
#
Peter,
**I’m thrilled President Biden nominated Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to be the first Black woman on the Supreme Court of the United States.**
Of the 115 justices who have served on the Supreme Court bench, 108 have been white men. There has never been a Black woman on the bench, and there have only been three justices of color in the court’s entire history.
This nomination is historic — but we can’t rest for a single second. Soon, the Senate Judiciary Committee will conduct a confirmation hearing. Then, the full Senate will take a vote. [**Can you join me and other progressives in calling on the Senate to immediately confirm Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court by adding your name to our petition?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10854?redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpj-scotusnomja-aa%3Frefcode%3Dem20220226&t=1&akid=1061%2E420207%2Eb-SnD1)
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10854?redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpj-scotusnomja-aa%3Frefcode%3Dem20220226&t=2&akid=1061%2E420207%2Eb-SnD1)**
Judge Brown Jackson served as a clerk for federal judges appointed by both Republican and Democratic Presidents — including Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer — and brings deep experience on the federal bench, having served on the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia and then the U.S. Court of Appeals for the D.C. Circuit since 2012.
Throughout her career, Judge Brown Jackson has embodied one of the highest principles of American law — **that everyone has the right to due process and legal representation.** As a public defender, she represented those who could not afford to hire a lawyer. As Vice Chair of the Sentencing Commission under President Obama, she worked to alleviate harsh and unfair sentences for those convicted of drug crimes.
**And as the first Black woman and first public defender to serve on the high court, Judge Brown Jackson will bring a never-heard — and sorely needed — perspective to the bench.**
[**Like so many others, I celebrate this nomination and look forward to seeing her confirmed. Join me in urging the Senate to confirm Judge Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court without delay.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10854?redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpj-scotusnomja-aa%3Frefcode%3Dem20220226&t=3&akid=1061%2E420207%2Eb-SnD1)
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220226-1061-footer&t=4&refcode2=1061_420207_b-SnD1&akid=1061%2E420207%2Eb-SnD1)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=5&akid=1061%2E420207%2Eb-SnD1)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=1061%2E420207%2Eb-SnD1)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: We have only one choice
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
We're watching history play out. freedom is under attack and the United States – despite having ample opportunity to avert the course of events that h I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=1916567d0bdf47ae92ddfe82654e3fc8&_e=BH2x13sa_bUZfBPHyrdrxefNTISiDKWie_77i72TEsIC2npHWzqNbuk8DWcZbIMDjVQINE2Cdo43uh26Y88p-6EOYmh0V8Qq9CF7LXN1Dky3r_3vGtRoo-Jn0EYg2wckLA7Qsh-2sNqrC3FbsO4w41y45d0JFcsbC8FUdLWGRk2GfOjZ-WtecDzibURTagRIkBFZqLm8_Izn9Xrwoa1gYAhCwC0RyTUGFcdIcyhJa6ciNfs_AYtPU36wbFPABLoy0va_aQJo_B_z1eKo_whOPrnf-g2ve0qbZvHRldSJXD6QUMYUm-BliO9BolW3y_RAjJl2FZv2hDVYCqCNxJtq4VMr-E4pOnUpanQ0wSIcnJouePgoK28ORYWdFS0RdEzSwDm7VjwzOGo697M-484GsGq0V3CzZotAUtxCfbbk4AT52q9XDoxBQ653UfPfrteeTzIi8gzBPrSdnMneOgKY6w%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

I’m angry. You should be angry.

Today, freedom is under attack and the United States – despite having ample opportunity to avert the course of events that has unfolded in the past month – has done little to nothing to dissuade Vladimir Putin from invading a sovereign democracy.

Folks, I feel comfortable say that this likely wouldn’t have happened if a Republican were the current occupant of the White House.

Do you remember what happened in 2012 when then candidate Romney said that the biggest geopolitical foe of the United States was Russia? Democrats laughed at him.

Who is laughing now? Vladimir Putin.

Peter, now more than ever it’s important to show your support for conservative candidates running for office around the country. We’re not running for self-aggrandizement; **candidates like me are running to ensure that foreign policy debacles like the ones which have occurred under President Biden don’t happen again**.

**[I’m writing today because I need your help. Our end of month fundraising deadline falls in about 48 hours and we need to send a message to Democrats and detractors in Oregon: You deserve to lose and I’m the man who’s going to get the job done](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=1916567d0bdf47ae92ddfe82654e3fc8&_e=BH2x13sa_bUZfBPHyrdrxefNTISiDKWie_77i72TEsIC2npHWzqNbuk8DWcZbIMDjVQINE2Cdo43uh26Y88p-6EOYmh0V8Qq9CF7LXN1Dky3r_3vGtRoo-Jn0EYg2wckLA7Qsh-2sNqrC3FbsO4w41y45d0JFcsbC8FUdLWGRk2GfOjZ-WtecDzibURTagRIkBFZqLm8_Izn9Xrwoa1gYAhCwC0RyTUGFcdIcyhJa6ciNfs_AYtPU36wbFPABLoypKVvM0OGa_ffV1SYl98-4RNRgrVMo2Iliv0GCSGkPVuuLvfLMO95ODGl9GoUmCrQtHtIeZRlDwFZaIfyDgOZSHur_OHVsji84_x1Sci1OP_aMqaJ_VoUuuz2nr7ruke53HRuuc0A13MMYjwdg_dwuSHdmaPF7n6YDzL2tEzDixlUFVVZ9ZwL2MmW2pjJ1-V4QmowVCw0ZPnuu-nuS6lsjQ%3D%3D)**.

[**__
HELP TEAM SKARLATOS HIT OUR FEBRUARY GOAL
CHIP IN $3.50 TODAY -> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=1916567d0bdf47ae92ddfe82654e3fc8&_e=BH2x13sa_bUZfBPHyrdrxefNTISiDKWie_77i72TEsIC2npHWzqNbuk8DWcZbIMDjVQINE2Cdo43uh26Y88p-6EOYmh0V8Qq9CF7LXN1Dky3r_3vGtRoo-Jn0EYg2wckLA7Qsh-2sNqrC3FbsO4w41y45d0JFcsbC8FUdLWGRk2GfOjZ-WtecDzibURTagRIkBFZqLm8_Izn9Xrwoa1gYAhCwC0RyTUGFcdIcyhJa6ciNfs_AYtPU36wbFPABLoyUfuItLnLw6v6ZxASoGxOBHvmmZWCdWpon47KUjEGS8kqVrpDwgDBZ848OkNZPAvspYB5ngNwWDtSdFoCkKGSgqjAUKGuQO79UND9iwUA1aKyQZvXvE4EAsWriIBqFAbSe7gn3l1_USEjlb_4lWliAEmB4_-jheGy4DKlLmalJWDN0TxpLpSIWSDD7Z0K5kXD24Se9pW5VVtzLTg0ciMYEA%3D%3D) <
We don’t need another acolyte of Bernie Sanders in the House advocating for Russian appeasement. We need a proud American who will ALWAYS stand up against tyranny.

What we do in the coming days and months is going to scrutinized by historians for years to come. We can start by sending a strong message to the White House: we’re stripping you of your Democrat majorities in Congress.

Sincerely,
Alek Skarlatos

[**__
CHIP IN NOW -> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=1916567d0bdf47ae92ddfe82654e3fc8&_e=BH2x13sa_bUZfBPHyrdrxefNTISiDKWie_77i72TEsIC2npHWzqNbuk8DWcZbIMDjVQINE2Cdo43uh26Y88p-6EOYmh0V8Qq9CF7LXN1Dky3r_3vGtRoo-Jn0EYg2wckLA7Qsh-2sNqrC3FbsO4w41y45d0JFcsbC8FUdLWGRk2GfOjZ-WtecDzibURTagRIkBFZqLm8_Izn9Xrwoa1gYAhCwC0RyTUGFcdIcyhJa6ciNfs_AYtPU36wbFPABLoy6QrzHEKtHhv4nMjKwupuZhZNXCODJaixbaxO6cS0WfmcVkFH6hNPp8d7_v-Sg0cvJrUuVz2PM93SPwtDNJ3t5Kw6yqPLbWsRUEOpGKeokzGu3HaLjoCbFyzLADXtD7DCEas4FKn4tem1a0NSCCpskF110OJXVIb85M6ZkRjCB-qun4gJ8SeJ_stRHseIb4p2g8FrECAn7qCjCDhlP31E5g%3D%3D)

clean_body: We're watching history play out. freedom is under attack and the United States – despite having ample opportunity to avert the course of events that h I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, I’m angry. You should be angry. Today, freedom is under attack and the United States – despite having ample opportunity to avert the course of events that has unfolded in the past month – has done little to nothing to dissuade Vladimir Putin from invading a sovereign democracy. Folks, I feel comfortable say that this likely wouldn’t have happened if a Republican were the current occupant of the White House. Do you remember what happened in 2012 when then candidate Romney said that the biggest geopolitical foe of the United States was Russia? Democrats laughed at him. Who is laughing now? Vladimir Putin. Peter, now more than ever it’s important to show your support for conservative candidates running for office around the country. We’re not running for self-aggrandizement; candidates like me are running to ensure that foreign policy debacles like the ones which have occurred under President Biden don’t happen again. . < We don’t need another acolyte of Bernie Sanders in the House advocating for Russian appeasement. We need a proud American who will ALWAYS stand up against tyranny. What we do in the coming days and months is going to scrutinized by historians for years to come. We can start by sending a strong message to the White House: we’re stripping you of your Democrat majorities in Congress. Sincerely, Alek Skarlatos | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. Peter, have you heard the incredible news? **Joe Biden is set to nominate Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson****of the United States Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit to the Supreme Court of the United States.** If confirmed, Judge Jackson will be the first Black woman to sit on the Supreme Court. Her nomination fulfills President Biden’s historic promise to the American people, and is a reminder of the importance of having a strong and united Democratic majority in the U.S. Senate. Democratic unity is what will pave the way for Judge Jackson to join the Court, where she’ll rule on transformative issues like civil rights and reproductive rights for generations to come — the very same issues that Kyrsten Sinema has blocked progress on again and again by obstructing President Biden’s legislative agenda. It goes without saying we need Senate Democrats united in order to secure this historic confirmation to the nation’s highest court. _Including Kyrsten Sinema._ But Judge Jackson’s nomination is also a reminder of why we’re doing all of this work in the first place. By holding Sinema accountable, and working to strengthen Democrats’ majority in future sessions of Congress, we’re fighting for a future where we don’t only nominate progressives to the Supreme Court, we also enact progressive legislation that improves millions of American lives. **[We hope you’ll consider donating $5 or any amount today to fuel our work in this historic moment. name: Team Jazz
subject: A special request from Priscilla (Jazz’s mom)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=logo]
Hi there, it’s Priscilla, Jazz’s mom!
Today is Jazz’s 33rd birthday, and I’d love nothing more than to show him how much his work to make the world a better place means to all of us. Watching him and his wife raise their little boy, I know Jazz is dedicated to making sure our challenges, and the struggles of those who came before, aren’t passed on to the next generation.
Will you join me in celebrating Jazz by signing his digital birthday card? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/_cU_e7UMPE2F0zPA-Ut16w2?contactdata=6b9O2tLCltHs%2BbN8WbclnBZnpLsgSTOOauKvs9CgSlnTfnjLpgIRDW0Emv3iVGgpiW9ODsdkT0T4MXnox5FJdoVlLu2wBKzyGjovx2DlkHfyHwIrPo4Isu7G52GWpZ7ZCnRmqwHq%2B%2B2N1MtccRLrg%2F%2FyuaOUqyErsGVmnVH5gds%3D&refcode2=body_link1] You can even include a personal note if you’d like!
https://secure.ngpvan.com/_cU_e7UMPE2F0zPA-Ut16w2?contactdata=6b9O2tLCltHs%2BbN8WbclnBZnpLsgSTOOauKvs9CgSlnTfnjLpgIRDW0Emv3iVGgpiW9ODsdkT0T4MXnox5FJdoVlLu2wBKzyGjovx2DlkHfyHwIrPo4Isu7G52GWpZ7ZCnRmqwHq%2B%2B2N1MtccRLrg%2F%2FyuaOUqyErsGVmnVH5gds%3D&refcode2=body_img [https://secure.ngpvan.com/_cU_e7UMPE2F0zPA-Ut16w2?contactdata=6b9O2tLCltHs%2BbN8WbclnBZnpLsgSTOOauKvs9CgSlnTfnjLpgIRDW0Emv3iVGgpiW9ODsdkT0T4MXnox5FJdoVlLu2wBKzyGjovx2DlkHfyHwIrPo4Isu7G52GWpZ7ZCnRmqwHq%2B%2B2N1MtccRLrg%2F%2FyuaOUqyErsGVmnVH5gds%3D&refcode2=body_img]I know Jazz will be the fresh voice our families need in Congress, fighting for health care for every person, nutritious food for every neighborhood, and the reforms we need for our unjust criminal justice system. He’s determined to make the world a better place not just for our family, but for every family.
It would mean so much if you’d help me show how much we appreciate his dedication to moving our community, state, and nation forward.
Don’t forget to sign the card! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/_cU_e7UMPE2F0zPA-Ut16w2?contactdata=6b9O2tLCltHs%2BbN8WbclnBZnpLsgSTOOauKvs9CgSlnTfnjLpgIRDW0Emv3iVGgpiW9ODsdkT0T4MXnox5FJdoVlLu2wBKzyGjovx2DlkHfyHwIrPo4Isu7G52GWpZ7ZCnRmqwHq%2B%2B2N1MtccRLrg%2F%2FyuaOUqyErsGVmnVH5gds%3D&refcode2=body_link2]
Thanks for all you do,
Priscilla Ferebee
(Jazz’s mom)
Jazz Lewis [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Jazz-Lewis-Portrait.png]
Jazz Lewis is an effective progressive leader running for the Democratic nomination in Maryland’s 4th Congressional District. A champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to health care access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. Jazz would be the youngest African-American ever elected to represent Maryland in Congress. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.

A champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to health care access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. Jazz would be the youngest African-American ever elected to represent Maryland in Congress. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son. CONTRIBUTE » [] Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis Friends of Jazz Lewis P.O. Box 7449 Largo, MD 20792 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

Hey, Peter! To win this race and send a champion for families to Congress, we know what we have to do: **Reach every voter we possibly can, especially the ones who never voted or been included in our civic process.** Every person in CO-08 has issues important to their families and challenges that we can fix together, and it’s our job to make sure they can all have their voices heard. But these efforts cost money and time, which is why we’re asking for your help. _There are 462,268 registered voters in CO-08. We have to start building up our field program NOW so that we can hire organizers, set up events, and door knock. We need to raise $15,000 by the end of this month to lay that foundation so that we can reach every voter in CO-08 ahead of the election._ [**Can Dr. Caraveo count on your help to reach every voter?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42274929/332334704/355891186?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220226eom3rs_TC_allop_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWQwZjBmYS0yNDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q_yPzQNZSu4gRCWOfuLnXAbVTwoKAnWPaGrC51C7wLg=) | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42274930/332334705/355891186?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220226eom3rs_TC_allop_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWQwZjBmYS0yNDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q_yPzQNZSu4gRCWOfuLnXAbVTwoKAnWPaGrC51C7wLg=)

**This campaign is not going to leave our community behind.** You _cannot_ expect to win in CO-08 if you disregard long-ignored communities which are so vital to the future of this state — in CO-08, that’s the Latino community, which has suffered some of the worst voter suppression and intimidation efforts both here and across the country.
When she ran for state representative the first time, Dr. Caraveo vividly remembers seeing Latino voters bring their young children to the polls — so that the children could translate English-only ballots for their parents. In response to this insidious form of voter suppression, Dr. Caraveo championed legislation in her first term to expand access to multilingual ballots.
**We’re going to fight with everything we’ve got to make sure ALL voters in CO-08 have the information they need to cast their ballot, an effort that’s more important than ever at a time when extremists are trying to exclude us from making our voices heard.[Can you pitch in to fuel our critical field operations today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42274931/332334706/355891186?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220226eom3rs_TC_allop_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWQwZjBmYS0yNDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q_yPzQNZSu4gRCWOfuLnXAbVTwoKAnWPaGrC51C7wLg=)**

body:
We have the momentum.
#
Beto is gaining on Greg Abbott in the polls. **This is a single digit race!**
Greg Abbott: 52%
Beto O'Rourke: 45% _The Hill/Emerson College Polling_
---
**Beto can win this race.** We’re closing the gap on Greg Abbott in the polls – but we need the resources to continue to spread the word about Beto’s positive vision for the state of Texas. That’s especially true because Greg Abbott’s campaign has more than $50 million in the bank to spend against us.
In order to continue gaining in the polls, we need a serious influx of grassroots contributions before our end of month deadline on Monday.
**[Please contribute $3 right now to help us reach our fundraising goals before the end of the month. Beto for Texas

I’m getting nervous, folks. Here’s why:
1. Donald Trump’s Republicans are targeting me. They’re going to spend whatever it takes to defeat me...
2. Republicans only need to flip a handful of seats to steal our majority.
3. If we lose our Democratic Majority... Joe Biden’s presidency will basically be OVER.

[We can’t afford to lose this race. **And we absolutely CANNOT afford to lose our House Majority.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE0Vd8nKqW85ZXV9rlZ14r6U2SzCr8BA5xnSay9Y1SYIfmA4Ev6rkvoz1wRInjq1qE_yHxWmEcmjZJhF3fu7cDm0bOy7E84i0cU5IddBWaFuR8ztTxVyo79baYEDSTqnycBD2W35pvZ8sGSxig_n7DppE7cQ7IYT-Jk9gbD6I0zl1_OutfO_d7OeOcj3eIq4RzsS2kOhVJu9SimLgrM74umhUHA3IY-J97tQNiVAG5_49IPhUBZ65p-ET4jsbXhDHemsEXv8CG1-ahcUzfVPpuPT-ZWsBaWC_u1YEunXNsVpOdYezx908Olkm4dBYu9UokU4qFR_MV4JhL51A7vorkp5NTMLJtS5CrVTexWvg8ILULwxzWCtTLO5gVkRLX7lI_nZv6YcZoUVvbMCZhL0N0I3Gkst5HHs4gltd0I7lzNJ6uIqbJSha_oreCiYYBzYzt6_BX-QbG8mryjdZtUobxz6yVYHXSetS6VDEEk5biwtrA/3jw/DmL6VzhnTUqfF9yVtld5gA/h8/FoQeyhRnnfGT_H_F2nqXh-rIFOKdC8UUV6p1Lk-jQE8)

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: need to know where you stand (re: USPS)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
| | After _years_ of Trump ally Postmaster General Louis DeJoy sabotaging the U.S. Postal Service, I need to know where you stand.

**I'm looking for another 79 responses by midnight, and yours is missing. Please let me know now:**
---
**Should Trump ally Postmaster General Louis DeJoy be fired?**
---
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42284271/332379185/621307485?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1643-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTc2ZGEyNS01MDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MXfbD1onAotgUFGn-WhnizR2biU07RgCHE5FIwb8Hp8=&emci=983c4de1-0f95-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=d976da25-5097-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=3800590)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42284272/332379186/621307485?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1643-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTc2ZGEyNS01MDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MXfbD1onAotgUFGn-WhnizR2biU07RgCHE5FIwb8Hp8=&emci=983c4de1-0f95-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=d976da25-5097-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=3800590)
---
Friend: **Even though Donald Trump is out of office, his postmaster general, Louis DeJoy, is still working to sabotage the U.S. Postal Service.**
This vital federal institution is a lifeline for countless families across the country. But under DeJoy's leadership, postage prices have increased. Delivery times have slowed for crucial mail deliveries of things like prescription drugs. And he's threatened the American people's ability to vote by mail and have confidence their ballots will be counted.
Before the 2020 election, I grilled Louis DeJoy in a Senate hearing to hold him accountable for his efforts to run the postal service into the ground – and I promise I won't let up in this fight to save the USPS now. But friend, I need to know if you're standing with me.
**I'm still looking to hear from another 79 members of this grassroots team before tonight's midnight deadline, and I'm counting on your response. Please take just a moment now to let me know:**
**Should Trump ally Postmaster General Louis DeJoy be fired?**
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42284273/332379187/621307485?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1643-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTc2ZGEyNS01MDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MXfbD1onAotgUFGn-WhnizR2biU07RgCHE5FIwb8Hp8=&emci=983c4de1-0f95-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=d976da25-5097-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=3800590)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42284274/332379188/621307485?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1643-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTc2ZGEyNS01MDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MXfbD1onAotgUFGn-WhnizR2biU07RgCHE5FIwb8Hp8=&emci=983c4de1-0f95-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=d976da25-5097-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=3800590)

Thank you so much for adding your voice in this crucial fight,

Jacky

I can’t think of a better message to send to the radical Left than for us to WIN the very first election of 2022 for Texas’ brand-new congressional seat on the very same day as Biden’s speech. | Peter,

In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to donate to our campaign for Congress. But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain why it’s so important.

Right now, we have a razor-thin majority in the House of Representatives, and we’re tied 50-50 in the Senate.

That means we can’t just hold seats, we also need to flip Republican seats to keep the House blue. **And the _Cook Political Report_ is rating New York’s 22nd Congressional District as the _single most flippable_ GOP-held seat in November.**

Peter, each month, our campaign sets fundraising goals to ensure we have the resources we need to flip this seat blue.

[_**And in just a couple of days, we’re closing the books on our February end-of-month deadline. We’ve set a goal of $10,000 to help us stay on track, and any amount you can contribute right now would make a huge difference. body:
Mark Holland is running for US Senate because Kansas and America deserve a strong, courageous leader who leads with faith, speaks the truth, and is willing to stand up to extremists across the political spectrum. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/87f9f23f-b395-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/a0abcd16-5397-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGFiY2QxNi01Mzk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qk7P6v9DjK_9y3N7ZkUmvnCNnQgRHB-sPtZJ_O9Mlkw=&id=103697760)

**AND YET:** In their latest political stunt, Mitch McConnell and his cronies (including Jerry Moran!) refuse to show up to work and vote on these critical nominees.

[These partisan stunts are exactly why I’m running. Jerry and Mitch and the rest of their buddies will stop at nothing to make a spectacle of our Democracy, and _always at the expense of the American public_. Please give to my campaign to bring integrity back to Washington, and put people over politics!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42284392/332379897/947907228?amount=10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_3MO_220226_1_2&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGFiY2QxNi01Mzk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qk7P6v9DjK_9y3N7ZkUmvnCNnQgRHB-sPtZJ_O9Mlkw=) | | [Donate Today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42284393/332379898/947907228?refcode=MH_EM_FR_3MO_220226_1_2&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGFiY2QxNi01Mzk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qk7P6v9DjK_9y3N7ZkUmvnCNnQgRHB-sPtZJ_O9Mlkw=)

In the Senate, my priority will always be the people of Kansas. My experience as Mayor of Kansas City prepared me to negotiate effective, bi-partisan solutions.

We need practical leadership in Washington. Kansas needs a level-headed leader who has our state’s best interest at heart, _and who won’t be absent to vote or waste precious time in bringing relief to American families with political acrobatics._

[I hope you can donate to my campaign today and help me bring practical and compassionate leadership to Congress!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42284394/332379899/947907228?amount=10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_3MO_220226_1_2&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGFiY2QxNi01Mzk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qk7P6v9DjK_9y3N7ZkUmvnCNnQgRHB-sPtZJ_O9Mlkw=) | [Donate Today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42284395/332379900/947907228?refcode=MH_EM_FR_3MO_220226_1_2&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGFiY2QxNi01Mzk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qk7P6v9DjK_9y3N7ZkUmvnCNnQgRHB-sPtZJ_O9Mlkw=)

clean_body: Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 26, 2022 | Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 26, 2022 Paxton's Patriots Suggested Social Media Post With Clip to Share: Post: Eva Guzman's woke agenda has no place in Texas. That's why Ken Paxton is spreading the word about her leadership of a "Critical Race Theory" style conference that pushed for bias training in the criminal justice system and even an app for kids to help them "recognize bias at a really young age." Link: Theme of the Day: Eva Guzman's Woke Agenda Has No Place In Texas In case you missed it, the Texas Attorney General's race, detailing Ken Paxton's new ad: ~ "Early voting is already underway in the Texas primaries, and state Attorney General Ken Paxton launched an ad on Friday calling out challenger Eva Guzman for taking part in the CRT-style “Beyond the Bench: Law, Justice, and Communities Summit” in 2016." ~ "The state courts’ website still has information about the CRT-style summit. The description of the event — “spearheaded” by the Supreme Court of Texas and the Texas Court of Appeals — includes credit to Guzman for organizing the summit." ~ "Following the summit, a “big ideas” summary was online. It included: Mandate training/education regarding cognitive/implicit bias for all stakeholders in the criminal justice system & Develop a childhood app that helps children to recognize bias at a really young age. They have pattern games. Why not something that changes how they group people, cultures, etc., on the common thread that isn’t an easily seen pattern but has a commonality." READ MORE FROM TOWNHALL: We encourage you to with your friends and followers on social media. Attorney General Paxton wakes up every day to fight for Texas and our core values, and sharing his efforts with your network will help ensure he can continue his fight on your behalf. Please encourage your friends and fellow patriots to and Paxton’s Patriots to receive these daily updates | | Pol. Adv. Paid for by the Ken Paxton Campaign Copyright © 2021 Ken Paxton Campaign.

clean_body: We need your help. | Peter, I’m reaching out on behalf of my husband because I know he’s worried about hitting our upcoming fundraising goal before the end-of-month deadline. Last night, he told me that we’re still $16,822 short with just three days left in February. I want to do everything possible to help him win this battleground race, so I decided to reach out to his top supporters to see if you’d be willing to make a special contribution to help us raise the remaining funds we need. You can understand that the constant stress of the campaign certainly takes its toll... But I know Juan better than anyone, and I know how deeply he cares about the people of Arizona. So, believe me when I say that he’ll NEVER stop fighting for YOU. He’s ready to go toe-to-toe with Nancy Pelosi and the Left’s multi-million war chest. He’s ready to endure wave after wave of vicious Democrat attack ads. And he’s ready to put in the countless hours and sleepless nights it will take to win this thing. That’s the kind of representative we need in Washington -- someone who will always fight for what’s right, no matter the adversity they face. And with Juan in Congress, that’s EXACTLY what you’ll get. Thank you, Laura Ciscomani PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

Friend,
---
It was an honor to speak at CPAC yesterday to an incredibly enthusiastic crowd of patriots who are ready to take back our country from the radical Left.
---
_But for 2022 to be a true success, we MUST flip critical battleground states like Wisconsin that will continue to determine the outcome of our presidential elections for years to come._
---

clean_body: Now let’s prove we have all the momentum in this key battleground state. | Friend, It was an honor to speak at CPAC yesterday to an incredibly enthusiastic crowd of patriots who are ready to take back our country from the radical Left. But for 2022 to be a true success, we MUST flip critical battleground states like Wisconsin that will continue to determine the outcome of our presidential elections for years to come. That’s why with the end-of month deadline just a few days away, I’m counting on YOUR help to hit our goal and win this 50-50 toss-up governor’s race. Now let’s prove the momentum is on our side after such a strong showing at CPAC with the largest SURGE of grassroots contributions of our entire campaign before Monday’s deadline. Friend, don’t forget that Joe Biden only sits in the White House today because a handful of battleground states went blue by razor thin margins in 2020. In fact, here in Wisconsin, Biden won by a mere 0.63% – a margin of roughly 20,000 votes in a state with a population of nearly 6 million. It’s no wonder the DGA is laser-focused on our race, propping up failed liberal governor Tony Evers who’s already sitting on a war chest of $10.5 MILLION in cash on hand. But with your support, we can fight back and surge ahead to TAKE THE LEAD in this 50-50 toss-up race. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

I knew taking on the Swamp would be tough – it’s a good thing that I don’t give up easily.

But the reality is, if we come up short of this goal, we’re going to lose the momentum we've gained. We simply can’t afford to let that happen.

Peter, I’m not running for Congress to gain power or start a career. I’m running to defend YOUR rights and protect the country that I love.

But I know that I cannot win this fight on my own. With just days to go until this critical deadline, I’m asking for your support.
