clean_body: | | | | The establishment is trying to push me out. | Peter, 2022 is the year for Alaska to get rid of traitor Lisa Murkowski and send a TRUE conservative to the United States Senate. But D.C. establishment RINOs are so power-hungry, they’re trying to buy their way to victory, just look at this headline... We only have 3 days left to make up that gap and ensure my campaign can keep up with her -- but as it stands, we’re still behind on our End-of-Month fundraising goal. I knew taking on the Swamp would be tough – it’s a good thing that I don’t give up easily. But the reality is, if we come up short of this goal, we’re going to lose the momentum we've gained. We simply can’t afford to let that happen. Peter, I’m not running for Congress to gain power or start a career. I’m running to defend YOUR rights and protect the country that I love. But I know that I cannot win this fight on my own. With just days to go until this critical deadline, I’m asking for your support. Thank you, | | Kelly Tshibaka Candidate for United States Senate FROM ALASKA. FOR ALASKA. ⭐️CONSERVATIVE⭐️PRO-LIFE⭐️PRO-2ND AMENDMENT | | | | =

name: Tom Winter
subject: Ryan Zinke was at Mar-a-Lago
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WINTER FOR MONTANA Winter for Montana
body:
Zinke’s growing list of right-wing supporters means we’ll have to work harder than ever | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953woiJTPNyd4kdozAt3MOqOkER6EhOxl7C27V4_Ptd8NsHpnwpuQv7oschKRnbby0ljjAf2iHZC1MkKOfh6pmXz8WbZUk6f4kEcQfga3DG3NUXD59_6UF7NS-y2LKW13VpICtZzcMiXIMWnG8erKB5NS1WdG4P60nGQrscQ29Mnipc2XdKOIHWWePclNARTGqZ7ox3H7vRmL-iZEGFijHbu-LQQTCxnRUu6w9gy-MND3CH2Vk_egcn0Ehwmir58_5XPlxHzVy-TIPHfTQAztogv2IaZedAoLfogTZqbiL-_qGapQW_uVM1-1qgFOzCFD1aT3EqeHgzo65vf8SYrE-jkHMFR95NX_wmyH-fyqSQY_t1SMEz2sVPYv5tm1BaCSWog/3jw/OFFk2I3uRTmsw6AhQi_AKA/h0/Be-10u9iCKClm-rBpcLfPwYMY0bmSURuulJu5fjFUpQ) Friend,

In case you thought Ryan Zinke’s past as one of the most corrupt members of the Trump administration was behind him, get this: Zinke went to ground zero for Trump corruption this week, Mar-a-Lago, to raise money to spend attacking us.

But we’re fighting, and we’re already making progress before we even get to Congress.

Members of this community who signed onto our petition pushing for a ban on members of Congress trading individual stocks have contributed to a rising wave of support across the country. **Seriously****.** News outlets ran headlines this month like ‘Stock Trading Ban in Congress Gains Momentum’ and everything.

But in order to keep building our own momentum and fend off the attacks from Zinke’s right-wing billionaire and corporate donors, we need grassroots supporters like you to help keep us on track.

_**[As our campaign is facing our $10,000 February fundraising goal, I’m humbly asking you to make a grassroots donation of $5 right away. Will you step up?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x9CPkL9sJQqk_rjly8_08wifA3oSdDYoJGsn7ncVJ0OuQh4J4AmeeegdfpIKJnZB9XA4n96CSgeemTjOaKaBPWnqNTlvIA_30zskCQUt24j1ji9pxW_p_8OxN-XHxjoEA5SC1pPuDiU-ZngBcBCOBfPgaZj2HHZ1vUYsUxq84EboQw8-ODwqB6yIGijaUZ-1isr8yZjeJXKvG1zZNbHYbNlKaQKdZ-bnv3BfBsyd7UdlpctHUk_iKYl2B3m6CT4yVvjBSuPoWbZsNjLvv9p0cic1LxAFVuRRieIJ-YeF6QdHSQTud0QvfPqcBMtJhh6RGLtGpFhbPIdS19pu9IwzzuVFppd8OnnUlMl3vDY0E78j_sT0j2a9EIb44uRQLeSkg/3jw/OFFk2I3uRTmsw6AhQi_AKA/h1/7Ra9fy3eQMKXW3O7kb6AV_Tde6AwA9rOxXHCImFxSvs)
**_
The more precarious life gets for everyday Montanans, and the harder it gets to afford necessities like housing and medical care, the more Zinke seems to suck up to the out of state billionaires doing the harm and the more he seems to find ways to enrich himself.

I’m a Montanan, first and foremost. Montana made me who I am — and I know how challenging it can be for so many of us to make our living and our lives here. Zinke might have less fun serving in Congress if he’s banned from trading stocks, but I don’t even own any (true story).

Together we’re going to bring back the Montana where we make our own lives. I have the campaign experience winning a pro-Trump legislative district to win this race, and I have the experience getting results in the legislature to make real things happen. Heck, we’re already seeing it.

**I’m earning the trust of voters every single day and at every single campaign stop we make — but we have to keep building this momentum if we’re going to stop Zinke and his corrupt pals.**

_**[So please, add a donation right away to our campaign to help us reach our $10,000 February grassroots fundraising goal before the deadline Monday!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x9CPkL9sJQqk_rjly8_08wifA3oSdDYoJGsn7ncVJ0OuQh4J4AmeeegdfpIKJnZB9XA4n96CSgeemTjOaKaBPWbjQ1TNXqqIRd637xbfOajTEd3b5gY1YjkRXjnA61ENTtbWVqxMp48p_kRloaTQHCtw2N_K4YjfdEdlWoLwXno8JDIVDGoFfeK1CxdLXmCC3muQlNDf98Pv7tNLN-2Zj4_-hZm47_d7cvFhgdZJkaFUcL_E-8WSbCyfiLkOq7O8V21FYra5BzzAbFAPdMopHg0iQOjHi34zLeseIGel_dRV2MFlojPt9L4N3mLi91y4RjX0O4P6Mi-0OQ23i8xHLu4or-YooxsN6aLeV5GdTQ9clspKNrHEch1QRmxcAx6-g/3jw/OFFk2I3uRTmsw6AhQi_AKA/h2/wGb4i0AXLHyfPfuKXDe-aGxgnyhRtAM1sMvCDnPco78)**_

Working people built Montana, but now it’s become a playground for the rich — people like Zinke and his buddies. But we can get it back if we work together.

Thank you,
Tom PAID FOR BY WINTER FOR MONTANA Winter for Montana
PO Box 1592
Polson, MT
59860
---
| | Sent via [ActionNetwork.org](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/O93kI8o-kT9cRvZ9zJLPP860qXFcvweDHZkUEJZuK-c/3jw/OFFk2I3uRTmsw6AhQi_AKA/h3/_a1aWmgaloDnVB76N08MrIXZVmSBISrwVUtZ6MPfI-M). name: Nikki Haley
subject: Running 👟
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
After I left the UN, I took up running.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3l0ns--fgxr-4qqlpo1&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Fellow Conservative,

After I left the UN, I took up running.

I played sports growing up, but I had never been an active runner. The idea of committing to something without knowing if I’d be any good at it was, to be honest, more than a little scary.

**But one of the most important things we can do in life is to push through the fear.** **[When I ran for the state legislature, when I ran for governor, when I came to the United Nations—I always made sure I never got too comfortable.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3l0ns-20czf-4qqlpo8/ "When I ran for the state legislature, when I ran for governor, when I came to the United Nations—I always made sure I never got too comfortable. ") **

So I laced up my shoes, put my music on (Joan Jett, of course) and put one foot in front of the other. I worked hard and I pushed myself.

Last December, I finished my first half-marathon—something I never thought I could do two years ago.

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3l0ns-20czg-4qqlpo9/)
---

**Running a half-marathon was a huge challenge.** So was running for state legislature and for governor. But they were important races to run.

**[As we look at the next election, it can be daunting.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3l0ns-20czh-4qqlpo0/ "As we look at the next election, it can be daunting.")** This year Republicans have a huge opportunity to take back the House, the Senate, and win statewide races across the country.

But just like running a half-marathon, it will take work. Some days will be difficult. The Democrats will launch attacks against Republicans to try and divide our party. Liberal billionaires will push millions of dollars into key battleground states to try and prevent us from winning in November.

This election year will not be easy. But it will be filled with races that we must win.

When it comes to running a race, it’s also important to remember that you can’t just wake up one day and magically expect to run 13.1 miles. You have to build up stamina and strength step by step and mile by mile. You have to put in work each day to make it to the finish line.

**That’s the same with this year’s election.** _**[We can’t just wake up on November 8 and expect to win. We have to put in the work each and every day to gear up for victory.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3l0ns-20czi-4qqlpo1/ "We can’t just wake up on November 8 and expect to win. We have to put in the work each and every day to gear up for victory. ")**_

That’s why Stand For America PAC isn’t waiting until the fall to hit the ground running. My team started laying the groundwork for victory over a year ago. We’ve trained, endorsed, advised, and financially supported dozens of strong conservatives. We helped Glenn Youngkin and Jason Miyares cross the finish line in Virginia and helped Jack Ciattarelli pull off a near-upset in New Jersey.

But our work is far from done. We must keep up the momentum that we gained over the past year and continue to build our movement one person at a time.

**[ I hope you will be one of the people who steps up today to keep our movement strong and help conservative candidates cross the finish line.

If you would like to help us continue our momentum going into the 2022 election, I’m asking you to donate a special gift of $1, $35, $50, $100, $500, or more today.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3l0ns-20czj-4qqlpo2/ "I hope you will be one of the people who steps up today to keep our movement strong and help conservative candidates cross the finish line.If you would like to help us continue our momentum going into the 2022 election, I’m asking you to donate a special gift of $1, $35, $50, $100, $500, or more today. ")**

Thank you in advance for your generous contribution.

My very best,

Nikki R. Haley

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3l0ns-20czk-4qqlpo3/)
---
| | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3l0ns-20czl-4qqlpo4/ "Nikki Haley Image")
---
_**EXCLUSIVE MESSAGE FROM NIKKI HALEY:**_

I’m focused on helping Republicans win the next election and I want YOU to play an important part. This is a great opportunity to support political leaders who believe America is inherently good, and who understand that the Democrats' far-left policies undermine our freedoms and American values.

Please help me fight back against the Democrats and their radical agenda. We can only defeat them if we stand united.

**[Will you join my team today?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3l0ns-20czm-4qqlpo5/ "Will you join my team today?")**

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Consistency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Basically, the momentum of our campaign is about to become public.
#
Derek,
Our team is coming to you today to ask if you'll please kick in **[your first-ever $5 donation to help our campaign raise $100,000 before our February fundraising deadline on Monday night and flip this Pennsylvania Senate seat.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44951?refcode=em20220226-4755&t=1&akid=4755%2E434096%2EpUlJFh)**
That said, we think we owe you an explanation. Some context, if you will:
Every fiscal quarter, campaigns like ours are legally required to report out all our latest fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission. **Basically, the momentum of our campaign becomes public information.**
So, as you might expect, reporters will be scouring these numbers — as will our opponents and the super PACs that support them. But now that we’re just months away from the primary, they won’t just be looking at if we hit our end-of-quarter goal, but how we performed against all of our fundraising goals this quarter.
**Derek, not only do we need to *look* like a strong campaign — we really need to show consistency, so our opponents know we’re the real deal.**
**[We've still got a ways to go so, if you can afford it, I am asking you to please make a $5 donation directly to our campaign before Monday’s deadline to help reach our February goal.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44951?refcode=em20220226-4755&t=2&akid=4755%2E434096%2EpUlJFh)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44951?amount=5&refcode=em20220226-4755&t=21&akid=4755%2E434096%2EpUlJFh)**
__
It's not lost on us that you get a lot of requests from our team. 😂
We know they can sometimes start to pile up (trust us, we get them all too!).
But the reality is that, if we want to continue being *the* winning grassroots campaign in a crowded race for the #1 Most Likely to Flip Senate seat of 2022, then we MUST raise as much money as possible each and every day leading up to our primary election.
Don’t get us wrong: **We absolutely have the team out there to make this happen.** We're doing this the right way, no corporate PACs allowed. Just working people from Cresco and all across Pennsylvania.
**The only way we can win is with lots of online donations — big or small — from people like you.[We’ve gotta ask: Will you donate your first $5 ahead of this Monday’s February fundraising deadline to help us hit our $100,000 goal? It'd really make all the difference in this fight.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44951?refcode=em20220226-4755&t=22&akid=4755%2E434096%2EpUlJFh)**
Thank you for everything. We appreciate each and every one of you.
— Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220226-4755-footer&t=23&refcode2=4755_434096_pUlJFh&akid=4755%2E434096%2EpUlJFh)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=4755%2E434096%2EpUlJFh)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=4755%2E434096%2EpUlJFh)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: We need you on the team.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s crucial that you’re on Team Herschel today. Can we count on your personal endorsement? It's crucial that you're on Team Herschel today. Can we count on your personal endorsement? | [](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=18d8605611704d7b9119522ca3e42d7c&_e=gOYjMGOTi9656Th1Gc8Z7cCKxfUbmzsWSpF332hu0Oxvw682lS0cfWe0lD2ddi4HZk5QJNErvwCCQIOAIYiZfE1uw8bBuoIlNYS8qOMirCwZSzzSNupq0SFpjH-r3Lvn7MWotvuwQgyJOHHTiAhEJAwRlEURFRWLYu-hhbE5VDyEyNxs1_iGSgM4vTxHkdOs2x_BE0bVPMc1SuEG6md6jd6aLSim2UlNvfAaPT1sP2d6b0MZB8jygGYDZWdE1GK94vAgknhtFr9TH-ZJuc97QKLkpRwuSC2AMg-7yhk1UlgOepjajdgx6fPsttDeg4sRaWLpFNBI9lDgZFuUxNwHj8HrMe3TapAuCNg29PPTmVve8bv1njNiWWAACWz4gGMMUv8VKbu2KqjSz1fF1LhxklCBXprY6nRoGFmQ6qvxnRd9shBpgalwOU1zQpSUK4AUDvR2yD2w-hDW_GM7LMaoHiRXV8jSBOOmfmykUHftV6cSlP4Pf-L9c0Ce1LGT4yEl3_8YybrFY5gFNSHk3KS6sOSjFxLeR7GJYCyAU_rxaoQiZrF4XUvFWEqPL4WpW-en)
---
Fellow American,

We've been in the race for the United States Senate for six months, and all signs point to this being the race to watch in the November elections. Polling shows it's already a dead heat.

The race for the Senate seat here in Georgia - which will determine the balance of power in Washington - is no slam dunk for either party. That's why we're working on gathering the endorsements of conservatives all over America.

President Trump was my very first supporter in this race, and he offered an endorsement any candidate would be honored to receive. When I announced my intent to enter this race, President Trump wrote:

| _**"Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down."**_
---

Since President Trump endorsed our campaign, we've been blessed to receive multiple endorsements from other Republican leaders including:

clean_body: It’s crucial that you’re on Team Herschel today. Can we count on your personal endorsement? It's crucial that you're on Team Herschel today. Can we count on your personal endorsement? | Fellow American, We've been in the race for the United States Senate for six months, and all signs point to this being the race to watch in the November elections. Polling shows it's already a dead heat. The race for the Senate seat here in Georgia - which will determine the balance of power in Washington - is no slam dunk for either party. That's why we're working on gathering the endorsements of conservatives all over America. President Trump was my very first supporter in this race, and he offered an endorsement any candidate would be honored to receive. When I announced my intent to enter this race, President Trump wrote: | "Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down." Since President Trump endorsed our campaign, we've been blessed to receive multiple endorsements from other Republican leaders including: We're thankful for the support from Republican public officials, but we won't get anywhere without CONSERVATIVE PATRIOTS like you on our side. I'm a team player - always have been, and we need you on our team. I believe in strong conservative values. I believe in smaller government, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL AMERICANS - regardless of income level, race, or religion - can pursue their dreams. While my opponent may have the support of Hollywood and national Democrats, we're building a grassroots army of PATRIOTS from around the country. Your endorsement will benefit our campaign as we work to flip Georgia's Senate seat RED and restore some sanity to Washington. name: Juan Rodriguez
subject: A look from the ground
body:
Hey Peter, this is Juan — John’s campaign manager.

Since we’re so close to the primary (I can’t believe we’re only a few days away), I wanted to reach out with an update from the ground.

Before we get into the update, will you make a donation now to help us make this final push for John? With only one weekend left until election day on March 1st, our team still has a lot of work to do and we need your support to carry us through. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220226?refcode=em20220226]

Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220226?refcode=em20220226]

As someone who has been working on the ground in this campaign for months, I am so excited about the energy we have been seeing around John’s campaign. Our team has been hard at work throughout this race. We have been talking to and meeting voters across the district about John and his vision for the future.

Peter, we’ve been seeing a lot of excitement and energy around John’s vision — because for John y’all means all and his vision includes Texans from all walks of life.

Seeing this response to our campaign has been incredible — but with just a few days left before the primary, there is still a lot of work to be done. This weekend is going to be critical to our success.

We need to seize this opportunity to give it our all in the final push — then it’s on to the general election!

I’ll be honest, I am incredibly hopeful that we will see John as our nominee after the primary is over. But I know that for that to happen, we need to push as hard as we possibly can this weekend — reaching out to more voters, making sure they know where to vote, and spreading that excitement about John across TX-23.

It’s time for us to do all we can to ensure we can bring our vision of a better future for Texas into reality. Chip in whatever you can right now to power us through this critical, final weekend before the primary. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220226?refcode=em2022026]

Let’s get to work,

Juan Rodriguez

Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220226?refcode=em20220223\6]https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress [https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress] https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress [https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress]

John Lira for Congress
1721 WW White Rd, Suite 120
#8096
San Antonio, TX 78220
United States

clean_body: | | | Peter, I just stepped off the debate stage. Wow. What a rush. We talked about a lot of important things tonight, but I think the distinction was clear – only ONE candidate had the ideas and the fortitude to fight back and WIN against the chaos we’re seeing under the Biden regime. From Ukraine to inflation to unconstitutional mandates restricting our medical freedom – I will continue to lead, fight and most importantly WIN on the issues that matter to North Carolinians. Chip in $5 or more right now to sustain my fight for common sense conservative values. It’ll be close – which is why I am counting on the support of every single North Carolina conservative to chip in so we can WIN. Thanks for your support, Mark Walker id:2022-02-17-13:39:17:190t | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Walker4NC | |

Ed Thelander - Ready to Lead and Share his Plan for Maine and America | | | | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9778aa155e88/ed-thelander-what-do-you-want-to-know-8821401?e=f8a0a76a2b)

| | | | | |
## Dinner at Dimillo’s on the Water
### Fundraiser with Ed Thelander
---
| | | | | |
### March 26th ~ Saturday
### 5:00-6:00 - Sponsors Hour
### 6:00-8:00 ~ Ticket holders
Ticket Holders - Limited25 Long Wharf, Portland, Maine**Don’t Miss the Boat!** Get onboard the ship to victory with Ed Thelander, candidate for Maine Congressional District 1. Join Ed at Portland’s DiMillo’s on the Water, a historic restaurant and function facility and the only floating restaurant on the upper East Coast. Ed looks forward to meeting you. He will provide a campaign update, answer questions, and lay out a plan to correct the global and political issues of concern to you. Enjoy the beautiful water views while you dine on a scrumptious buffet and cash bar at this special event.
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | | | | Join Ed Thelander in the Old Port for a night to remember, and a dinner to delight. This is an evening including an elegant dinner, and Ed’s agenda for correcting the issues _**currently happening**_ in Maine and the Country. There will be musical entertainment and perhaps a surprise celebrity guest. No hints!This is a limited seating event and tickets with be sold on a first - come, first-served basis.
---
| | | | | | | [Purchase DiMillo Tickets Here and Sponsor Information](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=6c432e1f08&e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
| | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | Admiral’s Buffet _(No need to make decisions, have something of everything)_ Sicilian Citrus ScallopPineland Farms Prime Grade Tri Tip (Carved at Table)Roma Chicken with Havarti & roasted tomato cheese sauceTruffled Lobster & Corn Mascarpone RigatoniShrimp & GritsMashed Potato Bar _with all the fixings_ Commercial Street SaladChef’s VegetableItalian BreadAssorted DessertsCoffee, Tea or SodaCash Bar $250.00 per personEd Thelander is a United States Navy veteran. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not constitute or imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
Paid for and authorized by The Committee to Elect Ed Thelander for Congress, Inc.

name: Patty Murray
subject: We need to send a message to the GOP
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Every day in the other Washington, I’m fighting to pass legislation that lowers the cost of child care for families, defends the right to abortion, and builds an economy that works for everyone.
#
Peter,
The election this November is going to have real implications for our communities here in Washington state. As we know, Mitch McConnell’s GOP is promising to dismantle all the progress we’ve made and toss the concerns of working families and communities to the wayside.
Now, reports are coming out that Republicans are emboldened and targeting more races – even this Senate seat in Washington state.
**[I set an end-of-month $15,000 fundraising goal to send the extreme Republicans coming after our progress one simple message: we’re not backing down. Rush in $5 to help us meet this critical fundraising goal and deliver the message that we’re in this to win it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42285978/332386485/-482470080?refcode=pm_em_220226_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzAyYjBjOS01ZDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MKzmr8SIb73S4lnmR9CeY-R0xmbIs-JHC9eW-rrS4vs=)**
Every day in the other Washington, I’m fighting to pass legislation that lowers the cost of child care for families, defends the right to abortion, and builds an economy that works for everyone. To build on our progress, we need to defend – and expand – our Democratic majority.
But Mitch McConnell and the corporate interests that are backing Republican campaigns in states across the country are dead-set on clawing back the majority and halting our progress.
**I need you on this team, Peter. It’s the only way we can fight back against the corporate interests and ultraconservative views that are targeting Washington state and promising to stand in the way of helping working families.**
**[A contribution of $5, or whatever you can spare, will help us keep Washington state blue and defend our Democratic majority in the Senate. With so much on the line, we can’t afford to fall behind.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42285979/332386486/-482470080?refcode=pm_em_220226_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzAyYjBjOS01ZDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MKzmr8SIb73S4lnmR9CeY-R0xmbIs-JHC9eW-rrS4vs=)**
Thank you,
Patty
** **

****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42285980/332386487/-482470080?refcode=pm_em_220226_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzAyYjBjOS01ZDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MKzmr8SIb73S4lnmR9CeY-R0xmbIs-JHC9eW-rrS4vs=)****

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**

body:
Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson will be an excellent Supreme Court justice.
Here’s where we are.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42286070/332386809/1627587959?refcode=em_pet_220226scotus_n_tlbr_actives_6_ng_na_na_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWQ1YzYxZC01ZTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B2utiKIxzQzzyeaVtSzfa4xzerQsgO7LEXyZJvDaijg=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42286071/332386810/1627587959?refcode=em_pet_220226scotus_n_tlbr_actives_6_ng_na_na_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWQ1YzYxZC01ZTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B2utiKIxzQzzyeaVtSzfa4xzerQsgO7LEXyZJvDaijg=) President Biden fulfilled his promise and made history yesterday by nominating Ketanji Brown Jackson to be the first Black woman _ever_ on the Supreme Court.

LBR was in the audience at the presidential debate two years ago when Biden made this pledge. She felt incredible pride then, and she feels incredible pride now.

_**The work that we all did in 2020 to elect our 46th President has mattered, and Judge Jackson's nomination is a powerful reminder of why.**_

Our Supreme Court is going to look more like America now. Judge Jackson will bring an important perspective as a former public defender, as someone with family in law enforcement and family that has experienced our carceral system, and as someone who worked her way up from humble beginnings.

She will prioritize equity and justice in all her decisions. And we can't wait to see her make her mark on the highest court in the land!

We want to show our support for Judge Jackson, and our appreciation for Biden keeping his promise. **[So if you have a moment, add your name to thank President Biden for his history-making Supreme Court nomination!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42286072/332386811/1893461739?refcode=em_pet_220226scotus_n_tlbr_actives_6_ng_na_na_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWQ1YzYxZC01ZTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B2utiKIxzQzzyeaVtSzfa4xzerQsgO7LEXyZJvDaijg=)** | | **[Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42286073/332386812/1893461739?refcode=em_pet_220226scotus_n_tlbr_actives_6_ng_na_na_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWQ1YzYxZC01ZTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B2utiKIxzQzzyeaVtSzfa4xzerQsgO7LEXyZJvDaijg=)**

body:
| | | Did you see the promising news, friend? This week, a federal court upheld a decision blocking South Carolina’s six-week abortion ban. The decision is a welcome relief amidst unrelenting attacks on reproductive rights in our state waged by the GOP. But it doesn’t mark the end of our fight. **We need a governor who’s not afraid to stand up to far-right attacks against the right to reproductive care.** Mia is the one candidate in this race with the courage and experience to take on Henry McMaster’s backwards agenda, protect reproductive freedom, and lead us forward. Can we count on you to join our fight? **[Chip in before our February deadline expires to help us send a reproductive rights champion to the governor’s office. name: John Cranley
subject: I just have to get this off my chest, friend.

body:
| Aren’t you, too? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42280021/332356909/817536172?amount=25&refcode=ea.3b7c544e-3697-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.3b7c544e-3697-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjdjNTQ0ZS0zNjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ocFKlA8faeBPtqLtfTfeU5ZXn-UhNP88z5nou9wPUY=) I have to get this off my chest. **I'm sick and tired of Ohio being known as a hotspot of political corruption.** I say that because we used to lead the nation in manufacturing. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Republicans are breaking the bank to flip NH red
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
With the Senate split 50-50, this seat is the GOP's top target
| | | Friend – this is a longer email, but I hope you'll read it.
---
Republicans are breaking the bank to flip this New Hampshire Senate seat. Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies have already spent more than $7.5 million to defeat me. That's more than they've spent against any other Senate Democrat this election cycle.
**But this is just the beginning. **
**Political experts just labeled my seat as a toss-up** , inviting even more dark money into the Granite State. Republican megadonors and dark money super PACs are lining up to spend tens of millions on attack ads as part of their plan to take back the Senate.
If I'm going to protect this seat, it will take all of us working together. _[ **That's why I need you to chip in $5 or whatever you can before our end-of-month deadline.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42286824/332391821/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk722-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTcyYTFlNC02MDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sc6lQe8HhXsXAtF_Z-oZdkB64g2SYGWkFdtwl_9xm4Y=)_
You're one of my top supporters, friend. Grassroots donors like you keep this campaign running, and I'm thankful to have you on my team, especially now.
Republicans haven't forgotten that I won my last Senate race by 1,017 votes. They've seen the polls showing this race statistically tied. They've seen the headlines calling me one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats. And they know that _CNN_ reported that this toss-up seat is one of the most likely to flip in November. **With the Senate split 50-50, this seat is the GOP's top target.**
If Mitch McConnell takes back the Senate, he will block critical legislation on health care, climate change, reproductive rights, and more. And as Majority Leader, he would block any of President Biden’s Supreme Court nominees. With the Supreme Court already on the precipice of overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , that's not a chance we can afford to take.
That's why I'm reaching out to my top supporters to ask if you can help us protect this seat and our vulnerable Senate majority by donating today. _[ **Whatever you give makes a big difference in a race this important.** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42286825/332391822/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk722-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTcyYTFlNC02MDk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sc6lQe8HhXsXAtF_Z-oZdkB64g2SYGWkFdtwl_9xm4Y=) _

name: Team Booker
subject: A request for you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Can we make a request,
Peter?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16766?refcode=em20220226-1605&t=1001&akid=1605%2E346206%2EknRI-z ]Would you please donate $5 to our campaign before the
day's up? We're currently three days away from our end-of-month
fundraising goal, and we could use your support to reach our $50,000 goal.
Chip in now.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16766?refcode=em20220226-1605&t=1002&akid=1605%2E346206%2EknRI-z ]Thermometer of goal

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16766?refcode=em20220226-1605&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1605%2E346206%2EknRI-z ]Contribute $5

Here's the deal,
Peter:

There are a lot of cynics out there talking about our race. Saying that
there's no chance of a Black man winning a Senate race in our
Commonwealth. That Kentucky is too “red”.

But we're not listening to the naysayers. We're choosing to unite
together, to beat Rand Paul and to shock the world.

Right now, we're building the statewide coalition we need to win. We're
building up our organizing efforts, talking to people all across our
Commonwealth by going to their communities, and so much more.

That's why we've set an ambitious goal to raise $50,000. Because this
personal, on-the-ground organizing doesn't come cheap, but we know how
critical it is to win.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16766?refcode=em20220226-1605&t=1022&akid=1605%2E346206%2EknRI-z ]We're off to a strong start, but we need your support to continue
strengthening and growing our statewide coalition over the next months.
Please, chip in $5 or whatever you can afford — and let's
shock the world together.

In solidarity,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220226-1605-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1605_346206_knRI-z&akid=1605%2E346206%2EknRI-z

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1605%2E346206%2EknRI-z

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: I’m counting on YOU
disclaimer_text: paid for by the same liberal special interests that put Biden in office
body:
This was a tough month for America. You may have noticed that prices at the grocery store and gas pump are higher now than they used to be – a LOT.... I can’t lie, Peter... This was a tough month for America. You may have noticed that prices at the grocery store and gas pump are higher now than they used to be – _a LOT higher. _ That’s all because the Biden Administration’s disastrous economic policies have caused the **worst inflation our country has seen since 1982. ** **What’s worse, Biden’s terrible energy policies have also weakened our national security.** America was energy independent when Biden took office. Not anymore. Biden has crippled American energy and just this week halted new drilling permits. We now import 595,000 barrels of oil per day from Russia. Oil that could have come from our own domestic fields and pipelines. **Instead, our backwards policies are funding Russian military aggression.** These policies threaten our national and economic security, they sacrifice New Mexico jobs, and they raise prices on New Mexico families. Where’s the Governor been through it all? **MLG has been missing in action, standing by as the Biden Administration has taken this dangerous and damaging course. ** Energy independence is a national imperative, and there’s no other state in America as well-positioned to lead on energy development than New Mexico. We deserve a governor who isn’t afraid to stand up for what’s right for both our state and our country. I will do just that. [**STOP JOE BIDEN**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=73cdc32cb9e74cf9ad24c1d8f48736a0&_e=DMiELFagLo_TkhNaqVX6nFVmTR6LACPDzoVwGZFSrrN3mOaJyyLAO5jMUt6bkk-8Fx47UnnLSMw629G2gkxwGTfZJwGAP2UaZBP6zl__XplxcUPW2K--0i4f2zWO7jrDtl9o7gkDdYpqdc4mv0h7UtKxdGiTkXVvAzO_iW3OIY06rZut0CCozxTBWWMEeDiOIEjc7XmVEYnra1gScDzRX2QIW2UOv7RfyFi5F5opTR2s-wYWOXB2zwwSayUvPV6CMBlOdzjuIQZBRfuvrSC4VEseN4fNpRX14Tv_czukuyOwKzh2pK09Bt6FxDgPHBP6s_fY563nROmvgqW4e9FXehHT1Vz-m-ZyuYI4gWwdTlg-Ex8zCNnKwNynajVOJ97Iv5-bfhSPBoENbRCtHn1lUtlmAgmm_L9DzpKCnX5mg3kNkMciJQIi648BPyf-ha28gPW5AV08DaIuWFkbZWzBCRfVqh5Zy-5WsfLImqb6oJeKVyOEepv5xk7R1peRTgxP34XBnwhCFJrQssDbdWz-SA%3D%3D) Unfortunately, our state’s leaders refuse to stand up to Biden and his failed policies. They’re bought and paid for by the same liberal special interests that put Biden in office. It’s become crystal clear that our Governor puts leftwing politics ahead of New Mexico. And it’s time for that stop. Our families deserve better. They deserve a governor who’s on their side and will actually work to serve their best interests, which is exactly why I’m running to help get things back on track here in New Mexico and across America. **With February coming to a close, it’s time for us to dig deep and get ready to make a big push forward for our campaign. ** [**Chip in $10 now to help us meet our end of month goal.**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=73cdc32cb9e74cf9ad24c1d8f48736a0&_e=DMiELFagLo_TkhNaqVX6nFVmTR6LACPDzoVwGZFSrrN3mOaJyyLAO5jMUt6bkk-8Fx47UnnLSMw629G2gkxwGTfZJwGAP2UaZBP6zl__XplxcUPW2K--0i4f2zWO7jrDtl9o7gkDdYpqdc4mv0h7UtKxdGiTkXVvAzO_iW3OIY06rZut0CCozxTBWWMEeDiOIEjc7XmVEYnra1gScDzRX2QIW2UOv7RfyFi5F5opTR2s-wYWOXB2zwwSayUvPV6CMBlOdzjuIQZBRfuvrSC4VEseN4fNpRX14Tv_czukuyOwKzh2pK09Bt6FxDgPHBP6Pam65-_q8FXxqaHlTAMnfdlv_Vx7p_HnhbRnQnv2YkqqfUENBEyaKWdBthmzN12Zn1XyLcUL1Q9Jj0IaRUAhj2DlKgiTfpve7wy2XZexBpEEIM_Y4MtEN48twCpf3RWqT8TO3Iay735lqB0SGpULmVHd2Owz9CI8WKoTtAaMKLeCmsApzx97e71lXYg0XQTDeNCA-ixgi-TrSMmClfGIcQ%3D%3D) There’s a lot on the line over the next few months. We need to do everything we can to fight back against the Left’s radical agenda. Will you join our team and help support our efforts? [**CHIP IN NOW**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=73cdc32cb9e74cf9ad24c1d8f48736a0&_e=DMiELFagLo_TkhNaqVX6nFVmTR6LACPDzoVwGZFSrrN3mOaJyyLAO5jMUt6bkk-8Fx47UnnLSMw629G2gkxwGTfZJwGAP2UaZBP6zl__XplxcUPW2K--0i4f2zWO7jrDtl9o7gkDdYpqdc4mv0h7UtKxdGiTkXVvAzO_iW3OIY06rZut0CCozxTBWWMEeDiOIEjc7XmVEYnra1gScDzRX2QIW2UOv7RfyFi5F5opTR2s-wYWOXB2zwwSayUvPV6CMBlOdzjuIQZBRfuvrSC4VEseN4fNpRX14Tv_czukuyOwKzh2pK09Bt6FxDgPHBP6zdJs7bWcGxTkxUqepYeRkNnkdcutDHRnGO1Gt507qOV0lJjetZbU-vMxwGKSfeGJLzoSXTFNhTUuDuFcoNulWDRsWBzXLo054gl8FXuHYWvXE3c3-igYf1hXExtMxGl1Fi7pfu_coQyDaCx0dDPAEIDZJcJoGlc_GhdYklojWXEeqHa6Uzd6WECvZYg3xW8DFh6PkzXhKWg63oBfsMizdw%3D%3D) New Mexico can’t afford another four years of weak and misguided leadership. We need to get back in touch with our values and start prioritizing freedom and prosperity. I know that our team has what it takes to make it happen, but we’re going to need your help. [**Will you join us and help secure a better future for New Mexico by chipping in $10 before the end of the month?**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=73cdc32cb9e74cf9ad24c1d8f48736a0&_e=DMiELFagLo_TkhNaqVX6nFVmTR6LACPDzoVwGZFSrrN3mOaJyyLAO5jMUt6bkk-8Fx47UnnLSMw629G2gkxwGTfZJwGAP2UaZBP6zl__XplxcUPW2K--0i4f2zWO7jrDtl9o7gkDdYpqdc4mv0h7UtKxdGiTkXVvAzO_iW3OIY06rZut0CCozxTBWWMEeDiOIEjc7XmVEYnra1gScDzRX2QIW2UOv7RfyFi5F5opTR2s-wYWOXB2zwwSayUvPV6CMBlOdzjuIQZBRfuvrSC4VEseN4fNpRX14Tv_czukuyOwKzh2pK09Bt6FxDgPHBP6HPzYosOAmmFz4Po6i14QBz3BBTfgZbk0Vve_eTAZhbz_nCEiYjwNaq7ZdB2O8totLmHN4K5G-taUzSO2QtLc9MyryTKicT3-ennPZyWtqwHFpzpokJug9DYgFBK4I4odwYug3zfHSBBPRZnb3qDLR9MDqUTomanyMNK8LhSeC7gs2ZqU1y9JER1b7GH_aaEJtg09pis8-YC-qgKq8Nm47g%3D%3D) Thanks, Mark Ronchetti | |

With February coming to a close, it’s time for us to dig deep and get ready to make a big push forward for our campaign. There’s a lot on the line over the next few months. We need to do everything we can to fight back against the Left’s radical agenda. Will you join our team and help support our efforts? New Mexico can’t afford another four years of weak and misguided leadership. We need to get back in touch with our values and start prioritizing freedom and prosperity. I know that our team has what it takes to make it happen, but we’re going to need your help. Thanks, Mark Ronchetti | | | Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer. Please send checks to Mark Ronchetti for Governor. 8100 Wyoming Blvd. NE Ste - M4, Box 225 Albuquerque, NM 87113 Click to unsubscribe.

# Principles Above Politics
---
|
---
| |
We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.
It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept.

name: Charlie Crist for Governor
subject: Charlie is LEADING in every region of Florida!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
from the Panhandle to the Keys, Floridians are mobilizing behind this campaign |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42286905/332395589/1088989587?refcode=20220226_f_2_nd&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGMwMWE0Yy02Mjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gna4j9BfENiLfV_AVlWdQAVo5G_jLnMqe-ml1SBHUCI=)
---
Team,
• **FIRST** , Charlie met with folks from every corner of Florida, visiting them where they live and work and hearing their concerns about Gov. DeSantis and his many, _many_ failures.

name: Rick Scott
subject: I will NEVER choose based on skin color
body:
Peter, Joe Biden just announced his pick for the Supreme Court.

_But what worries me more than her far Left judicial activism is that the President used the color of her skin as a qualifier for office._

I will never consider a judge’s skin color when deciding whether or not to vote for a judge. I cannot imagine that anyone would do that. We need to put an end to racial politics in America.

Peter, there are talented judges across our country of all races, religions, and backgrounds.

In America, race should _never_ be a deciding factor for a position, whether it’s a job at a local small business or an appointment to the Supreme Court.

clean_body: Peter, Joe Biden just announced his pick for the Supreme Court. But what worries me more than her far Left judicial activism is that the President used the color of her skin as a qualifier for office. I will never consider a judge’s skin color when deciding whether or not to vote for a judge. I cannot imagine that anyone would do that. We need to put an end to racial politics in America. Peter, there are talented judges across our country of all races, religions, and backgrounds. In America, race should never be a deciding factor for a position, whether it’s a job at a local small business or an appointment to the Supreme Court. Friend – **I am so excited to be reaching out to you on behalf of my son, Marco Lopez, who's running for governor of Arizona.**
Fifty years ago, Marco's dad and I made the decision to move our family from Mexico to Arizona. We came here for the promise of greater opportunity – for the promise of Arizona. But I never could have imagined where that promise would take Marco.
**From becoming the mayor of our hometown of Nogales, Arizona, to serving in the Obama administration, Marco has always been a champion for the people of this state. And today, he's following in my footsteps – running his own small business, creating jobs and opportunity in his community. **

As a mother, I couldn't be more proud of Marco – and as an Arizonan, I couldn't be more excited for the vision he has for our great state. From defending voting rights to fixing our broken education system to increasing access to affordable health care, Marco is dedicated to making Arizona a state that works for _all_ people.
**But it won't be easy. He's running against a Trump-backed Republican – and she cares more about pushing her extremist agenda than fixing the problems of our state. Simply put, she's the exact _opposite_ of my son.**

That's why I'm reaching out to you today. Even though Marco fights day after day to make Arizona's promise a reality for everyone, he has many more fights ahead of him. And while our family has plenty of love and support to go around, he's counting on grassroots folks like you to help power this campaign to victory.

**Last time he called, he mentioned he was falling a few thousand dollars short of his big end-of-month goal, and I don't want to let him down.** **So I wanted to reach out on his behalf and humbly ask:[Friend, will you please give $5 or more today so we can elect Marco as our next governor and build a state that works for all people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42287061/332402249/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk412-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGY0MjIxOC02NTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gwuAnX8iHYdrcwzE0MKuMZewF0uVQzJ51RplB9J8I_k=)**

As you can see, we started off strong at the end of January, but our support has been stagnant in February.

**So we’ve launched a $7,000 end-of-month goal to see if we still have the support we need to flip Arizona blue this November.**

**[Team, hitting this goal is important if we’re going to defeat the AZ GOP this November. Can you give a $10 donation today to stand with us and continue the fight against the AZ GOP’s extremism?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xCVnEUy6V7jjP5U1dEmHl9YhcWoTbx79gN86mJOm24fTQbAZnUuSxiN2kOtkZdDOatqe7gX4Y3_Z8kTdP1VcOq8sb-6shleGNfWAdCxuW32hETVTaMbFKWNZXpgtAYfCceCu7nQiQ-8jcc7SmkYPDqPU39QVY8tlG-qDX5oeK_4nJc2tGzNPPlKw0Eisve55UafDuWvOdTc7iA12omR2HhDtIpn4GIUrlh0OlnfIPQzmbH_EeEgw7l_OlYYJ7go2xsMPKQrxJm7oQcL1yMQh-pJdLF7hHrWMYHw74rPuhWM_8CiTFvsnmN7tUzA54xeSmOtZXyY1_1BLRRdGyOo0cIzrxFv_SRV97jfW247w31DYIlIGwajvK18gIIt7oEO53p4T35umFN68ymYHSf04DW4YY7Qoc4C5rj9WxZodtyfcdfJQd5v6O9Yi6kp-_3eEHk9IyDrKBo6pwbi7YXt3oW/3jw/LmmHuXnSRC6twIoy4_-EEg/h2/p9dUfl4bpYwJqAd60BfeMOy4vah0638ywFmOOqkHia0)** [

In January, we saw a lot of support, and we thought Democrats were ready to flip Arizona completely blue.

But now we’re not so sure. Hitting this February goal will let us know if people are content with our wins in 2020 or if they are ready to flip AZ blue from top to bottom.

**[Team, we know Arizona can do better, but we won’t get there if the AZ GOP maintains control. Can you donate $10 today to help us reach our $7,000 end-of-month goal so we have the resources needed to defeat the AZ GOP?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xCVnEUy6V7jjP5U1dEmHl9YhcWoTbx79gN86mJOm24fTQbAZnUuSxiN2kOtkZdDOatqe7gX4Y3_Z8kTdP1VcOqL5kE9mzWRSexEJXslyb1DeZ0pbK6_xn6Ao8CtjSyVwYYvf73W0QJ_cNEsupa8-tloMcBPnEpqegYHO4dHCpxda04HJMFbc6DEtR8CtPgx4Xp1mz8VBWw97zXI5XvFaqT6YFp46QbvAP6Yggh7YkL2_K7xEFWLphRRXqCfe_8FmbIu4uahd_JBHBjvLkQokoUpf8Ao8iZj5gxDf8u7YmSUW5r96Th8x3RHr63soiPbWiZsX3JRVGsolMllteBlU25ShjvQL-13a-cfFUm_CkYqii9zU6qCmtma4w_Je6TR0D508Tb6GFPdAQm8oP3w2vLbWSfAN5qPgys5mOkEWejiF6qBxnKDxlfLeS2Wm1iKmRkU3VlP59qpMBQ8aU-5Dam/3jw/LmmHuXnSRC6twIoy4_-EEg/h4/p3eamkg7kwC-99D7wkoVfDWsSDBT56Axb4B8VcZZZmU)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [DONATE $5](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xCVnEUy6V7jjP5U1dEmHl932yzLomh9hZlIAqbaphzHVJUhT81uKinQYh4xLCIn0BmvZv8KyxRfWlpakrqFBvq5cSb0LGmZWvMBbFANhmRRRp2CdmuP8B5JaMDb852a8wS5P5-sfHk1X7MlV8Gbacpz-pc3DyEAGyxqUUhH-dx6iYvmbVVRwcqBeDeBm37VKXwzi_AY8GS-DM-zdFlCcCf_OhtrrpuclSIekNm3ADHw-DEwQMXAgWafc-6W6zaDs-vwTutx-Ott5Z4kpnSaVsE9Y7nUHybjLZNTOhFCoyoGi3xp6sySf7qFQkLGNkwS_WhMCvjIAJJo4iQK3hhpiRZZu_F7F_rJLyDfdxEalT9TngOWp4H7qfh2zHEIDAGVpmun7FD7Ou_bte1lKMMmdTlxZ2yelphliRerk85BbwbHz-NfNKugtvcllWn2U1cuJrw-zWLjZsdZ6nCK4yrGDg8irzg6JdrMY1f3zzOHOS9sg/3jw/LmmHuXnSRC6twIoy4_-EEg/h5/YxBEcOhVWAWUWzOXGEoyRUQKsGV2aXKa4onBgX3R0WI)

clean_body: | | | February has been a tough month | | | Team, we’re going to be honest with you. We’ve seen donations really drop off in February. Here’s a look at our ActBlue donations for the month. | ?linkid=2&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-over-70-election-bills-have-been-filed-in-az-3&emailreferrer=email1455931_body1911578&emailsubject=were-going-to-be-honest-about-where-things-are As you can see, we started off strong at the end of January, but our support has been stagnant in February. So we’ve launched a $7,000 end-of-month goal to see if we still have the support we need to flip Arizona blue this November. In January, we saw a lot of support, and we thought Democrats were ready to flip Arizona completely blue. But now we’re not so sure. Hitting this February goal will let us know if people are content with our wins in 2020 or if they are ready to flip AZ blue from top to bottom. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Sincerely, AZ Dems For up-to-date COVID-19 information and guidance, visit Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . name: Team Morganize
subject: [Zoom event] You’ve been selected to participate in an exclusive Zoom call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
3 different opportunities to speak with Morgan!
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220226-721-footer-ak&t=2&akid=721%2E90090%2ENS9aWS)
Hi there —
We’re swiftly coming up on election day, and our team is ramping up our organizing and events schedule. We have some exciting news, there are THREE upcoming chances to meet and talk with Morgan while also supporting our progressive campaign. While Morgan is often on the road meeting people safely face-to-face, these events will be virtual to be the most accessible for anyone to join.
Thank you for being part of this movement! Thanks to your support we’ve been able to host two debates with Josh Mandel that have grabbed national attention, had our first state-wide tour, ordered campaign materials, gathered petitions, grown our organizing operation, got on the ballot, **and more.**
**Now we want to make sure you have the chance to connect with Morgan, hear from her about the campaign, and ask any questions that you have.**
We’re giving you an exclusive invitation to **three different Zoom calls** where you’ll get the chance to virtually meet Morgan! This is our opportunity to center you and your questions since you’re a critical part of this movement.
**If you’re available, please join us for one of these Zoom calls in March. RSVP today!**
[** _Friday, March 4th_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/27673?t=3&akid=721%2E90090%2ENS9aWS)
7 pm ET [RSVP here »](https://act.morganharper.org/go/27673?t=4&akid=721%2E90090%2ENS9aWS) [**_Monday, March 7th_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/27662?t=5&akid=721%2E90090%2ENS9aWS)
6pm ET [RSVP here »](https://act.morganharper.org/go/27662?t=6&akid=721%2E90090%2ENS9aWS) [**_Monday, March 14th_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/27663?t=7&akid=721%2E90090%2ENS9aWS)
6pm ET [RSVP here »](https://act.morganharper.org/go/27663?t=8&akid=721%2E90090%2ENS9aWS)
---
We hope to see you soon,
Team Morganize

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220226-721-footer&t=9&refcode2=721_90090_NS9aWS&akid=721%2E90090%2ENS9aWS)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=721%2E90090%2ENS9aWS)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

| | Team — I wanted to make sure you got this email I sent last night. **February is a short month and we are running out of time.** Since I sent out the call, dozens of Sonia's supporters have chipped in what they can to help us meet our goal. **[>> Can you join them and donate $15 or more to help us meet the deadline? Click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42287167/332408608/-1029235949?refcode=02_26_22_EOM3_en_fwd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2JjZjUyNy02ODk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qVpE9taX4bTsgr2wYWuxlgoX5Sfk1JypZXX0hCLGtaQ=)** Thanks,

name: Finance Team, Erica Smith for U.S. House
subject: 48 hours from now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

We’ll get
right to the point: We’re still $4,768 short from our $7,000 online
fundraising goal. [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/41510?t=1001&akid=921%2E3698%2E_N_j9t ]Can you donate anything you can to help push us over
the edge before midnight on Monday, February 28th?

Honestly, fundraising has been extremely difficult this month. We’re up
against a shorter month and slower fundraising, but we can’t afford to
fall behind.

Here’s why: Erica is up against Sandy Smith, a MAGA, racist,
insurrectionist who will spell destruction for the NC-01 district.

Republicans only need to flip FIVE seats to take control of the U.S.
House. That means if Sandy Smith wins this seat she would be an immediate
threat to our razor-thin democratic majority and progressive legislation
like a higher minimum wage and expanding voting rights.

She’s backed by some big names like Madison Cawthorn and Roger Stone but
we KNOW that Erica’s got a people-powered, grassroots moral movement
behind her.

It’s critical that we harness the power of our movement right now. We’re
less than 90 days from Election Day, our district maps are finalized, and
we have to start ramping up voter outreach.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/41510?t=1002&akid=921%2E3698%2E_N_j9t ]Please
donate $5 or anything you can to help us reach as many
voters as possible before Election Day. The work we do now will make all
the difference in protecting the NC-01 seat from the hands of the
far-right come Election Day.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/41516?refcode=em20220226-921&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=921%2E3698%2E_N_j9t ]Donate $5

Onwards,

Finance Team
Erica Smith for U.S. House

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220226-921-footer&t=1022&refcode2=921_3698__N_j9t&akid=921%2E3698%2E_N_j9t

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=921%2E3698%2E_N_j9t

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42281765/332366259/-1248160141?refcode=em_fr_2022.02.26_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTYxNzhkMy0zZTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3-73_aZ5YvyxasMxfp7FWKtHpT_DmNwmELNSAkbbQDE=) Hello Peter,

It’s been a while since I wrote with an update on the state of this race – and _why we need your financial support now._ This is going to be a longer email, but if you want to cut to the chase you can chip in here → [**Donate**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42281766/332366265/183399914?refcode=em_fr_2022.02.26_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTYxNzhkMy0zZTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3-73_aZ5YvyxasMxfp7FWKtHpT_DmNwmELNSAkbbQDE=)

Peter, this race has really begun to heat up. Earlier this month, the Cook Political Report upgraded the competitiveness of this district, showing that all our hard work has already begun to pay off.

_**Then, we got our first poll back – and it showed us just ONE point behind our opponent.**_

[**That’s right, Peter: This race is neck and neck. I need your support more than ever to keep up our momentum, so please consider donating whatever you can today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42281767/332366267/-1248160141?refcode=em_fr_2022.02.26_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTYxNzhkMy0zZTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3-73_aZ5YvyxasMxfp7FWKtHpT_DmNwmELNSAkbbQDE=)
| [**I’ll donate »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42281768/332366270/183399914?refcode=em_fr_2022.02.26_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTYxNzhkMy0zZTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3-73_aZ5YvyxasMxfp7FWKtHpT_DmNwmELNSAkbbQDE=)
---

And make no mistake – there is so much at stake in this race, ifFirstName. My opponent continues to deceive her constituents by mischaracterizing her record, going so far as to tout legislation she voted against as her accomplishment.

**But, despite what she says, her voting record speaks for itself, and it is filled with examples of her voting against the interests of Iowans.** She voted against the bipartisan infrastructure bill that is set to bring millions of dollars in federal funding to Iowa. She voted against the American Rescue Plan to help Iowa communities recover from the pandemic. And, she voted against the expanded Child Tax Credit, an important piece of legislation that has helped thousands of Iowa children.

_**Iowans deserve better representation than that.**_ That is why I am fighting so hard to win this election and be a fierce advocate for Iowans in Congress. There is still so much work to be done if we want to win, and it’s going to take a strong grassroots movement to come out victorious.

[**While my opponent is financially backed by people like Marco Rubio, Ted Cruz, and Kelly Loeffler, I rely on donations from people like you: Supporters who chip in $5 here and $10 there. So please, will you chip in what you can today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42281769/332366272/-1248160141?refcode=em_fr_2022.02.26_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTYxNzhkMy0zZTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3-73_aZ5YvyxasMxfp7FWKtHpT_DmNwmELNSAkbbQDE=)

clean_body: Will you take a second to read? = Hello Peter, It’s been a while since I wrote with an update on the state of this race – and why we need your financial support now. This is going to be a longer email, but if you want to cut to the chase you can chip in here → = Peter, this race has really begun to heat up. Earlier this month, the Cook Political Report upgraded the competitiveness of this district, showing that all our hard work has already begun to pay off. Then, we got our first poll back – and it showed us just ONE point behind our opponent. = | = And make no mistake – there is so much at stake in this race, ifFirstName. My opponent continues to deceive her constituents by mischaracterizing her record, going so far as to tout legislation she voted against as her accomplishment. But, despite what she says, her voting record speaks for itself, and it is filled with examples of her voting against the interests of Iowans. She voted against the bipartisan infrastructure bill that is set to bring millions of dollars in federal funding to Iowa. She voted against the American Rescue Plan to help Iowa communities recover from the pandemic. And, she voted against the expanded Child Tax Credit, an important piece of legislation that has helped thousands of Iowa children. Iowans deserve better representation than that. That is why I am fighting so hard to win this election and be a fierce advocate for Iowans in Congress. There is still so much work to be done if we want to win, and it’s going to take a strong grassroots movement to come out victorious. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = I can’t do it without you, Peter. Thank you for your support, together we can win this. – Liz Mathis Liz Mathis is a lifelong Iowan, State Senator, and former local news reporter running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District in Congress. = | = | Liz Mathis is running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District. We like sharing these endorsements not just because we are really proud of them - we are - but more importantly because we want YOUR support if you ha Friend, We like sharing these endorsements not just because we are really proud of them - we are - but more importantly because we want YOUR support if you haven’t already joined our movement and we ask you to forward this email and share these with friends and family who might be interested in being a part of our team as well. [**JOIN TEAM SCHMIDT**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=9ac419e794d64b8986e33c00858c4995&_e=0u9oLd_kmohgyY3UkPfkqkXqaZThU5-MIBPiMMW9Toe2OuXgur-Oz9x3QR-yhWd-wJdu4oHKgpUdPJva6cd0qKXDN2JhBQ8OhSvzMDHIXyjAgS2D_NBFii4CGzjbs4OxypGVKbxVK-gjqp5NJvxcjvGqIy9stgfFnKdVzf-E7XOerfyLIO8hSDA-MKpvJlhRWfJ68lCvHGLNMW9r651692jJ8q_cZZG7VC8LJFjyoFrABScBLS1aGxsxPqen1N5WrRpizlS2QIN6Gl398uaLSNTCLWLr57QiBTSFoSCt5X5-PuAaZ8VzTrOWcNqlw-HlxD41p5KKQ1qpDgwV7I1kMS0_0FjwYARtr40RJcaM8ODGMuphr9e-yXkulGJmi9hNtITMKurS9c4CmzdHiGus06gI0FTU39cW6ptw_h_27AMfFBlaTm4CxwISLFoxgWAFCyndGBpmAN5wttsutbg5kps4AKOFQyQfsGSnJKtHPx_OEqdsAR4VbZFl97nQpIh_) Check out our recent endorsements below: “ _Derek Schmidt has demonstrated strong leadership qualities during his service as Attorney General. He has been a steadfast defender of individual liberties, a tough-on-crime chief law enforcement officer, and a national leader on strengthening consumer privacy laws. He is also endorsed by Olathe’s own Ron Ryckman and Kansans for Life, further illustrating his commitment to our conserviate values...Schmidt’s successful victory in our organization’s Faith & Freedom Picnic Straw Poll in 2021 gives us the confidence that Olathe Republicans are ready to unite around a campaign that is driven by strong conservative convictions and a history of electoral success. _**_In 2022, Derek Schmidt is the candidate we need to put Kansans back on track._**_” _ **– Olathe Republican Party** _“Derek’s leadership over the years for his fellow Kansans is indisputable. No one has worked harder to make sure all our citizens have a safe place to raise families and achieve prosperity in our great state, his passion and love for Kansas is second to none. My wife Donna and I have known Derek for many years now and in my heart I know all Kansans can rest easy knowing Derek Schmidt will be leading Kansas as Governor to a much better place for our families to grow and prosper.” _ **– Bob Aldrich, President & CEO Jenco LLC ** _“Under Laura Kelly’s leadership, Kansas government spending and influence has grown to the detriment of Kansas families and businesses. Kansas jobs haven’t recovered, our children’s education suffers, and many Kansans have lost their freedoms. As Attorney General, Derek has worked to craft a government that is honest, humble and willing to serve. In his campaign for Governor, he's provided a vision for restoring individual liberty and opportunity to all Kansans. For these reasons, I endorse Derek Schmidt to be the next Governor of Kansas.”_ **– Michael Austin, Kansas Free-Market Economist ** _“I served with Derek Schmidt for ten years in the State Senate, and during that time and since while he has served as our attorney general we have crossed paths many times around the state and discussed many issues important to Kansas. He has always been approachable, thoughtful, reasonable, and fair. His confident and optimistic leadership will serve him well in bringing us together as Kansans and he will make a great governor.”_ **–Chris Steineger, Former State Senator** Thanks for standing with us, we’re excited to watch our campaign grow every single week. We’re glad you’re on board. – Team Schmidt | |
---

This is Former Navy SEAL Morgan Luttrell. I’m here to finish the mission President Trump started.

Veterans like me are enlisting in RECORD numbers to take back Congress and save the American Dream, but the swamp is threatened by us and is fighting back...

Pelosi & her puppets are dumping in MILLIONS to protect their corrupt swamp creatures from us America First warriors who are bringing our fight for freedom to Washington.

I’ve answered the call to service before, and I KNOW America needs me again – now more than ever. But my campaign funds (up against the Pelosi machine) are mission CRITICAL.

Now we need YOU to answer the call – **[will you stand with me?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3l1ek-20d5p-4qqlpo4/ "will you stand with me?")** Or will you desert me?

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3l1ek-20d5t-4qqlpo8/ "Kevin McCarthy urgently needs YOU to take action")
---

As Leader of the House Republicans, I’m committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track. I’m incredibly grateful for your support in this fight and want you to know that I’m doing everything in my power to secure victory for Republicans. Your sustained support fuels our grassroots movement and provides us with the resources necessary to combat the Left’s political games. If you’d like to make another contribution, I will fight tooth and nail to ensure every cent goes towards advancing the conservative agenda and winning back the House -- **[ EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3l1ek-20d5u-4qqlpo9/ "EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>")**

The fight is far from over, and we’re only getting started.

Kevin McCarthy
Leader, House Republicans

name: Adam Schiff
subject: the choice is clear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/LERqs2kL_) It's Adam Schiff.

We've just embarked on an historic election year that will decide the fate of our Democratic House Majority.

And in a moment, I'm going to explain just how high the stakes are in this fight - but first, I'd be remiss if I didn't ask you directly:

****[The DCCC is just 48 hours away from their critical End of Month Deadline. At this pivotal moment, your $3 contribution could make the difference in protecting our critical House Majority. Could you chip in before time runs out?](https://links.e.dccc.)****

Let me lay it out clearly for you.

When Democrats are in the majority, we:

-**EXPAND** access to affordable health care,
-**INVEST** in green infrastructure and green jobs,
-**DEFEND** our democracy and voting rights,
- and **PROTECT** individual freedoms like a woman's right to choose.

But when Republicans hold the majority, they:

- **ATTACK** voting rights and the integrity of our elections,
-**SPREAD** conspiracy theories and disinformation,
-**CUT** taxes for the rich and powerful,
- and **DENY** the science behind climate change, vaccines, and so many other fundamental truths.

It's really that simple. And it's clear which vision for the future we must strive for - and which we must fight to defeat.

But we can't get the job done without steadfast support from grassroots Democrats like you.

**[So I'm asking you directly: Will you chip in $3 to the DCCC to help elect Democrats before their End of Month Deadline expires in just 48 hours? Everything we've fought for is on the line this year >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/2WXVQrvN2~)**
| | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_)
---
| [**Chip in $35 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/j~)
---
| [**Chip in $50 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)
---
| [**Chip in $100 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $250 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/er4dfw_8bkc-)
---
| [**Or donate another amount >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-)
---

Thank you,

Adam
---

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46461128&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE4Mjk4MTM1MwS2&l=14416759&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46461128&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE4Mjk4MTM1MwS2&l=14416759&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

body:

name: Welch for Vermont
subject: An historic Supreme Court nominee:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
This is why it matters that Democrats hold the Senate.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=116%2E61531%2E04vT7R)
Hello,
President Biden announced the historic selection of Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson as his Supreme Court nominee. Once confirmed, she’ll become the first Black woman to serve on our nation’s highest court.
Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson is eminently qualified to become our next Supreme Court Justice, and the Court will be made better by her presence. She’ll be the first Supreme Court justice in decades with real experience as a public defender.
But none of that matters to Mitch McConnell and the rest of the Senate Republicans.
[**With a 50/50 split in the Senate right now, our country needs another progressive champion in the Senate. Can you pitch in $15 before our February deadline to help elect Peter Welch as the next Senator from Vermont?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1451?t=3&akid=116%2E61531%2E04vT7R)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, you donation will process automatically:_

---
| [$3](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1451?t=14&amount=3&akid=116%2E61531%2E04vT7R)
---
| [$15](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1451?t=16&amount=15&akid=116%2E61531%2E04vT7R)
---
| [$28](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1451?t=18&amount=28&akid=116%2E61531%2E04vT7R)
---
| [$50](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1451?t=20&amount=50&akid=116%2E61531%2E04vT7R)
---
| [$100](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1451?t=10&amount=100&akid=116%2E61531%2E04vT7R)
---
| [OTHER](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1451?t=12&akid=116%2E61531%2E04vT7R)
---

---
We’ve already seen the way National Republicans treat the Supreme Court — pushing through their own nominees and blocking nominations from Democrats to create the most conservative Supreme Court in modern history.
Electing more progressive Democrats to the Senate like Peter Welch is our best chance to ensure that we can continue to give Supreme Court nominees from Biden a fair confirmation process, and hitting our goals ahead of this February fundraising deadline puts us in the best position to get it done.
With the Senate hanging in the balance and the Supreme Court deciding cases that have monumental impact, we cannot afford to lose a single seat. That’s why we must band together to elect Peter.
[**Ahead of our February deadline, can you join this grassroots movement to elect Peter Welch as Vermont’s next Senator? Anything you can give goes directly to defending our Senate majority.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1451?t=7&akid=116%2E61531%2E04vT7R)
Thank you!
Team Welch

---
| [DONATE ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-22feb?refcode=em_20220226_f_t_eom1&refcode2=116_61531_04vT7R&akid=116%2E61531%2E04vT7R)
---

---
| [ ](https://www.facebook.com/welchforvermont) | [ ](https://twitter.com/WelchForVT) | [ ](https://www.instagram.com/welchforvermont/)
---|---|---

PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT

Welch for Vermont
P.O Box 909
Richmond, VT 05477
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, please [unsubscribe here](https://act.welchforvermont.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=116%2E61531%2E04vT7R).

You've been invited to the Nationwide Women For Karen Virtual Event featuring Tracee Ellis Ross.

Team —

This Monday, February 28, we're hosting our exclusive Women For Karen Virtual Event – and we want to see you on the list!

Please join our co-hosts along with special guest, EMILY's List President Laphonza Butler, for a virtual event moderated by actress Tracee Ellis Ross in support of Karen Bass for Mayor. **[We're opening up limited spaces for folks who commit to a $25 minimum recurring donation today, but the event is filling up quickly! name: VoteVets
subject: Republicans cheered Trump as he threatened to deny anti-tank weapons to Ukraine because they wouldn’t provide information about Hunter Biden.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
While we watch Republicans curse Vladimir Putin’s invasion of Ukraine and attack Joe Biden for being weak, we must never forget one fact:
#
A previous email gave the impression that the Trump administration did not eventually yield and send Javelins to Ukraine. They eventually did, but his initial refusal unless Ukraine gave him dirt on Hunter Biden was a big part of his impeachment.
Derek -
Never — ever — forget:
While we watch Republicans curse Vladimir Putin’s invasion of Ukraine and attack Joe Biden for being weak, we must never forget one fact:
For YEARS these same Republicans cheered President Trump — they defended Trump — as he threatened to deny anti-tank weapons to Ukraine because they wouldn’t provide information about Hunter Biden.
They cheered Donald Trump and defended him from impeachment as he denied Ukraine the weapons systems that would be able to stop the tanks rolling into Ukraine because they wouldn’t help them — all of them — in their elections.
Many of those same Republicans are up for re-election this year. They should pay a price. VoteVets will help make sure that happens:
[**Can you please make a $5 contribution to VoteVets TODAY to help us defeat Republicans who sided with Trump against the people of Ukraine? VoteVets is one of the top outside spending groups every cycle, but we cannot do it alone.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-pac-ukr?refcode=em220226-2-15-c&t=1&refcode2=4389_3013755_2GrKWZ&akid=4389%2E3013755%2E2GrKWZ)
| [CONTRIBUTE $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-pac-ukr?refcode=em220226-2-15-c&t=2&refcode2=4389_3013755_2GrKWZ&akid=4389%2E3013755%2E2GrKWZ)
---
Thank you.
The team at VoteVets
