clean_body: While we watch Republicans curse Vladimir Putin’s invasion of Ukraine and attack Joe Biden for being weak, we must never forget one fact: A previous email gave the impression that the Trump administration did not eventually yield and send Javelins to Ukraine. They eventually did, but his initial refusal unless Ukraine gave him dirt on Hunter Biden was a big part of his impeachment. Derek - Never — ever — forget: While we watch Republicans curse Vladimir Putin’s invasion of Ukraine and attack Joe Biden for being weak, we must never forget one fact: For YEARS these same Republicans cheered President Trump — they defended Trump — as he threatened to deny anti-tank weapons to Ukraine because they wouldn’t provide information about Hunter Biden. They cheered Donald Trump and defended him from impeachment as he denied Ukraine the weapons systems that would be able to stop the tanks rolling into Ukraine because they wouldn’t help them — all of them — in their elections. Many of those same Republicans are up for re-election this year. They should pay a price. VoteVets will help make sure that happens: | Thank you. Hi Team New Deal,

During early voting, a mere 3% of Texans turned out to the polls, which is why we **NEED** to mobilize as many people as we can before the primary on Tuesday.

Our GOTV campaign is off to a strong start though. We’ve already chatted with so many different people across the district who are committed to voting and are excited to cast their ballot for Jessica!

But there are still TONS of folks we haven’t reached in TX-30, and now, we’re running low on funds. With just TWO more days left until Election Day, **we urgently need to put more money behind GOTV outreach right away or we risk missing out on some key opportunities if our opponents get to folks first.**

[**Time is running out, and we can’t afford to scale back in these last TWO DAYS before the election. We need all the people-power we can get right now. **Jessica Mason is first and foremost a daughter of Dallas, above all else. ** **From growing up poor and housing insecure, to enlisting in the Navy to complete her college degree, to working in public housing administration -- Jessica has witnessed firsthand the socioeconomic barriers and systemic inequities that ineffective leadership has caused for the people and the communities she loves.** **Jessica Mason is a bold, progressive champion with a true working-class background, and she's the fearless voice we need representing TX-30 in Congress because she's brave enough to demand better for the everyday people who are struggling in this country.** **[__Pitch in now to help elect Jessica as the voice of TX-30 >>__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42282310/332370047/1668561092?refcode=220226_FR_eomgotv2kavin_BIO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWVjZWU2Zi00Mjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TSjPRfxKjIpqxukX9URXiBr4WpNRsrvx02-hjGVieXA=)** **______[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42282311/332370048/-1288899752?refcode=220226_FR_eomgotv2kavin_BIO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWVjZWU2Zi00Mjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TSjPRfxKjIpqxukX9URXiBr4WpNRsrvx02-hjGVieXA=)**

clean_body: During early voting a mere 3% of Texans turned out to the polls, which is why we NEED to mobilize as many people as we can to the polls ASAP. | | | = Hi Team New Deal, During early voting, a mere 3% of Texans turned out to the polls, which is why we NEED to mobilize as many people as we can before the primary on Tuesday. Our GOTV campaign is off to a strong start though. We’ve already chatted with so many different people across the district who are committed to voting and are excited to cast their ballot for Jessica! But there are still TONS of folks we haven’t reached in TX-30, and now, we’re running low on funds. With just TWO more days left until Election Day, we urgently need to put more money behind GOTV outreach right away or we risk missing out on some key opportunities if our opponents get to folks first. = Here’s how your gift can make an impact on our GOTV push: = — helps fuel our volunteers with water and snacks while they’re out knocking on doors and putting up signs = — provides our team with supplies like clipboards, pens, and notepads = — prints yard signs and campaign literature = — makes 542 phone calls to voters = — sends 817 text messages to voters **__= Every grassroots dollar you pitch in will make a difference in how many voters we're able to reach in these last 2 days. Thank you for stepping up for Jessica. Kavin Campaign Manager ************************EXPRESS DONATE to Jessica Mason for Congress********************** **********************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:********************** | **********************= ""********************** | **********************= "="********************** | **********************= "="********************** | **********************= "="********************** ---|---|---|--- Jessica Mason is first and foremost a daughter of Dallas, above all else. From growing up poor and housing insecure, to enlisting in the Navy to complete her college degree, to working in public housing administration -- Jessica has witnessed firsthand the socioeconomic barriers and systemic inequities that ineffective leadership has caused for the people and the communities she loves. Jessica Mason is a bold, progressive champion with a true working-class background, and she's the fearless voice we need representing TX-30 in Congress because she's brave enough to demand better for the everyday people who are struggling in this country. = __= | || || ** Jessica Mason for Congress PO Box 271183 Dallas, TX 75227 United States | |

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Just three days to elect these progressive champions in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Texas families deserve progressive leaders who will show up and fight for them — and that’s exactly what Greg and Jessica will do.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220226-2823-header&t=1&akid=2823%2E2526796%2E_iAgrv)
The Texas primary election is _just 3 days away now_ and we are closer than ever to our massive opportunity to elect two progressive champions to Congress: **Jessica Cisneros and Greg Casar.**
Alexandria joined Greg and Jessica on the campaign trail last week and witnessed first-hand the energy and excitement Texans have about the potential to elect these two progressive champions and bring real change to TX-35 and TX-28.
**Alexandria is working around the clock to grow our movement in Congress, but it will take a mass-mobilization of grassroots power to win in Texas.** [If you’re able to, can you chip in $9 right now to support Jess, Greg, and our work to mobilize voters in Texas before the primary election on Tuesday?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220226?refcode=em20220226-2823-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2823_2526796__iAgrv&akid=2823%2E2526796%2E_iAgrv)
**[Contribute $9](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220226?refcode=em20220226-2823-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2823_2526796__iAgrv&akid=2823%2E2526796%2E_iAgrv)**
With roots as a labor organizer, Greg is running to deliver a bold agenda for the people — from Medicare for All to good jobs and climate justice.
Jessica is a progressive fighter for working families running on a platform of passing a Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and advancing reproductive justice in a state that has just dealt a major blow to abortion access.
Texas families deserve progressive leaders who will show up and fight for them — and that’s exactly what Greg and Jessica will do. Both have a strong record of fighting for working families, and Alexandria knows they will help us deliver on reproductive rights and a functional power grid for Texas.
[So, here’s where you come in. To ensure a victory on March 1st, Jessica and Greg need a huge boost of grassroots support and power right now. Can we count on you to split an urgent $9 contribution between Jessica and Greg’s campaigns and our movement today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220226?refcode=em20220226-2823-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2823_2526796__iAgrv&akid=2823%2E2526796%2E_iAgrv)
Thank you for everything you do,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220226?refcode=em20220226-2823-P_FND_ANO_END&t=23&refcode2=2823_2526796__iAgrv&akid=2823%2E2526796%2E_iAgrv)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220226-2823-P_FND_ANO_END&t=24&akid=2823%2E2526796%2E_iAgrv)**
---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives. As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy. body:
Peter, I just got off the stage at CPAC talking about my plan to rescue America.
Seeing so many young conservatives in the audience cheering, I couldn’t be more excited for our country’s future.
The future of the Republican Party has made themselves clear: they have no time for RINO’s or liberals.
**The next generation wants bold, conservative leadership that isn’t afraid to TAKE CHARGE for America - and our 11-point plan does just that.** [**READ THE PLAN NOW**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=0b44138b0fdc4fc0a5960148e2a2330c&_e=95XBAyOECW1IFb-DC97AsikVEjn8HZuFojZAHlpMJAQK0-KlL4KQde2CdYhgdr4_yxKfsoR4hrQMtY1OYoc4X9Elfya2rMvgRwzqBIm1rc_dLJL73NLUMrcRojsc9Zz5btLP6v2EBYjX767QAcUhjyVLuMa_fTQRgT1HZDLErkLs1OqrEU7OG7l32L0llvN89l_J171c4X0xqd4JjUflzyj5ZZSFA0qyJX-tUgUy_N1wG6-dbSL9kTvNSJ2SCT6ud3qOmhfkqEsyNwYgzeI3cyPD4acQPSet4t4Ph-uUIuXrodXK6HK_PaV0ERB7-8DosFSAkZm5cQJfO4LVojwc3oeS76NCL3tkR4JZVmoVaQ0%3D) For a little over a year we’ve had a Commander in Chief with no plan, no vision, and no courage.

name: By 10 AM tomorrow
subject: To: Joseph R. Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Sending our thanks >>
| TEXT JOIN TO 50224 TO GET IMPORTANT ACTION ALERTS FROM VOTER PROTECTION PROJECT! [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/128?t=1&akid=1347%2E878179%2EN4Si3K)
---
Team: With the one year anniversary of President Biden’s inauguration in the rear-view mirror, we need to reach out and show our gratitude.

**He has shown such poise and leadership while saving our country from a historic pandemic, and repairing the damage caused by Donald Trump.**

But despite all his accomplishments, he is being mercilessly attacked by far-right agitators who only want to destroy his accomplishments. [So we’re sending a letter to share our thanks for all of President Biden’s hard work during his first year in office. We’re sending this letter tomorrow at 10 AM SHARP. SIGN NOW, Friend! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6497?t=8&akid=1347%2E878179%2EN4Si3K) | [Donate $1 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6498?t=10&akid=1347%2E878179%2EN4Si3K)
---
**TO:** President Joe Biden
**FROM:** A Grateful American
**RE:** HAPPY ONE YEAR!

**We cannot begin to tell you the sense of relief we felt watching you take the presidential oath of office.**

It has been so wonderful to see civility return to the Oval Office and to _finally_ have a President that is willing to fight for working folks and deliver the change we’ve been crying out for over the last four years.

**And my goodness have you delivered on your campaign promises! From the historic American Rescue Plan, to the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill, to leading an unprecedented economic recovery – we’re SO grateful!**

**But I know that despite your accomplishments, you continuously face unhinged attacks from disgraceful MAGA Republicans.**

[I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the country that stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this card and chipping in $1 to Voter Protection Project to show that we support you and your administration SO much. »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6498?t=12&akid=1347%2E878179%2EN4Si3K) | [Donate $1 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6498?t=14&akid=1347%2E878179%2EN4Si3K)
---
I am AMAZED at all you have been able to do for the American people in just your first year as President.

_Joe, you've led us through a pandemic, a massive economic recovery, sharp political division, and SAVED our Democracy from the brink of peril._

[Congratulations on such a successful first year of your presidency. We know that next year will be even more successful thanks to your leadership! Thank you, thank you, thank you! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6498?t=16&akid=1347%2E878179%2EN4Si3K)
Regards,

**_xx A Grateful American_**
[Donate $1 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6498?t=18&akid=1347%2E878179%2EN4Si3K)
---
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

[](ckq.io/eguhtk)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1347%2E878179%2EN4Si3K). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1347%2E878179%2EN4Si3K).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1347%2E878179%2EN4Si3K) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=19&akid=1347%2E878179%2EN4Si3K). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=5&akid=1347%2E878179%2EN4Si3K)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=6&akid=1347%2E878179%2EN4Si3K)

name: Wisconsin Senate Update
subject: Check out these recent headlines:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Let’s just be blunt about this: Republicans like Ron Johnson are working overtime to push through anti-voter laws because their only path to victory is to stop YOU from voting. Take a look at some of these recent headlines... [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42288159/332418523/-1448701630?refcode=em22_220226_eom4_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220226_eom4_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTUyYTczOC03NTk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-XBgrQcmCVaaZsr6BzGzdz9BGQqSBx3kKxQbkOPZI80=)
Democrats need to act with urgency to pass voting rights legislation, but our 50/50 majority just isn’t cutting it. We need **one more vote** in the U.S. Senate to get this done.

The best chance we have to grow our Democratic majority is to flip a Republican seat, and major election forecasters are calling Ron Johnson the most vulnerable incumbent running for re-election. The problem is, Wisconsin is expected to be one of the most expensive Senate races in the country.

Public fundraising reports show Republicans have more than $200 million cash on hand to take back the Senate, and Ron Johnson has more money in the bank than any Democrat in this race. That’s a hell of a lot to compete with, folks, which is why we need your help.

**[Can you rush a donation to help us defeat Ron Johnson and expand our Senate majority? The response to these messages is always incredible, so we’re hoping for a LOT of grassroots donations today. We would greatly appreciate anything you can give. We have to put up the strongest Democrat against Ron Johnson, and the latest head-to-head poll shows Sarah Godlewski is the only one who can beat him in a general election. When she does, Sarah will be the 51st vote we need to restore voting rights, protect our democracy, and move our country forward.

Grassroots supporters like you have stepped up in a big way for our campaign in the past, and we can’t thank you enough for it. Please know that we do our best to respect your inbox and your budget, so if you can’t afford to pitch in today — that’s okay.

We appreciate you opening this email and staying in the fight. Thank you.

— Team Sarah

clean_body: Let’s just be blunt about this: Republicans like Ron Johnson are working overtime to push through anti-voter laws because their only path to victory is to stop YOU from voting. Take a look at some of these recent headlines... = Democrats need to act with urgency to pass voting rights legislation, but our 50/50 majority just isn’t cutting it. We need one more vote in the U.S. Senate to get this done. The best chance we have to grow our Democratic majority is to flip a Republican seat, and major election forecasters are calling Ron Johnson the most vulnerable incumbent running for re-election. The problem is, Wisconsin is expected to be one of the most expensive Senate races in the country. Public fundraising reports show Republicans have more than $200 million cash on hand to take back the Senate, and Ron Johnson has more money in the bank than any Democrat in this race. That’s a hell of a lot to compete with, folks, which is why we need your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = We have to put up the strongest Democrat against Ron Johnson, and the latest head-to-head poll shows Sarah Godlewski is the only one who can beat him in a general election. When she does, Sarah will be the 51st vote we need to restore voting rights, protect our democracy, and move our country forward. Grassroots supporters like you have stepped up in a big way for our campaign in the past, and we can’t thank you enough for it. Please know that we do our best to respect your inbox and your budget, so if you can’t afford to pitch in today — that’s okay. We appreciate you opening this email and staying in the fight. Thank you. — Team Sarah Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put Wisconsin workers and families first. She's the only Democrat who is beating Ron Johnson in the latest head-to-head poll of our race. With your help, we can flip this seat. name: Bryce Reeves Session Update
subject: Session Update!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REEVES FOR CONGRESS
body:
The First Amendment, Working on the Budget, Commissioners of the Revenue, And More!
| | |
---
| | [](https://qj61jwdp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/0100017f381112ad-0a1136c0-8b51-44a6-b5fd-3d7d3ca25636-000000/hGp2gOULE7Qoe6EOCh_3YrQfiX4=259)
---
| |
---
| **This Week in Session ** Both the House and Senate unveiled their versions of the biennial budget (ranging from 2022-2024) this week, beginning the long but necessary process of having a balanced budget for our Commonwealth which is required by our Constitution. The process started back in December; a draft is given to the General Assembly following a joint meeting between the Governor and the House & Senate Finance Committees, after which all legislators are able to submit amendments. Throughout the first half of session, both the House and Senate Finance Committees vet the proposed amendments, and come up with a finalized budget proposal. Negotiations begin after the House and Senate pass their respective proposals, and differences between the two budgets must be reconciled before the end of session on March 12. This lengthy process still has a few more steps, though: Governor Youngkin then gets a chance to review the finalized budget and recommend his own amendments, after which the General Assembly will reconvene on April 27th to debate and vote on the Governor’s amendments; then we will finally have our budget. Having a balanced budget is not easy work, but is a necessary step to ensure the economic prosperity of individuals and businesses alike in our Commonwealth! Although it may not seem like it, the budget has the capability to change more than just our Commonwealth’s spending. [While reading the budget, I caught something that the Democrats attempted to slip in which would have been devastating to our First Amendment rights.](https://qj61jwdp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fwatch%2F%3Fv=1330750434374803/1/0100017f381112ad-0a1136c0-8b51-44a6-b5fd-3d7d3ca25636-000000/iDKzsIjTBRl2PS_NIGyVveE-Tps=259) A budget amendment that was proposed would have changed the definition of a ‘group’ to include individuals, and would have required, for example, people looking to simply hold a sign near the Capitol as legislators walk to session to need a permit in order to do so. This is blatantly unacceptable and was a clear violation of our First Amendment rights. It is hard to believe that the vote on this particular amendment came down to a 20 to 20 tie which had to be broken by our Lieutenant Governor and President of the Senate, Mrs. Winsome Earl-Sears.
---
| | | [](https://qj61jwdp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fwatch%2F%3Fv=1330750434374803/2/0100017f381112ad-0a1136c0-8b51-44a6-b5fd-3d7d3ca25636-000000/-RN7gUUjEQn4QXCrfBRhoUx97Sg=259)
---
| Since crossover last week, House committees have been considering bills that passed the Senate and visa-versa. I had 12 bills make it through the crossover process, and have had some major wins so far. SB 528, which would drastically reduce taxes on military retiree pay, had its second reading this Friday on the House floor! It passed unanimously through the Senate, and worked its way through the House Finance Committee without any roadblocks. Another bill of mine, SB 530, which cracks down on illegal gambling in our commonwealth, was reported out of both the House Committee on General Laws and the House Committee on Appropriations with little opposition, and now awaits its time on the House floor.
---
| | |
---
| This week was an exciting one, I must say. Presidents Day brought many visitors to Richmond as folks enjoyed their day off. We do not take holidays in the General Assembly, I’m there every day fighting for you. On Thursday several Commissioners of the Revenue stopped by to present me with the Legislator of the Year award from the Commissioners of the Revenue association. One of the Commissioners who stopped by was Scott Mayausky, from Stafford County. As the owner of two businesses in Stafford, I’ve had to work with him a lot. Commissioner of the Revenue Lois Jacobs, of Fredericksburg, and Terry Yowell, of Culpeper, also joined us and Terry Yowell presented me with the award. I’m proud to work with all our elected officials to get things done for our community. With only two weeks left until session adjourns, things are picking up to a blistering pace here in the Virginia Senate. I will continue to do my duty looking out for the best interests of my constituents as well as all citizens of our Commonwealth. As per usual, I will be back next week with more news from Richmond! Until next week,
---
| | |
---
| Bryce Reeves
---
|
---
| | PAID FOR BY REEVES FOR CONGRESS
---
|
---
| | [](https://qj61jwdp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/2/0100017f381112ad-0a1136c0-8b51-44a6-b5fd-3d7d3ca25636-000000/_E_FHeQkFt2xSHOHWXrT9jtH9eE=259)
---
| | | [](https://qj61jwdp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FBryceReevesVA/1/0100017f381112ad-0a1136c0-8b51-44a6-b5fd-3d7d3ca25636-000000/77c9rAlA4R9X3hZGU_ugpGDztsg=259)
---
| [](https://qj61jwdp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FReevesVA/1/0100017f381112ad-0a1136c0-8b51-44a6-b5fd-3d7d3ca25636-000000/CGiicBocWLjNVYr_ouwW_fw1h4Q=259)
---
| [](https://qj61jwdp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Freevesva%2F%3Fhl=en/1/0100017f381112ad-0a1136c0-8b51-44a6-b5fd-3d7d3ca25636-000000/hhoxa0Q7TK40pkhG7R4TUAoP5R8=259)

McLean, VA 22101, United States

name: Cora Neumann via, CoraForMontana.com
subject: We need action on housing.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cora for Montana
body:
We’re seeing unprecedented growth in our state. That should mean more opportunity for Montanans. Instead... | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42284352/332379741/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2ZiYjIzMy01Mjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y7r5NT7wVSVwxhWjRPrKw9dskgzI_oVs3kNhEAI7kOw=) Friend, I’m proud that I’ve made my way across MT-01 to meet with voters about the issues we’re facing. But there’s one topic that seems to always come up: **the skyrocketing costs of housing. ** It’s no secret we’re seeing unprecedented growth in our state. That should mean more opportunity for Montanans. Instead, we’re facing uncertainty and a housing crisis that’s pushing long-time residents out of state. Some of us -- like Frank who I spoke with at Moose’s Saloon in Kalispell -- have been forced to work two-full time jobs just to make ends meet. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42284353/332379742/655314317?refcode=em-2.26.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2ZiYjIzMy01Mjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y7r5NT7wVSVwxhWjRPrKw9dskgzI_oVs3kNhEAI7kOw=)
_Talking with Frank. (Moose's Saloon, Kalispell)_ Stories like Frank’s aren’t uncommon, and it’s unacceptable that life for so many has turned into a daily struggle to remain in the place they grew up in and love. It’s the same struggle my family faced in Bozeman when I was a kid. My dad was commuting from Bozeman to Great Falls just to find a job that could support our family, and eventually we had to leave because it just wasn’t affordable. We work more hours, spend less time with our families, and the rise in homelessness has many worried about the future here. It’s heartbreaking, and we can’t allow this trend to grow any more than it has. **In Congress, I will fight to make sure working families who live in Montana can afford to stay -- and not by barely making ends meet, but by actually thriving with access to high-paying jobs and a real opportunity to prosper.** [**Housing impacts each one of us, and we need a leader who will put working families first when tackling this issue. If you’re ready for compassionate action on housing, chip in $3 to help me hit my end-of-month fundraising goal so I can get to Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42284354/332379743/655314317?refcode=em-2.26.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2ZiYjIzMy01Mjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y7r5NT7wVSVwxhWjRPrKw9dskgzI_oVs3kNhEAI7kOw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42284355/332379744/655314317?refcode=em-2.26.22-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2ZiYjIzMy01Mjk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y7r5NT7wVSVwxhWjRPrKw9dskgzI_oVs3kNhEAI7kOw=)

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson deserves a fair process
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Judge Jackson is eminently qualified and would be an important addition to the Court.
#

Friends -
This week, President Biden nominated Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court.
Judge Jackson is eminently qualified and would be an important addition to the Court.
I’m glad that President Biden made good on his promise to nominate a Black woman to the Supreme Court. As the former Chief Justice of North Carolina's Supreme Court, I firmly believe that our Supreme Court — like all institutions — must reflect the diversity of our nation.
Now, we know there are those who will try to delay or stop this process. But we must demand that Judge Jackson receive fair consideration from every U.S. Senator as this process moves forward.
[**Please add your name today to tell the U.S. Senate to give Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson fair consideration. We must not tolerate any obstruction or delays to fill this crucial Supreme Court vacancy.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-kbj-nomination?source=em220226-2-t1&refcode2=466.357359.cnDe1l&t=1&akid=466%2E357359%2EcnDe1l)
This historic moment is long overdue. I was a practicing lawyer before I ever saw a Black woman presiding over her own courtroom. It was a life-changing moment, and I know this moment will inspire so many across our country.
\- Cheri Beasley
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-kbj-nomination?source=em220226-2-t1&refcode2=466.357359.cnDe1l&t=2&akid=466%2E357359%2EcnDe1l)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=466%2E357359%2EcnDe1l). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=466%2E357359%2EcnDe1l). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=466_357359_cnDe1l&akid=466%2E357359%2EcnDe1l) today to help us make history.

name: Beto for Texas
subject: Help us catch up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Let us explain.
#
Yesterday, we opened up our books to share that we’re running **$194,685** behind our fundraising in January — and since February is three days shorter than a typical month, we’re running out of time to catch up.
We know it’s a lot to ask to make up that entire gap by midnight on Monday. But the reality is that we need to raise MORE, not less, than we did last month — because our organizing operation is growing bigger by the day.
Defeating Greg Abbott and winning in a state as big as Texas on people power alone is an enormous task. But it’s one we’re capable of — together.

**[Will you please add your first contribution of $3 or more to help close the fundraising gap this weekend and power our campaign to elect Beto? We need your help.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53565?refcode=ema20220226-2-178035&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=178035%2E444211%2EH7xz8u)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53565?refcode=ema20220226-2-178035&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=178035%2E444211%2EH7xz8u)**
The bottom line is that we can't let something as trivial as a 28-day month keep us from hitting our goals and having the campaign infrastructure we need to take on Greg Abbott.

Our organizers and volunteers are hard at work to reach 4 million voters before polls open on March 1st for the primary election. **Now, we need our incredible grassroots donors to match their efforts and ensure we don’t fall behind.**
**[Donate now to help us close the gap and build a campaign that can reach every Texan. We can't count out a single vote.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53565?refcode=ema20220226-2-178035&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=178035%2E444211%2EH7xz8u)**
**[Contribute Now](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53565?refcode=ema20220226-2-178035&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=178035%2E444211%2EH7xz8u)**
Together, we'll work for every single vote and write no one off. That’s how we win.
Thank you,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220226-178035-footer&t=23&refcode2=178035_444211_H7xz8u&akid=178035%2E444211%2EH7xz8u)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=24&akid=178035%2E444211%2EH7xz8u)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=178035%2E444211%2EH7xz8u)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Barry Lepler, Team Levin
subject: I’ve known Andy Levin for decades. There’s nobody else I’d vote for to represent the new 11th district
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Levin for Congress
body:
I know firsthand the type of person and leader Andy Levin is, and there’s not a candidate more equipped to represent our new 11th district.
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42284751/332381294/-1948756003?ms=em-header&refcode=em_20220226_f_s_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2Y3OWNlOC01Njk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nQ7oyPpOWHM-vd7Si7479Vcd3gCKf2liMeWfPUyW5qE=&emci=e660305b-3b97-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ccf79ce8-5697-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=22034926)

| | Hi Peter, I’m Barry Lepler, Andy’s high school history teacher. [_**I’m reaching out in hopes you’ll be able to pitch in $11 towards Andy’s campaign to represent our new 11th district before their February fundraising deadline.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42284753/332381296/286183310?refcode=em_20220226_f_s_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2Y3OWNlOC01Njk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nQ7oyPpOWHM-vd7Si7479Vcd3gCKf2liMeWfPUyW5qE=) I’ve known Andy literally since he was a teenager, Peter — he was once one of my star students back at Berkley High, and we’ve since become very good friends throughout the years. Even though he’s technically not my student anymore, I still like to occasionally give him grades. I recently had the chance to watch him speak to my hometown Democratic Club about his background in activism prior to getting elected, and his passion for public service won over everybody in the audience. I had no choice but to give him an A, Peter! [_**I know firsthand the type of person and leader Andy Levin is, and there’s not a candidate more equipped to represent our new 11th district. Can you make a $11 donation to help with Andy’s reelection campaign before his February deadline?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42284754/332381297/882283677?refcode=em_20220226_f_s_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2Y3OWNlOC01Njk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nQ7oyPpOWHM-vd7Si7479Vcd3gCKf2liMeWfPUyW5qE=) **Our new 11th district is Andy’s home.** I’ve watched him grow from a young teenager into a family man with a wife and children, and a leader in our community. You know why? Because we’re his family, too. He fights for us like we’re his family. This year, he fought with all his heart to bring another one of my high school students, Danny Fenster, home from unjust imprisonment overseas. Now, the Fensters and so many families in our new district are standing with Andy like he’s stood with us. Andy’s in for a tough fight this fall, so it’s going to take all of us pulling together to ensure he keeps his seat in Congress. [_**Please, consider chipping in to Andy’s campaign to represent our new 11th district before their upcoming fundraising deadline. Whether it’s $1, $5, or $11, your gift could be all the difference in making sure Andy’s helping to lead the new 11th into the future.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42284755/332381298/882283677?refcode=em_20220226_f_s_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2Y3OWNlOC01Njk3LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nQ7oyPpOWHM-vd7Si7479Vcd3gCKf2liMeWfPUyW5qE=) Thanks for reading, Barry Lepler

clean_body: I know firsthand the type of person and leader Andy Levin is, and there’s not a candidate more equipped to represent our new 11th district. | | | | | Hi Peter, I’m Barry Lepler, Andy’s high school history teacher. = I’ve known Andy literally since he was a teenager, Peter — he was once one of my star students back at Berkley High, and we’ve since become very good friends throughout the years. Even though he’s technically not my student anymore, I still like to occasionally give him grades. I recently had the chance to watch him speak to my hometown Democratic Club about his background in activism prior to getting elected, and his passion for public service won over everybody in the audience. I had no choice but to give him an A, Peter! = Our new 11th district is Andy’s home. I’ve watched him grow from a young teenager into a family man with a wife and children, and a leader in our community. You know why? Because we’re his family, too. He fights for us like we’re his family. This year, he fought with all his heart to bring another one of my high school students, Danny Fenster, home from unjust imprisonment overseas. Now, the Fensters and so many families in our new district are standing with Andy like he’s stood with us. Andy’s in for a tough fight this fall, so it’s going to take all of us pulling together to ensure he keeps his seat in Congress. = Thanks for reading, Barry Lepler | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Levin for Congress | Andy Levin For Congress P.O. Box 1050 Birmingham, MI 48012 United States | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, .

Fellow American,

name: Ohio Senate Alert
subject: losing in Ohio isn’t an option
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2504%2E3611125%2E3dPK7H ][IMG]

Defending our Senate majority won’t be easy, folks—and it will
be nearly impossible if we don’t win in Ohio.

Tim Ryan is Democrats’ best chance to defend and expand our majority in
the Senate, and here’s why:

1. Corporate billionaires and our self-funding millionaire GOP opponents
have already spent $80 million, but Tim has raised more from individual
supporters than all of his opponents COMBINED. How’s that for grassroots
momentum?

2. And unlike Tim’s GOP opponents, he’s not a millionaire! He knows what
Ohio’s working families are going through because his family is dealing
with the same stuff, complete with a mortgage and student loans.

3. The polls are neck-and-neck, proving we have what it takes to win.
Democrats are facing tough races all over the country, and this is our
best shot to flip a seat blue.

Tim can win this race, but he’s counting on you to get him there.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8284?t=1008&amount=25&akid=2504%2E3611125%2E3dPK7H ]Will you chip in a grassroots donation toward our $80,000 end-of-month
goal so that we can flip Ohio and expand our Democratic Senate majority?

name: Jamie Raskin
subject: RE: House Democrats’ End of Month deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/yr-)
Hi, it's Jamie Raskin.

Last year, I was proud to lead the efforts to hold Donald Trump accountable for inciting the deadly insurrection at our Capitol on January 6.

It was clear to me then, and it's even clearer now: After planning a political coup to overthrow the election and inciting a violent insurrection to stop the peaceful transfer of power, **Donald Trump is unfit to hold public office under the U.S. Constitution.**

So I was outraged when I discovered he's busy planning his return to power in 2024. He and his top supporters have even suggested he's interested in becoming Speaker of the House of Representatives before he reclaims the White House!

**We 're in the fight of our lives and I will do everything I can to stop Donald Trump and his followers in Congress from retaking power and enacting this plan.**

But I can't get the job done without strong grassroots support, and our Democrats are still a bit behind on our End of Month goal.

So at this crucial moment for our country, I'm asking you:

****[Will you chip in $3 to defend our House Majority and work to ensure Trump's House Republicans never return to power?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_)****

Our critical End of Month Deadline is now just 48 hours away -- so your support has never been more urgent. Can I count on your immediate support?

| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Chip in $1 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

**[Chip in $35 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/V4_GFa-)**

**[Chip in $50 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/gpgkTR82-)**

**[Chip in $100 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-cgNq~)**

**[Chip in $250 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

**[Or chip in another amount>>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

Thank you,

Jamie
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46461601&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE4Mjk4OTI2NgS2&l=14416759&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46461601&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE4Mjk4OTI2NgS2&l=14416759&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.
